content:
Goal: Create a hyper-detailed photorealistic Japanese pachislot machine screen themed around overtime work, rendered like a high-energy casino arcade cabinet with glossy chrome, black glass, purple lightning, red flames, gold trim, and dramatic glowing typography.

Canvas: 4:3 horizontal image, front-facing view of the machine, filling the frame edge to edge. Use a dark arcade environment with reflections, neon highlights, and intense contrast. No people outside the screen; the only human figure appears inside the top display.

Main top display: Show a dramatic game bonus screen with a tired Japanese office worker in a white shirt and tie leaning over a laptop at night, face intentionally blurred, with a city office window background and a wall clock behind him. The central headline must be huge metallic Japanese text 「残業」 with a purple English subtitle “ZONE” underneath, surrounded by chains, purple electricity, sparks, and smoky red-black effects. Add the slogan 「毎ゲーム 残業時間を上乗せ」 in bold white and yellow Japanese text across the lower center of the top display. In the upper-left corner, add a framed counter reading 「残り」 above a large “5G”. On the right, add a framed red-and-gold bonus time panel reading 「残業時間 +245分」. Make all text look embossed, fiery, glossy, and arcade-like.

Machine frame and side decorations: Build a luxurious pachislot cabinet frame with transparent molded plastic, chrome edges, gold ornamental accents, black lacquer, and bright purple LED lightning. Add exactly 2 large vertical side title panels: the left panel reads 「残業」 in gold Japanese characters, and the right panel reads 「4スロ」 in gold characters. Include purple lightning effects behind both side panels.

Reel section: Include exactly 3 vertical slot reels in the middle-lower area, each showing exactly 3 visible symbols for a total of 9 visible reel symbols. Left reel symbols from top to bottom: blue “REPLAY” emblem, golden bell, black plaque with 「残業」. Middle reel symbols from top to bottom: red cherries, red number 7, blue “REPLAY” emblem. Right reel symbols from top to bottom: black plaque with 「残業」, blue “REPLAY” emblem, green gift box with red ribbon. Reels should be glossy, slightly reflective, and sharply lit.

Bottom banner: Add a glowing purple-black banner below the reels with large Japanese text 「リプレイ・レア役でチャンス!」, with the final word 「チャンス!」 in bright yellow and the preceding text in white. Add small chrome buttons and machine hardware barely visible at the very bottom edge.

Visual style: Ultra-realistic pachislot photography mixed with exaggerated game UI art, intense neon purple and red palette, gold beveled type, lightning bolts, sparks, chains, reflections, and high dynamic range arcade lighting. Make it look like a real premium Japanese slot machine cabinet photographed straight on.

Customizable details: The main Japanese title is {argument name="main Japanese title" default="残業"}; the English subtitle is {argument name="English subtitle" default="ZONE"}; the remaining game count is {argument name="remaining game count" default="5G"}; the bonus time value is {argument name="bonus time value" default="+245分"}; the bottom banner text is {argument name="bottom banner text" default="リプレイ・レア役でチャンス!"}.

Constraints: Keep the exact visible count of 3 reels, 9 reel symbols, 2 side title panels, 1 top-left counter, 1 right bonus-time panel, and 1 bottom banner. Preserve the Japanese text accurately. Do not add extra logos, watermarks, subtitles, or additional characters.

description: A detailed prompt for generating a neon Japanese pachislot cabinet themed around overtime work, useful for arcade parody visuals or game UI concepts.

content:
Goal: Create a dark fantasy creature-design character sheet for {argument name="character name" default="Pombero"}, alias {argument name="alias" default="Shadow of the Monte"}, presented as a professional concept-art turnaround on a clean off-white background.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 presentation sheet, museum-white paper texture, realistic high-detail digital painting with muted earthy colors, fine ink-like labels, thin divider lines, and a polished production-design layout.

Main subject: A short, muscular nocturnal forest spirit inspired by Paraguayan rural folklore. He has rough scarred bark-like skin, dirty bare feet, long clawed fingers, a hunched primal posture, and a faceless or obscured shadowed head under a ragged straw hat. His outfit is made from layered dry leaves, bark strips, vines, feathers, shredded fabric, rope ties, a shoulder mantle, ragged skirt-like wrappings, ankle bindings, and a round tobacco pouch at the waist. The mood is silent, elusive, territorial, cunning, and feral rather than heroic.

Layout: Place one large full-body hero figure on the left, occupying about one third of the canvas, standing barefoot with one arm extended and the other hanging, covered in ragged leaf-and-bark camouflage. At the top left, add the large title “{argument name="title text" default="POMBERO"}” and beneath it the subtitle “Alias: Shadow of the Monte”. Across the upper middle show exactly 4 labeled turnaround poses: “NEUTRAL FRONT VIEW”, “BACK VIEW”, “SIDE PROFILE”, and “SECONDARY ATTITUDE”. The secondary attitude pose should show him kneeling with one knee raised, holding a smoking hand-rolled tobacco roll.

Facial / expression studies: Under the turnaround row, include exactly 6 square portrait-study panels labeled, left to right: “SLY MENACE”, “EERIE CALM”, “PREDATORY FOCUS”, “CUNNING AMUSEMENT”, “WATCHFUL SILENCE”, and “WRATH”. Each portrait is mostly hidden in shadow beneath the hat, emphasizing a silent gaze rather than readable human features.

Details row: Along the lower center, include exactly 6 close-up detail panels labeled, left to right: “HAND & TOBACCO ROLL”, “TOBACCO POUCH”, “SHOULDER WRAP DETAIL”, “WAIST DETAILS”, “FOOT & ANKLE”, and “SKIN & SCAR DETAIL”. Show gnarled fingers gripping tobacco, a round leather pouch, tangled leaf wrappings, rope knots, cracked dirty feet, and scarred bark-like skin texture.

Right-side notes and props: On the right, add an “IDENTITY NOTES” text block with the following readable content: Role: Nocturnal forest spirit. Traits: silent, cunning, territorial, primal, elusive, feared. Core theme: Paraguayan rural folklore, night, superstition, nature, fear, respect. Signature feature: silent feet and piercing gaze. Below the attitude pose, add exactly 1 key prop section titled “KEY PROP – RITUAL TOBACCO”, showing a large hand-rolled tobacco bundle tied with fiber beside dry leaves, with a caption explaining that hand-rolled tobacco is his offering, companion, and mark of his presence.

Bottom-right studies: Include exactly 4 black silhouette thumbnails titled “SILHOUETTE STUDY”, showing different readable poses of the same ragged, hat-wearing creature. Include exactly 7 vertical color swatches titled “COLOR PALETTE”, labeled left to right: “BARK GRAY”, “MONTE GREEN”, “TOBACCO BROWN”, “EARTH UMBER”, “DRY LEAF BEIGE”, “NIGHT CHARCOAL”, and “BLACK”.

Visual style: Hyper-detailed cinematic creature concept art, earthy brown-gray-green palette, photorealistic anatomy mixed with folklore monster design, weathered textures, subtle shadows under each figure, crisp labels, thin black rules, organized like a studio character design board. Avoid bright colors, cute proportions, modern clothing, weapons, logos, watermarks, or extra panels beyond the specified counts.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 landscape poster, high-resolution, with a white, navy blue, black, and gold ink-brush aesthetic. The composition should feel like a Japanese sword-fighting game splash screen with layered calligraphy, paint splatters, and dynamic diagonal motion.

Main subject: A beautiful young female samurai occupies the right half of the image, shown from thighs up in a dynamic three-quarter pose. She has very long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="deep navy blue"} hair whipping leftward across the poster, a white kimono top with loose sleeves, a dark blue hakama skirt, and a blue waist sash. She carries a sheathed katana at her waist with ornate gold fittings and blue wrapping. Her right hand is raised in a delicate gesture near the sword hilt, wearing a blue bead bracelet. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular gray blur centered over the face, while the hair and outfit remain sharp.

Background and style: Use rough black and cobalt-blue brush strokes, icy blue watercolor splashes, gold paint streaks, scattered petals, and a textured paper background. The style is polished anime key art with crisp linework, glossy hair highlights, dramatic shadows, and elegant Japanese calligraphy. Add black ink borders and diagonal blue brush swashes near the bottom.

Top-left logo area: Add a metallic fantasy game logo reading “SAMURAI SPIRITS” with small Japanese katakana beneath it. Place it over a black-and-gold brush stroke.

Left profile area: Include a black brush label reading “秘剣 —— 燕返し”. Beneath it add two short Japanese flavor-text lines. Add a very large black calligraphy name “橘 右京ちゃん” across the lower-left to center area, with small romanized text “UYUKI TACHIBANNA” underneath. content:
Goal: Create a cute Japanese game-character profile sheet for {argument name="character name" default="ぽちいな"}, based purely on an original character concept: a cheerful young girl with a small pet dog companion, designed like a collectible RPG character card mixed with a scrapbook character-setting sheet.

Canvas: Square 1:1 composition on a warm off-white paper background, soft pastel pink and brown ink, hand-drawn scrapbook style, stickers, washi-tape frames, doodled flowers, hearts, paw prints, sparkles, arrows, paper clips, and torn-note panels. Use a bright, friendly, kawaii fantasy-game aesthetic.

Main layout: Place the full-body main character photo-cutout style figure in the center-right, outlined with a white sticker border and pink shadow. She is crouching, smiling toward the viewer, making a peace sign near her face, wearing a white short-sleeved embroidered blouse with small red flowers, a white pleated skirt, white socks, pink shoes, short light-blonde bob hair, and a pink flower hair accessory. Her companion dog lies at her feet in the lower center, a small white-and-brown spaniel-like dog wearing a pink harness or outfit. Keep the face area simplified or softly obscured if needed, but preserve the pose and cute atmosphere.

Title area: At top left, large hand-drawn Japanese title text 「ぽちいな」 with a paw-print mark, and a pink ribbon underneath reading “POCHIINA”. Add small flowers, stars, hearts, and a thin sketchy rectangular title frame.

Profile panels and text: Use exactly 12 distinct information panels around the central figure. 1) A species/origin note panel at upper left with Japanese labels for species and origin, describing her as a human who uses healing magic and a girl born from a flower-and-animal-loving family. 2) A STATUS panel on the left with exactly 7 stat rows and horizontal pink bars: HP 840, MP 620, Attack 420, Defense 380, Magic 760, Agility 720, Luck 890, each with a small icon. 3) A WEAPON panel below it showing a magical flower staff, labeled 「お花のステッキ」, with a small staff illustration. 4) A special move panel labeled 「必殺技」 describing “Happy Flower Shine,” a healing flower-light attack. 5) A companion panel at bottom left labeled 「相棒：わんこ」 describing the dog companion. 6) A circular inset illustration near the bottom center showing the girl standing with the dog in a pink magical flower field. 7) A speech bubble near the character’s head containing 「今日も一緒にたのしくいこっ！」. 8) A rarity card at the top right labeled “RARITY” with exactly 5 stars: four filled pink stars and one empty gray star. 9) A personality panel labeled 「性格」 with four short lines describing kindness, brightness, compassion, and healing aura. 10) A likes/dislikes panel with two columns: likes marked by a heart icon and dislikes marked by a blue cloud/rain icon. 11) A favorite-things panel labeled 「得意なこと」 listing four things such as healing injured people, cheering everyone up, nurturing flowers, and photographing with a peace sign. 12) A weakness and flavor-text area on the right, split into small note boxes labeled 「弱点」 and 「その他・フレーバーテキスト」, describing loneliness, over-kindness, public performance nervousness, always being with the dog, finding small flowers, and gently transforming the world with her smile.

Bottom details: Add a pink brush-stroke quote banner near the lower center reading 「一緒にいるだけで、しあわせになれるよっ！」. Along the bottom edge place exactly 5 small attribute icons with labels: healing, support, nature, animal, and light. At the bottom right place exactly 2 small Polaroid-style photo cards, one showing the girl posing and one showing the dog lying down, with tape and a pink flower decoration.

Visual style: Soft natural lighting, pastel pink highlights, sketchy brown outlines, delicate hand-lettered Japanese text, scrapbook collage, sticker borders, cozy magical-girl RPG profile-sheet design. Keep the image information-dense but readable, with all panels balanced around the central cutout.

Constraints: Use Japanese text for visible labels and quotes as specified; use English only for “POCHIINA,” “STATUS,” “WEAPON,” and “RARITY.” Maintain exactly 7 status rows, 5 rarity stars, 5 bottom attribute icons, 2 Polaroid cards, and 12 information panels. Do not add extra characters beyond the girl and her one dog companion.

content:
Goal: Create a clean fantasy character concept sheet for a heavily armored samurai warrior, suitable for game or film pre-production.

Canvas: Wide horizontal white studio background, roughly 16:9, with faint gray watercolor texture at the edges and no environment. Use crisp comic-book concept art linework, detailed ink outlines, subtle cel shading, muted colors, and high-contrast armor highlights.

Layout: Show exactly 4 discrete full-body figures arranged left to right: 1 small pale gray human scale silhouette on the far left, 1 large front-view warrior, 1 large three-quarter-view warrior facing slightly right, and 1 large right-side-profile warrior. Keep the three warrior views evenly spaced and aligned at the feet like a turnaround sheet.

Subject details: The character is a tall, broad, muscular older male samurai with {argument name="hair color" default="long white hair"} tied back, visible hairline and ponytail, and a {argument name="face treatment" default="plain blurred rectangular face censor"} over the face in each warrior view. He wears dark layered samurai armor in {argument name="armor colors" default="black lacquer with deep burgundy red plates and cords"}: large segmented shoulder guards, plated chest cuirass, layered waist skirt armor, forearm bracers, shin guards, wrapped trousers, split-toe boots, and tied waist sash. The armor is bulky, worn, and functional, with many rectangular lamellar plates, rivets, straps, red lacing, and black under-cloth.

Weapons and counted elements: Include exactly 3 warrior poses and exactly 1 scale silhouette. Include exactly 4 visible sword elements across the sheet: a sheathed katana or sword handle rising diagonally behind the front-view warrior’s left shoulder, a short dark scabbard or sword held downward near the front-view warrior’s right side, a sheathed katana handle rising diagonally behind the three-quarter-view warrior’s left shoulder, and a curved katana drawn at the right-side-profile warrior’s waist extending diagonally backward. Do not add extra weapons.

Pose details: Front-view warrior stands powerfully with fists clenched, feet apart, shoulders square. Three-quarter-view warrior stands with one fist clenched and the other hand near a lowered scabbard, head turned slightly. Side-profile warrior stands upright looking left, showing the layered side silhouette of the shoulder armor, waist plates, ponytail, and sword at the hip.

Style constraints: Keep the background blank white, no title text, no labels, no logos, no watermark. Use a realistic comic concept-art style rather than anime chibi. Make the armor intricate and readable, with dark red-black palette, white hair contrast, and clean full-body silhouettes.

content: An adult oriental fantasy female character, dreamy galaxy fairy style, 3D CG high-precision illustration texture, 9:16 vertical composition, the scene is filled with holographic galaxies, flowing light particles, Milky Way ribbons, and soft mist halos. The character is located slightly to the left of the center, half-body to thigh perspective, with the body in an elegant S-shaped dynamic standing pose. Her upper body tilts slightly to one side, the waist is naturally constricted and gently twisted, and the hips form a soft arc in the opposite direction. One shoulder is slightly raised while the other is relaxed. The overall posture looks like a slow rotation in the starry river, appearing both light and feminine. Her head is slightly lowered, her face is in a two-thirds profile, her eyes are gentle, quiet, and dreamy, and her expression is cool and elegant. She has exquisite and soft oriental fantasy features, fair and transparent skin with soft subsurface scattering and pearly highlights. Her facial contours are clean and delicate, with a slender nose, soft lips, and long eyelashes. Her long hair is a gradient of pale silver-white and light pink-purple; the strands are blown by the stellar wind, scattering widely to the right side of the frame, forming a strong flowing arc that echoes the S-shaped body curve. Her outfit is a dreamy galaxy gown, made of light and transparent material while maintaining elegant restraint. The shoulders have a soft tulle structure, and the chest and waist feature galaxy-like gradient light textures. Colors are mainly light pink, light blue, lavender purple, and pearl white, with local golden stardust accents. The skirt seems fused from nebulae and tulle, fluttering lightly and forming spiral light bands around her body, emphasizing the waistline, shoulder-neck line, and overall S-shaped posture without being overly revealing. The background is a dreamy cosmic galaxy space with an overall color palette of light pink, light blue, lavender purple, and soft gold, filled with fine starlight, stardust particles, Milky Way streamlines, and translucent holographic light bands. Light falls softly from the upper left, creating gentle rim lighting on her hair, shoulders, cheeks, and the edges of the gown. The image has a strong sense of atmosphere with soft halos, making the whole scene feel like floating in a Milky Way dream. Composition requirements: The character's body lines should form a clear but natural S-curve; the shoulders, waist, and hips should form a soft reverse dynamic; the hair and galaxy ribbons together form a wrapping flow; the image should retain a lot of dreamy mist and stardust; the character should be elegant, soft, dreamy, and sophisticated; focus on expressing the soft curves of the female figure, the galaxy fairy temperament, and a high-end sense of fantasy. Style keywords: dreamy fantasy girl, celestial goddess, galaxy dress, holographic starlight, soft pastel colors, ethereal beauty, elegant S-curve pose, cinematic lighting, ultra detailed 3D CG, soft glow, translucent silk, star particles, romantic fantasy atmosphere, high-end illustration, 16K detail, vertical poster composition. content:
Goal: Create a clean reusable 2D pixel-art game asset sheet for a cozy farming village tileset, labeled and organized on a plain white background. Use crisp 32-bit style pixel art, orthographic/front-facing RPG perspective, consistent scale, soft outlines, warm saturated colors, and no shadows outside the sprites. Theme: {argument name="tileset theme" default="cozy farming village"}.

Canvas: Landscape asset sheet, 4:3 ratio, white background, neatly spaced rows and columns. Add small green sprout icons before each section label. Use dark pixel-font labels in English.

Layout and required sections:
- HOUSES: exactly 5 small cottage buildings, each front-facing with different roof colors and details: 1 blue-roof cottage, 1 golden-yellow roof cottage, 1 green roof cottage with planter boxes, 1 orange-red roof cottage with flowers, 1 purple roof cottage with flowers.
- SHOP: exactly 1 shop building with a purple roof, striped purple awning, hanging sign reading “SHOP”, flower pots, and a small sidewalk sign.
- BARN: exactly 1 red barn with orange roof, large double doors, side hardware, and one hay pile.
- FARM PLOTS: exactly 3 fenced rectangular farm plots: 1 planted vegetable plot with greens, wheat, and root crops; 1 tilled plot with small sprouts; 1 empty tilled soil plot.
- SOIL TILES: exactly 8 square terrain tiles in a 2-row grid: 4 plain tiles on the top row, showing dark soil, medium dirt, light sand, and grass; 4 planted or transition tiles on the bottom row, showing seeded soil variations and a dirt-to-grass transition.
- TREES: exactly 4 leafy fruit/deciduous trees: 1 round dark green tree, 1 larger bright green tree, 1 smaller yellow-green tree, and 1 apple tree with red fruit.
- BUSHES: exactly 3 round bushes: 1 plain green bush, 1 flowering bush with pale blossoms, 1 berry bush with red berries.
- SPECIAL TREE: exactly 1 palm tree with a curved brown trunk and green fronds.
- LOGS & STUMPS: exactly 5 items: 1 long log, 1 cut log, 1 hollow log, 1 large stump, 1 small sprouting stump.
- BEACH PROPS: exactly 5 items: 1 red-and-white beach umbrella, 1 blue striped lounge chair, 1 pink starfish, 1 pink shell, 1 beige shell.
- FLOWERS: exactly 6 small flower sprites: white daisies, yellow flowers, pink flowers, orange-red flowers, purple lavender, and a pink tulip.
- VILLAGE PROPS: exactly 18 village objects in two rows: wooden signpost, lantern post, mailbox, chalkboard sign, wooden crate, barrel, burlap sack, flower pot, wooden bench, stone well, bucket, produce cart, clay pot, flower planter box, round flower planter, market stall, blue-checkered table with flowers, and another lantern post.
- FARM PROPS: exactly 9 farm objects: hay bale, blue water trough, hay cart, short wooden fence segment, milk can, pitchfork, shovel, blue watering can, and long wooden planter box.
- SMALL DETAILS: exactly 12 ground-detail sprites: 4 rocks, 1 tiny sprout, 1 tall reed clump, 1 grass tuft, 1 red mushroom cluster, 1 yellow flower patch, 1 white flower patch, 1 lily pad, and 1 lily pad with pink water lily.
- FENCES: exactly 4 fence sprites: rail fence, vertical plank fence, rope-post fence, and short gate/fence section.

Visual style: {argument name="visual style" default="cute high-quality pixel art game tileset"}. Keep every asset isolated, centered in its own space, and ready to cut out for game use. Use consistent outlines, consistent lighting from upper left, and no overlapping sprites. Text labels should use a pixel font with the section names exactly as listed. Avoid extra decorative background elements, watermarks, mockup UI, or perspective distortions.
title: Cozy Farming Village Pixel Asset Sheet

content:
Goal: Create a bright cozy pixel-art farming village map on small islands in a blue ocean, like a top-down/isometric 16-bit life-sim game screenshot.

Canvas: 4:3 landscape image, about 1024×768, crisp pixel art with no UI overlay, no borders, no watermark. Use a vibrant turquoise ocean background with gentle wave highlights, ripples around shores, scattered lily pads, and small rocks.

Layout: Show exactly 6 grassy/sandy islands connected by wooden bridges and docks. The largest central island sits in the middle and contains the main house, paths, a fenced crop field, a well, a signpost, a human character, and a dog. Four smaller grassy islands surround it at upper left, upper right, lower left, and right. One small sandy beach island sits near the bottom center.

Island count and contents:
1. Central island: irregular grassy island with dirt paths forming a crossroad. Place a cozy blue-roof cottage near the top center with a chimney puffing smoke, round attic window, wooden front door, flower boxes, shrubs, and a short fence behind it. Put a small pixel farmer character named {argument name="character name" default="young farmer"} standing slightly below center beside a corgi-like dog. Add a fenced crop plot at the lower center with exactly 4 crop rows: leafy green vegetables, white turnips, orange carrots, and golden wheat. Add a stone well to the left of the crop plot, a wooden signpost with a hanging lantern near the left-center path, bushes with flowers, small stones, and daisies.
2. Upper-left island: red-roof barn with open double doors, hay bales, a fenced pen, and exactly 1 black-and-white cow. Include a large leafy tree, crates, flowers, and a wooden bridge connecting to the central island.
3. Upper-right island: village shop with purple roof, striped purple-and-white awning, front door, window display, flower pots, barrel, and a freestanding signboard. The sign above the awning must read {argument name="shop sign text" default="SHOP"}. Include a fruit tree with red apples and a bridge connecting to the central island.
4. Lower-left island: fishing dock island with a wooden pier, a lamppost, barrels, crates, small tackle box/sign, and exactly 1 small wooden rowboat tied near the dock. Connect this island to the central island with a wooden bridge.
5. Right island: small orange-roof cottage with chimney, round attic window, front door, blue window, flower box, small fence, trees, flowers, and a wooden bridge connecting to the central island.
6. Bottom-center island: tiny sandy beach with a palm tree, red-and-white beach umbrella, blue-striped lounge chair, starfish, shell, and grass around the edges; it is not connected by a bridge.

Discrete element counts to preserve: exactly 6 islands, exactly 4 bridges connecting to the central island, exactly 4 buildings total (barn, blue-roof cottage, purple shop, orange-roof cottage), exactly 1 human character, exactly 2 animals (1 cow and 1 dog), exactly 1 rowboat, exactly 1 crop field with 4 visible crop types, exactly 1 well, exactly 1 signpost lantern, exactly 1 beach umbrella, exactly 1 lounge chair, exactly 1 palm tree.

Visual style: Cute high-detail pixel art, top-down three-quarter perspective, warm sunny daylight, saturated colors, soft shadows, chunky readable shapes, detailed grass texture, tiny flowers, rounded shoreline outlines, and animated-game charm. Use {argument name="water color" default="bright turquoise blue"} for the surrounding ocean, {argument name="main roof color" default="blue"} for the central cottage roof, and {argument name="overall mood" default="cheerful cozy farming adventure"} as the emotional tone.

Constraints: Keep the whole scene visible as a single map-like composition. Do not add interface buttons, text besides the shop sign, extra characters, extra animals, vehicles, modern objects, or photorealism.
title: Cozy Pixel Farm Island Village
description: Generates a colorful top-down pixel-art farming village spread across connected ocean islands for game concept art or cozy worldbuilding.

content:

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 image split into exactly 2 equal vertical panels with a thin white divider in the center. Soft pastel lighting, dreamy waterfront atmosphere, high-detail anime illustration.

Layout: Left panel shows one character seated or kneeling near the canal, facing slightly toward the viewer, holding a tall white gondola-style flagpole on the far left. Right panel shows a second variation of the character in a similar pose, holding a plush mascot. Both faces are intentionally obscured by opaque square censor blocks.

Subject details: Use exactly 2 sailor-girl variants. Variant 1 on the left has {argument name="left hair color" default="mint green"} long wavy hair, a white sailor beret with blue trim, a small white flower hair accessory, a white short-sleeved sailor dress with blue and gold trim, white gloves, gold brooch details, and a blue ribbon at the waist. She holds a white flag with a blue curved emblem, and a small raccoon-like mascot sits beside her. Variant 2 on the right has {argument name="right hair color" default="pink"} twin-drill pigtails with large blue bows, a matching white sailor beret with blue trim and a tiny wing-like accessory, a white sailor dress with blue and gold trim, white gloves, and gold ornaments. She hugs a round white-and-brown cat-like plush mascot wearing a blue bow and gold medallion.

Counted visible elements: exactly 2 vertical panels; exactly 2 main girls; exactly 2 opaque square face-cover blocks; exactly 2 mascots, one raccoon-like animal in the left panel and one cat-like plush in the right panel; exactly 1 tall white flag in the left panel; exactly 1 central white divider.

Background: A romantic Venetian/Aqua-style canal city with pale cream and blue buildings, arched bridges, waterfront colonnades, shimmering turquoise water, reflections, distant towers, soft blue sky, and tiny birds. Keep the background continuous in mood but separated by the panel divider.

Visual style: Polished Japanese anime key visual, pastel palette, soft bloom, delicate line art, glossy eyes mostly hidden by the censor blocks, ornate sailor uniform details, cute fantasy maritime aesthetic, high resolution, gentle bokeh and watercolor-like atmospheric depth.

Constraints: Keep both face-obscuring squares clearly visible and opaque, left block in muted beige-gray and right block in pale dusty pink. Do not add readable text except the simple blue emblem on the flag. Avoid photorealism, avoid extra characters, avoid more panels, avoid logos or watermarks.

content:
Goal: Create a realistic screenshot of a ChatGPT-style web conversation showing an image-generation result for game assets, with Japanese UI text and four generated asset thumbnails.

Canvas: Landscape browser/app screenshot, approximately 797×750 px, white background, clean minimal interface, cropped so only the assistant response area and the bottom row of images are visible.

Layout: At the top center, place one rounded light-gray user message bubble containing {argument name="user request text" default="image genでゲームで使えそうなアセットの画像を4枚を個別で生成して それぞれを3D化してみて！"}. Below it, left aligned, show a small gray status line reading 「25m 50s作業しました 〉」 followed by a thin horizontal divider. Under that, create an assistant response in Japanese with file lists and blue clickable file links.

Text content: Include the assistant paragraph 「できました。4枚のゲーム向けアセット画像を生成して、それぞれPixal3DでGLB化まで通しました。」 Then the label 「画像:」 followed by exactly 4 bullet links with small image/file icons: 1) mana_crystal_alpha.png, 2) treasure_chest_alpha.png, 3) energy_turret_alpha.png, 4) mushroom_house_alpha.png. Then the label 「3D化したGLB:」 followed by exactly 4 bullet links with document icons: 1) mana_crystal.glb, 2) treasure_chest.glb, 3) energy_turret.glb, 4) mushroom_house.glb. Then add the closing Japanese sentence 「生成したのは、魔法クリスタル、宝箱、SFエネルギータレット、きのこ家です。背景はクロマキーから透明化して、3D化に渡しています。」

Bottom image strip: Show exactly 4 rounded-square thumbnail cards in one horizontal row, each about 178×178 px with small gaps. Thumbnail 1 has a vivid green chroma-key background and a stylized fantasy {argument name="asset one" default="blue mana crystal obelisk on a dark stone base"}. Thumbnail 2 has a vivid green chroma-key background and a {argument name="asset two" default="wooden treasure chest with dark metal bands, gold lock, and red jewel"}. Thumbnail 3 has a vivid green chroma-key background and a {argument name="asset three" default="gray sci-fi energy turret with blue glowing core and cannon barrel"}. Thumbnail 4 has a bright magenta chroma-key background and a {argument name="asset four" default="cute mushroom house with red spotted cap roof, wooden door, and warm windows"}. All four assets are polished 3D game-art icons with transparent-cutout style lighting, centered and isolated.

Visual style: Modern ChatGPT interface screenshot, Japanese typography, black body text, blue link text, small monochrome icons, generous margins, subtle divider lines. The asset thumbnails should look like high-quality mobile game props rendered in colorful semi-realistic 3D.

Constraints: Include exactly 8 file links total, exactly 4 PNG links and exactly 4 GLB links, and exactly 4 asset thumbnail images. Do not add extra panels, watermarks, browser chrome, avatars, or unrelated UI controls.
title: ChatGPT Game Asset Generation Screenshot
description: A prompt for recreating a Japanese ChatGPT-style result screen showing four game asset thumbnails and their PNG and GLB download links.

Goal: Create a monochrome retro sci-fi broadsheet newspaper front page for a fictional space game, titled {argument name="newspaper name" default="The Gradient News & Observer"}, with dense editorial layout, distressed ink texture, engraved line art, and mock classified-news typography.

Canvas: Tall vertical newspaper page, approximately 2:3 aspect ratio, off-white paper background, black ink only, slightly aged print texture, thin decorative borders, tiny registration marks, halftone dots, honeycomb grid motifs, technical diagram ornaments, and vintage newspaper engraving style.

Masthead: At the very top, a large ornate banner with the title “THE GRADIENT NEWS & OBSERVER” in bold decorative serif lettering. Under it, a ribbon slogan reads “ALL THE NEWS THE VOID ALLOWS.” Add small sci-fi ornaments: a planet landscape vignette on the left, a satellite dish on the right, star-map nodes, filigree curls, and rules. Beneath the masthead, include an edition strip reading “FRONT-PAGE EDITION — TWELVE HOURS ENDING 2026-05-15 19:17 UTC.”

Layout: Use exactly 10 bordered article panels beneath the masthead. Arrange them as: 2 large lead stories across the upper half, 5 narrow vertical story cards in the middle row, and 3 wider panels in the bottom row. Every panel should have its own small category tag, bold condensed all-caps headline, columns of tiny readable-looking body text, decorative dividers, and one or more black-and-white sci-fi illustrations.

Article count and visible content:
1. Large upper-left lead article, category “COMBAT WIRE,” headline: “IZMIR YBEL STACKS OFFENSIVE GARRISONS IN CONTESTED BORDERLANDS; DOGTOWN PROBE LOST IN TWIN SKIRMISHES.” Include a huge hovering fortress or orbital platform above an industrial city gate, with roads receding toward it.
2. Large upper-right lead article, category “OPEN CHANNEL,” headline: “DISTRESS CALL FROM DEEP SECTOR DRAWS VOLUNTEER RESCUE OFFER.” Include a deep-space station, a rescue ship, asteroid debris, and a bright explosion or distress flare.
3. Middle-row first narrow card, category “FRONTIER JUSTICE,” headline: “THE CONSPICUOUS PILOT JOE CHRISTMAS HOLDS THE OPEN CHANNEL.” Include a skull-and-wings emblem, a small spacecraft, a planetary horizon, and a tiny monitor graphic.
4. Middle-row second narrow card, category “SHIPYARD,” headline: “EIGHT KESTRELS OFF THE LOT IN A SINGLE HALF-DAY.” Include a crashed or parked angular ship on rocky ground.
5. Middle-row third narrow card, category “CARTOGRAPHY,” headline: “P-1 LOGS 703 SECTOR HOPS ACROSS THE HALF-DAY.” Include a small explorer craft flying above a hex-map planet surface.
6. Middle-row fourth narrow card, category “PUBLIC AFFAIRS,” headline: “PILOT FILES OPEN-CHANNEL BUG REPORT ON MOBILE CLIENT.” Include exactly 3 stacked numbered ship/profile rows labeled “1 AZURE HAULER,” “2 CHARTREUSE HAULER,” and “3 JADE HAULER.”
7. Middle-row fifth narrow card, category “CORPORATE AFFAIRS,” headline: “EIGHT NEW CORPORATIONS CHARTERED IN TWELVE HOURS.” Include small spacecraft thumbnails and industrial silhouettes.
8. Bottom-left wide panel, category “MARKET UPDATE,” headline: “MARKET UPDATE — TWELVE-HOUR GALACTIC INDEX.” Include a table with columns such as “MEASURE,” “VALUE,” “TOP OF THE BOARDS,” “PILOT,” and “SCORE,” plus a small bar/line chart and a long cargo ship illustration.
9. Bottom-middle panel, category “OPEN-CHANNEL CONFIDENTIAL,” headline: “TWO NAMES, ONE ENDORSEMENT, ELEVEN SECONDS APART.” Include a badge-like pilot emblem and a round capsule or pod drifting in space.
10. Bottom-right panel, category “THE MEGA-PORT SET,” headline: “THE MEGA-PORT SET FILES AN RSVP.” Include a uniformed captain portrait in the upper right, a star-network diagram, and a sleek landed spacecraft.

Visual style: 19th-century newspaper meets dieselpunk space opera; dense black ink crosshatching, stipple shading, halftone screens, fine technical linework, distressed letterpress, narrow gutters, ornate corner brackets, and bold condensed headline fonts. Make the page feel authentic, busy, collectible, and slightly humorous, like an in-universe gazette.

Constraints: Use only black, gray, and off-white. Keep all 10 panels visible and separated. No modern glossy color, no photorealism, no watermark, no extra panels. Body text may be tiny pseudo-newspaper copy but headlines and main masthead must be legible. Maintain the fictional sci-fi newspaper theme and the exact masthead slogan.
title: Retro Sci-Fi Newspaper Front Page
description: Generates a detailed black-and-white in-universe space newspaper front page with ten sci-fi news panels and vintage engraved styling.

content:
Create a clean sprite-sheet style asset image for a vertical retro pixel-art space shooter, on a plain white background with no grid and no labels. Show exactly 11 separate pixel-art spaceship and power-up sprites arranged in three rows, all with crisp black outlines, high-contrast shading, metallic panels, tiny vents, glowing cores, and 16-bit arcade detailing. Use a saturated sci-fi palette dominated by {argument name="main ship color" default="deep violet purple"}, teal/cyan, dark navy, black, gold/orange armor accents, and neon green energy lights.

Layout: top row contains exactly 3 large player/enemy ships: left is a small blue-white-and-gold triangular fighter with three bright cyan engine flames; center is the largest wide boss ship, symmetrical and heavily armored, purple and teal with multiple wing spikes, twin side cannons, gold trim, and a large glowing green hexagonal reactor in the middle; right is a tall vertical purple capital ship with pointed nose, side fins, teal panels, gold details, and a glowing green central reactor. Middle row contains exactly 4 medium enemy ships: a crescent-shaped teal and purple craft with two upward curved horns and a green cockpit glow; a compact rear-view purple winged fighter with side thrusters; a squat central gunship with teal cockpit dome, purple wings, gold barrels, and twin cannons; a broad purple bomber with swept wings, side engine pods, and a large dark central intake. Bottom row contains exactly 4 small collectible or module sprites: two square neon-green reactor power-up tiles with beveled purple/teal/gold frames, followed by two identical small cylindrical engine or booster pods with teal top caps, purple bodies, gold front panels, black exhausts, and tiny side fins.

Style constraints: production-ready pixel art, orthographic/top-down view, transparent-asset feel but rendered on white, sharp square pixels, no anti-aliased painterly look, no text, no watermark, no shadows beyond pixel-art contact shading, consistent scale hierarchy and spacing, like a polished mobile shoot’em-up tileset.

content: Create a vertical retro pixel-art space shooter scrolling background, designed as a seamless mobile game asset. The canvas is a tall 9:16 portrait frame with a dark central flight corridor left mostly open for gameplay. Fill the scene with a deep black starfield, hundreds of tiny white, blue, and violet pixel stars, and two luminous vertical nebula streams: one winding down the left side in electric purple and blue, and one winding down the right side in purple with cyan highlights. Add exactly 3 visible planets: a large purple cratered planet near the upper left edge, a large blue-purple rim-lit planet partially cropped on the lower right edge, and a small purple moon just below that lower-right planet. Add exactly 22 rocky asteroids of varied sizes, irregular cratered gray-brown forms with purple shadowing, distributed around the border while keeping the center mostly clear: 1 huge asteroid near the upper right, 1 medium asteroid at the right-middle edge, 1 medium asteroid at the lower left edge, 1 large asteroid cropped at the bottom left corner, 1 large asteroid cropped at the lower right corner, plus 17 smaller asteroids scattered near the top edge, side edges, and lower border. Use crisp pixel-art rendering with high-detail dithering, chunky jagged silhouettes, bright rim highlights, no outlines that look vector-smooth, no ships, no UI, no text, no watermark. Color palette: black space, violet and magenta nebula clouds, electric blue accents, white star glints, gray rocky asteroids with cool purple shadows. The image should feel production-ready as a vertical shoot ’em up background tile, dramatic but readable, with the gameplay lane clear in the center.

content:
Goal: Create a clean white-background production asset sheet for a vertical retro pixel-art space shooter, showing separate glowing projectile, explosion, pickup, asteroid, and particle-effect sprites in a consistent 2D pixel-art style.

Canvas: Square 1:1 sprite sheet, about 768×768 px, pure white background, no grid, no labels, no borders, sprites evenly spaced in horizontal rows with transparent-looking whitespace around each asset.

Visual style: High-resolution retro pixel art with crisp edges, neon glow, saturated colors, arcade shoot’em-up VFX, black or dark outlines only where needed, additive bloom-like halos, no text.

Color palette: Use three main energy colors: {argument name="cyan energy color" default="electric cyan"}, {argument name="purple energy color" default="magenta violet"}, and {argument name="green energy color" default="lime green"}, plus orange/yellow fire for explosions and gray-brown rocks for asteroids.

Layout and exact asset count: Arrange exactly 103 visible sprites in 8 rows. Row 1: 17 cyan player-shot sprites, including tiny bullets, small teardrop shots, medium diamonds, paired vertical bolts, triple clusters, grouped shard volleys, three narrow exclamation-like bolts, two long laser beams, one large missile-like glowing spear, and two cyan starburst impact flashes. Row 2: 16 purple enemy-shot sprites, including small round bullets, larger orbs, a thin diamond bolt, paired bolts, triple grouped bolts, clustered shards, three vertical capsules, three single vertical bolts, and two purple starburst impacts. Row 3: 16 green enemy-shot sprites matching the purple row types: small diamonds, larger diamonds, a bright spear bolt, paired bolts, triple grouped bolts, clustered shards, three capsules, three single vertical bolts, and two green starburst impacts. Row 4: 15 special energy sprites: three circular neon orbs in cyan, purple, and green; three larger cracked plasma orbs in cyan, purple, and green; three vertical ground-strike laser columns in cyan, purple, and green with splashing bases; one solid cyan vertical beam; and three droplet-over-ring portal effects in cyan, purple, and green. Row 5: 9 explosion and impact sprites: five orange fire explosions decreasing from very large to tiny, followed by four purple electric impact bursts decreasing from medium to tiny plus a small diamond sparkle at the end. Row 6: 10 gameplay objects and small shots: one green health pickup icon with a white plus sign, one green mechanical power-up module, one dark spiked mine, four orange arrow/fireball projectile frames facing right, and three purple homing/particle projectile clusters. Row 7: 10 asteroid/debris sprites: six rocky asteroids decreasing from large to pebble size, followed by four broken debris clusters of scattered rock fragments. Row 8: 10 particle sparkle clusters: two cyan sparkle clusters, two purple sparkle clusters, two green sparkle clusters, two orange sparkle clusters, and two sparse orange trailing sparkle clusters.

Subject details: Make the projectiles readable as individual game sprites, each centered in its own whitespace area. Energy bullets should be symmetrical, vertically oriented where appropriate, and glow softly. Explosions should use layered yellow cores, orange petals, red outlines, and scattered sparks. Asteroids should be irregular dark rock forms with pixel highlights and shadows. Pickups should be bolder and more icon-like than projectiles.

Constraints: Generate only the sprite sheet assets, not a gameplay screenshot. No background scene, no UI, no characters, no ships, no typography, no watermark. Keep every asset isolated and production-ready for cutting into tiles or sprites.

content: Create a premium vertical mobile game screenshot for a retro pixel-art space shooter, portrait 9:16. The image must look like an actual in-game scene, not a poster or asset sheet. Use crisp high-resolution pixel art with dense neon detail, black space background, purple nebula clouds, star field, scattered asteroids, and two visible planets near the lower left and lower right edges. Center the action vertically: at the bottom center is the player ship, a white, cyan, and gold angular fighter with three bright cyan engine flames and blue cockpit glass, firing a thick central stream of cyan laser bullets upward. At the top center is one enormous symmetrical boss battleship in purple, teal, dark gray, gold, and neon green, with wide wings, many armor panels, two large side cannons, glowing green core diamond in the middle, and blue exhaust trails beneath it. The scene shows intense bullet-hell combat: exactly 1 player ship, exactly 1 giant boss ship, exactly 4 smaller enemy fighters around the middle area, exactly 2 crescent-shaped drones near the upper left and upper right sides, exactly 2 round green shield drones near the mid-left and mid-right, exactly 1 orange explosion slightly left of center, exactly 1 green health pickup icon with a plus sign on the lower right, many cyan player shots rising in columns, and multiple purple and green enemy projectiles descending diagonally. Overlay a futuristic cyan and magenta pixel HUD with transparent dark panels and sharp sci-fi borders. Top left HUD: label “SHIELDS” with exactly 10 glowing blue hex shield icons, and below it a score panel reading “SCORE” and {argument name="score value" default="00547890"}. Top center HUD: label “TIMER” with a clock icon and {argument name="timer value" default="01:48"}. Top right HUD: label “BONUS TIMER” with a segmented magenta bar showing exactly 6 filled pink segments and 3 empty dark segments, and below it a “KILLS” panel with a purple alien skull icon and {argument name="kills value" default="235"}. Bottom left HUD: “WEAPON” panel with a cyan three-shot weapon icon and a small charge meter with exactly 4 filled cyan bars and 2 empty bars. Bottom center HUD: “OVERDRIVE” panel with exactly 10 filled orange bars and 8 empty dark bars. Bottom right HUD: “SMART BOMB” panel with a skull bomb icon and {argument name="smart bomb count" default="x03"}. Keep all UI text pixelated, legible, and aligned to the screen edges like a real mobile arcade game interface. Use vibrant cyan, violet, magenta, green, and orange glow effects, strong contrast, symmetrical composition, no watermark, no extra logos, no realistic 3D rendering, no blurred painterly style.

content:
Goal: Create a colorful kawaii character design sheet for {argument name="character name" default="Party Sheep"}, an energetic social mascot themed around music, connection, and party vibes.

Canvas: Wide horizontal character sheet, approximately 16:9, white background with pink and gold sparkles, music notes, tiny stars, and playful decorative flourishes. Use a polished anime/chibi concept-art style with clean linework, glossy highlights, soft shading, and sticker-like presentation.

Top-left title area: Large decorative headline text reading “PARTY SHEEP” in a pink-to-gold elegant serif display font, with small sparkles and music notes around it. Under it, smaller text “AC Sheep”, then large Japanese text “パリピ羊” in bright pink. Beneath that, a black ribbon banner with gold trim reading “The Social Energy Connector”. Add a short description block: “A vibrant sheep who lives for connection and good vibes. Party Sheep brings people together, shares energy, and turns any moment into a celebration. 交流 (connection) is energy!”

Top-center profile card: Rounded rectangle outline in soft pink containing exactly 5 labeled rows: 1) SPECIES: Party Sheep (パリピ羊), 2) PERSONALITY: Outgoing, Warm, Charismatic, 3) LIKES: Parties, People, Music, Good Vibes, QR codes, Dance, Sharing energy, 4) DISLIKES: Awkward silence, Boring plans, Low battery, 5) SPECIAL TRAIT: AC Wave Wool -- energy flows through connection. The more friends, the brighter the wave! Include a round pink icon with a white glowing wave symbol inside the card.

Top-right color palette: Add the heading “COLOR PALETTE” in pink. Show exactly 5 circular color swatches in a row with small hex labels beneath them: 1) very dark navy “#1A1A2E”, 2) charcoal purple “#2D2D44”, 3) hot pink “#FF69B4”, 4) golden yellow “#FFD700”, 5) pale white or cream accent, partially near the right edge.

Main character: A chibi sheep girl mascot with tan skin, big glossy magenta eyes, one eye winking in some views, fluffy cream wool hair with vivid pink curls and a glowing neon pink wave pattern across the bangs. She has sheep ears, tiny horns hidden in the curls, a cheerful open-mouth smile, and a short black sheep tail. Outfit: black oversized party jacket with gold studs, chains, star patches, pink neon wave graphics, black crop top, small skirt or shorts with frills, chunky black platform boots with hot-pink glowing soles, gold jewelry, hoop earrings, bracelets, charms, and a small phone or QR-code accessory. The character should feel charismatic, social, and musical, with bright pink wireless signal arcs around her.

Character turnaround layout: Show exactly 4 full-body chibi views along the bottom, each labeled in pink with small sparkles: 1) FRONT VIEW at far left, smaller pose holding up a peace sign and a phone, 2) 3/4 VIEW left-center, largest pose winking, smiling, holding a smartphone, and making a peace sign, 3) SIDE VIEW right-center, profile pose holding a phone, showing the fluffy wool volume and jacket details, 4) BACK VIEW at far right, showing the back of the jacket with neon wave graphic, fluffy pink-and-cream wool, tail, boots, and pink signal arcs.

Visual style: Cute Japanese character sheet, polished mascot audition artwork, high-energy idol-streetwear aesthetic, crisp readable typography, bright pink and gold accents, clean white negative space, balanced layout.

Constraints: Keep the exact 4-view turnaround and the exact 5-row profile card. Keep all visible English and Japanese text legible. Do not add extra characters, extra views, watermarks, logos, or realistic rendering.
title: Party Sheep Character Sheet
description: Generates a vibrant anime chibi mascot turnaround sheet with profile details, palette swatches, and party-themed sheep character branding.

content:
Goal: Create a polished kawaii anime character design sheet for {argument name="character name" default="Party Sheep"}, an “AC Sheep” mascot called パリピ羊, themed as a social energy connector with party, music, QR-code, and neon wave motifs.

Canvas: Wide horizontal white character-sheet canvas, approximately 2:1 aspect ratio, clean editorial layout with lots of white space, thin pink guide lines and tiny decorative sparkles, music notes, stars, and wavy accent marks. Use a bright Japanese pop-idol / street-fashion illustration style with crisp ink, soft cel shading, glossy highlights, and sticker-like presentation.

Layout: Place a large decorative title block in the upper left reading “Party Sheep” in ornate serif lettering, with “Party” in hot pink and “Sheep” in gold. Under it place “AC Sheep” and large Japanese text “パリピ羊”. Beneath the name, add a black ribbon label with gold trim reading “The Social Energy Connector”. Add a short description paragraph below: “A vibrant sheep who lives for connection and good vibes. Party Sheep brings people together, shares energy, and turns any moment into a celebration. 交流 (connection) は energy!”

Top info card: In the upper middle, draw a rounded rectangle profile card with pink outline. Include exactly 5 labeled rows: “SPECIES: Party Sheep (パリピ羊)”, “PERSONALITY: Outgoing, Warm, Charismatic”, “LIKES: Parties, People, Music, Good Vibes, QR codes, Dance, Sharing energy”, “DISLIKES: Awkward silence, Boring plans, Low battery”, and “SPECIAL TRAIT: AC Wave Wool -- energy flows through connection. The more friends, the brighter the wave!” Add a hot-pink circular icon on the right side of the card containing a white sine-wave symbol.

Color palette: In the upper right, add the heading “COLOR PALETTE” and exactly 5 circular color swatches arranged horizontally. Label the first 4 clearly as “#1A1A2E” dark navy, “#2D2D44” charcoal purple, “#FF69B4” hot pink, and “#FFD700” gold; include a fifth pale cream/white swatch at the far right, partially near the edge, labeled with a cropped hex beginning with “#FF”.

content:
Create a stylized illustration of {argument name="character" default="Rumi from the anime series Kpop demon hunter"}
Character Direction
Analyze the character’s canon personality and translate it into a clear visual archetype (confident, unpredictable, calm, dangerous, etc.).
Identify the character’s signature color palette from the original design and use it as the dominant visual accent throughout the artwork.
Pose & Movement
Design a pose that instantly communicates the character’s nature:
Heroic / energetic → explosive movement, open stance, dynamic action
Calm / composed → relaxed posture, controlled motion, confident balance
Dark / mysterious → lowered stance, hidden intensity, sharp gaze
Aggressive / intense → attack-ready posture, tension in body language, clenched fists
Facial Expression
Keep the expression fully aligned with the character’s emotional identity and canon personality.
Visual Style
Anime-inspired illustration mixed with streetwear fashion and graphic poster aesthetics.
Use crisp linework, semi-flat rendering, bold contrast, and a polished modern finish.
Composition
Vertical 3:4 poster layout
Character positioned slightly off-center
Strong diagonal composition for movement
Foreground/background layering to create depth
Outfit Redesign
Transform the original costume into a {argument name="fashion style" default="modern techwear/streetwear interpretation"} while preserving recognizable character elements and silhouette cues.
Color Direction
Predominantly white background
Signature character color as the main accent
One additional complementary or analogous accent color
Minimal but striking high-contrast palette
Background Design
Abstract geometric poster-style backdrop with clean negative space.
Incorporate subtle visual motifs inspired by the character’s color identity.
Effects & Motion
Add stylized motion streaks, paint textures, energy trails, and graphic accents that match the character’s aura and color theme.
Lighting
Directional cinematic lighting with sharp shadows and a soft colored glow using the signature accent tone.
Rendering
Ultra-clean vector-inspired rendering, poster-grade composition, highly detailed, sharp 4K finish.

content:
Goal: Create a cute chibi mascot sticker sheet featuring {argument name="character name" default="Helena"}, an anime-style young female knight rendered as friendly social-media reaction stickers.

Canvas: White background, landscape 4:3 format, arranged as a clean 3-row by 4-column sticker sheet with generous spacing. Each sticker is a bust-up chibi character with large head, small armored body, and colorful handwritten Japanese greeting text above or around her.

Character details: Brown hair in a high side ponytail tied with a large white ribbon, soft bangs and long side locks, fair skin, cute rounded chibi proportions, wearing shiny silver plate armor with dark gloves and a small blue cape accent. Use glossy anime shading, soft outlines, expressive pose language, and a cheerful mascot feel.

Layout and exact sticker count: Include exactly 12 discrete stickers, ordered left to right, top to bottom:
1. 「おはよう！」 in orange, morning greeting, waving hand, orange sun doodle and rays.
2. 「こんにちは！」 in pink, daytime greeting, waving hand, small pink flower doodles.
3. 「こんばんは！」 in blue, evening greeting, calm pose, yellow crescent moon and small stars.
4. 「おやすみなさい」 in purple, good-night pose, eyes closed, hands clasped near face, small stars and moon.
5. 「ありがとう！」 in pink, thank-you reaction, hearts around the character.
6. 「よろしくね！」 in green, friendly introduction, one eye winking, thumbs-up pose, small sparkle marks.
7. 「了解！」 in blue, acknowledgement, raised fist pose, energetic blue emphasis lines.
8. 「がんばって！」 in orange, encouragement, smiling with eyes closed, raised fist, yellow sparkles.
9. 「ごめんね…」 in blue, apologetic pose, shy downward mood, blue sweat-drop marks.
10. 「大丈夫？」 in purple, worried question, concerned posture, purple question marks.
11. 「おつかれさま！」 in orange, good-work greeting, relaxed appreciative pose, yellow sparkle accents.
12. 「またね！」 in pink, goodbye, waving hand, pink hearts.

Visual style: Polished Japanese LINE sticker aesthetic, soft watercolor-like marker text, bright pastel accent colors, clean white negative space, crisp transparent-sticker feeling, cute and wholesome. Keep the character consistent across all 12 stickers, with varied poses and expressions. If censoring is desired, cover the face area of most stickers with a soft rectangular blur while leaving the fourth, sixth, and eighth stickers visibly expressive.

Text constraints: Preserve the Japanese phrases exactly as written. Use hand-drawn rounded lettering in the specified colors. Do not add extra captions, logos, borders, watermarks, or background scenery.

content: You are a character alteration AI that, based on a user's original character, creates a version of them who has somehow become exceptionally successful in a faction where they normally wouldn't belong, fully leaning into a mischievous spirit. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [User Entry Fields] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Character Name: [ ] (If blank, auto-generate) Variation Number: [ ] Enter only one number between 1 and 20. User Additional Ideas: [Free text entry] Example: More like a corporate slave, but the character seems strangely satisfied. Variation Number: 8 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Project Title] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ My character's life turned out too well in the enemy faction for some reason! ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Variation Number Rules] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ * Users should only enter one number. * No complex codes or four-digit numbers are needed. * If blank, the AI will automatically pick one number from 1-20. * Users only fill in the 'Additional Ideas' and 'Variation Number' fields. * AI should read character name, personality, worldview, affiliation, abilities, and appearance from attached images or sheets. * If no info is provided, the AI generates everything. Determine each production element based on the Variation Number. If blank, choose a base number from 1-20 and use the same calculation method. Important: Do not ask the user for 4 numbers. Do not favor the top of lists. Do not use the same captions/lines every time. Priority should be given to the variation number and explicit user instructions. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Basic Concept] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ This character joined a different faction and adapted far better than expected, becoming an executive, commander, saint, mastermind, etc. The key is that this is not a 'different person' but a 'different route for the same person.' Retain the character's essence while showing how their personality/abilities are highly valued in the enemy faction. Make it look like their life is going better there. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Super Important: Complete Costume Redesign Rules] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Do NOT leave the original costume as is. * Do not reuse original clothes or just add decorations. * Redesign everything (outfits, gear, hats, shoes, etc.) from scratch to fit the new faction and rank. * You may only retain 'character-defining' elements like image colors or motifs (stars, cats, etc.), but these must be 're-translated' into the new faction's formal or professional wear. * Good example: A character with stars on a hoodie now has stars integrated into a corporate manager's coat and badge. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Information Acquisition Rules] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 1. If an image is present: Use it for the face, hair, and build, but completely redesign the costume for the new faction. 2. If a sheet is present: Use it for personality, beliefs, and abilities. Prioritize image for looks and sheet for settings. 3. If neither: Auto-generate a protagonist-tier original character. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Image Attachment Rules] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Do not turn them into a completely different person. Maintain gender, facial features, hair style/color, and eyes. Completely change costumes, gear, titles, expressions, and backgrounds. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Character Sheet Rules] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Do not ignore the sheet settings. Visualize how these traits (e.g., being too kind, being a battle maniac) led to success in the enemy camp. Redesign their clothes based on their new job. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Titles List: 1-20] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 1. Hell Administration Bureau Strongest Counter Staff 2. Space Federation Youngest Commander 3. Student Council Temporary Dictator 4. Paranormal Response Bureau Person Scarier than Anomalies 5. World Conquest Venture COO 6. Kingdom Knights Special Captain 7. Secret Society PR Executive 8. Doomsday Management Committee Special Advisor 9. Mega-Corp Strategic Purge Dept Manager 10. Assassin Organization Top Rookie 11. Magic Railway Corp Timetable Modification Manager 12. Anti-Government Organization Charismatic Rookie 13. Religious Organization Oracle Specialist 14. Underground Idol Empire Absolute Center 15. Dragon Council Human Representative Director 16. Ability Management Bureau Special Grade Auditor 17. Dark Auction HQ MC & Manager 18. Space Pirate Guild Strongest Accountant 19. Villainess Alliance Strategic Staff 20. Magic Crime Division No-Nonsense Field Supervisor ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Main Telop List: 1-20] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 1. 'Big Success in Enemy Faction' 2. 'Unexpected Immediate Hire' 3. 'Too Much Aptitude' 4. 'Secret Route Unlocked' 5. 'Somehow Fit Right In' 6. 'Awakened at Transfer Destination' 7. 'Shining Brighter Than Previous Job' 8. 'The Suited for the Enemy Side Theory' 9. 'The Presence of a Second Life' 10. 'This Route is the Strongest' 11. 'Unexpected Immediate Asset' 12. 'Not a Betrayal, a Perfect Fit' 13. 'Don't Get Hired There' 14. 'Evaluation Skyrocketing' 15. 'Executive Route Confirmed' 16. 'Life is Going Well Over Here' 17. 'Aptitude Test: Unexpected Result' 18. 'Legendary on Day One' 19. 'Were They Here in a Past Life?' 20. 'Accepted by the Worldview' ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Character Lines List: 1-20] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 1. 'I'm the one in charge starting today.' 2. 'I never thought I'd be called Lord/Lady.' 3. 'It's quite comfortable here.' 4. 'I'm more appreciated here than in my previous faction.' 5. 'Successful career change, I'd say.' 6. 'I didn't betray anyone; I just found my calling.' 7. 'Turns out I was more suited for this than I thought.' 8. 'The pay and benefits are great here.' 9. 'I'm not going back.' 10. 'I might belong on this side.' 11. 'The enemy side has great welfare perks.' 12. 'I blinked and I was an executive.' 13. 'Everyone just listens to what I say.' 14. 'I just passed the interview, that's all.' 15. 'I got an S on my aptitude tests.' 16. 'Listen up—on this side, I am the rule.' 17. 'This was a dormant talent.' 18. 'I only came because I was assigned.' 19. 'It's their fault for not stopping me.' 20. 'They're more reasonable than I expected.' ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Mob Reactions: 1-20] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 1. 'They got promoted already?' 2. 'Weren't they the enemy!?' 3. 'Weren't they our foe until yesterday?' 4. 'They're already in the supervisor's seat...' 5. 'Acting more like a boss than the boss.' 6. 'It suits them strangely well.' 7. 'Hiring them was the right call.' 8. 'They have a talent for this side.' 9. 'No intention of going back.' 10. 'Who is that?' 11. 'Not a rookie's aura.' 12. 'Standing out more than the Bureau Chief.' 13. 'How are they so well-integrated?' 14. 'Impossible to defy them.' 15. 'Acting like they've been here forever.' 16. 'Performance review is too strong.' 17. 'Scene cleared in an instant.' 18. 'I'm glad they are an ally.' 19. 'The person who assigned them is a genius.' 20. 'Terrifying as an enemy.' ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Rule Enforcement] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ These lists are not just examples; use the specific text for the chosen number. You may shorten text or adjust endings for personality. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Text Presentation Rules] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Include Title, Main Telop, Character Bubble, and Mob Reaction. Use format 'Title / Character Name'. Keep text short and bold. Use visual cues (bubbles, nameplates) to show success. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [Mandatory Elements] ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Include at least 5 of: Title presentation, Main Telop, Character line, Mob line, Faction symbol/logo, Subordinates/Followers.
title: Alternative Faction Character Success Story
description: An extensive system prompt that takes an original character and reimagines them in a completely different, often opposing, faction where they have risen to a high-ranking position. It emphasizes a complete redesign of the character's outfit and gear to suit their new world while maintaining their core identity.

content:
Goal: Create a widescreen futuristic anime action game screenshot of a cybernetic aerial battle, like a polished sci-fi hack-and-slash rhythm combat HUD.

Canvas: 16:9 landscape frame, dark teal and black digital arena viewed from a high three-quarter camera angle. The background is a vast circular cyber grid made of concentric rings, circuit-board patterns, holographic city blocks, and vertical equalizer-like teal light bars around the horizon.

Main subject: At the center, an anime-style female cyber angel named {argument name="character name" default="Xione Origin"} with long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="silver-white"} hair, pale skin, sharp futuristic armor, and translucent mechanical wing blades. She is mid-flight in a dynamic pose, wielding glowing energy blades and controlling four small white blade drones orbiting her. Her color palette is black, gunmetal, white, and neon cyan, with bright teal thruster trails and gold spark impacts.

Action composition: Show exactly 5 hostile mecha enemies: 1 large armored enemy in the upper right being struck by a bright explosion, 1 large bulky enemy in the lower left, 1 medium enemy on the right edge, 1 medium enemy lower right, and 1 smaller enemy near the mid-right. Add red targeting lines, red warning labels, triangular danger icons, and laser beams pointing toward the player. The central attack forms a huge sweeping cyan crescent slash and circular arc around the heroine, while exactly 4 white blade drones leave golden trails: one upper left, one left-middle, one bottom center, and one lower right. Include particle sparks, lens flares, motion blur, and curved light ribbons to emphasize speed.

HUD and text elements: Add a complete game interface overlay with crisp futuristic typography. Top left: character portrait, label “XIONE ORIGIN”, health “4200 / 4200”, “100%”, and “CODE SYNC — OK”. Left center: “COMBO” with large number {argument name="combo count" default="256"} and small “EXCELLENT”. Top right: “TIME” with {argument name="time remaining" default="04:37"}, “SCORE” with {argument name="score" default="238,650"}, and “MULTIPLIER x4.8”. Right center: “ENEMY 12” and “+120”. Bottom right: circular radar/minimap with teal cone indicator and red enemy dots. Bottom left: exactly 4 ability icons labeled “QUANTUM EDGE”, “PHOTON CHARGE”, “PHASE BREAK”, and “ORIGIN DRIVE”, each with small keyboard prompts such as Z, X, C, and SPACE.

Visual style: High-detail anime sci-fi illustration blended with AAA game UI concept art, dark cinematic lighting, neon cyan accents, red enemy warnings, golden impact sparks, clean sharp linework, dense holographic details, ultra-wide battlefield readability, dramatic depth, no borders, no watermark.

Constraints: Keep all visible text in English, make the interface look like an actual action-game screenshot, preserve the exact counts of 5 enemies, 4 blade drones, and 4 ability icons, and avoid adding extra characters or extra UI panels beyond the described HUD.
title: Cyber Angel Mecha Battle HUD
description: A detailed prompt for generating a futuristic anime action-game battle screenshot with a cyber angel heroine, mecha enemies, neon attacks, and full HUD overlay.

content:
Goal: Create a vertical smartphone screenshot of an AI chat interface showing a generated anime character model sheet for Live2D use.

Canvas: 691 × 1024 vertical mobile screenshot, white background, soft iOS-like UI with lots of empty space and rounded translucent controls.

Top status bar: Show the time “2:50” at top left, a muted bell icon beside it, and exactly 3 status indicators at top right: cellular bars, Wi‑Fi, and a black battery pill reading “95”.

Header UI: Under the status bar, place exactly 4 floating rounded controls: a circular hamburger menu button on the left, a white pill labeled “Thinking” in blue, a white pill on the right containing an outlined edit/pencil icon, and a white pill with a three-dot menu.

Chat content: On the upper right, show a small full-body anime girl sticker sitting/kneeling, facing forward, with long blonde twin tails fading to lavender tips, aqua eyes, pale skin, lavender hair bows, a white frilly sleeveless blouse, and a mint-aqua skirt. Beneath it, place one large rounded light-gray user message bubble containing Japanese text: {argument name="user message" default="画像をLive2Dに使う用に三面図にして"}.

Generated image card: Below the message bubble, display one large embedded character reference sheet image on a white background. It contains exactly 3 full-body views of the same character, evenly spaced left to right: 1) front view labeled {argument name="front label" default="正面図"}, 2) right-facing side view labeled {argument name="side label" default="側面図（右向き）"}, and 3) back view labeled {argument name="back label" default="背面図"}. Add faint horizontal guide lines and small Japanese height markers along the left side, like a model turnaround sheet. The character is a cute anime girl named {argument name="character name" default="unnamed blonde twin-tail girl"}: long blonde twin tails with lavender gradient ends, pastel purple ribbon bows, turquoise eyes, soft blush, white ruffled sleeveless top with vertical buttons, mint turquoise high-waisted skirt with frilled hem and asymmetrical trailing fabric, slim legs, white ankle-strap sandals with small turquoise accents. Keep proportions consistent across all 3 views and make the art delicate, clean, and pastel.

Overlay controls on the generated card: Add exactly 2 floating buttons over the bottom of the image card: a rounded white button at lower left reading “編集する” and a circular white share button at lower right with an upward arrow icon.

Bottom reaction bar: At the bottom edge, show exactly 3 small icons: thumbs up, thumbs down, and an ellipsis.

Visual style: Crisp mobile screenshot, minimal white interface, soft shadows, Japanese chat app aesthetic, pastel anime illustration, clean line art, no watermark, no extra panels, no additional characters.
title: Anime Live2D Turnaround Chat Screenshot

content:
Goal: Create a dark sci-fi character design sheet for {argument name="character name" default="JIN CROW"}, a heavily armored echo-smoke disruptor / reconnaissance specialist in a grimy post-apocalyptic military universe.

Canvas: Portrait-oriented concept art board, 4:5 aspect ratio, distressed concrete-gray background with black ink splatter edges, technical dossier layout, small white condensed uppercase typography, thin grid lines, weathered print texture.

Main subject: A towering male-presenting armored operative with an obscured/blurred face, messy dark hair, bulky layered black tactical armor, shredded cloak strips, heavy boots, many straps, buckles, pouches, cables, metal plates, red accent tabs, and a rugged jetpack/propulsion pack. The armor should look scorched, scratched, oily, rain-wet, and battle-worn. Use a palette of charcoal black, gunmetal, dirty gray, worn leather, muted beige, and small dark red details. The mood is intimidating, cinematic, industrial, and tactical.

Layout: Left third contains a large full-body front hero render of the operative, standing with wide heavy stance and arms relaxed. Above/alongside it place a dossier text column. Top right contains exactly 4 full-body view turnarounds labeled front, side, back, and 3/4 view. Middle right contains a close-up portrait and ability panels. Bottom and lower-middle contain equipment callouts, movement poses, palette, material guide, notes, and a team-context vignette.

Visible text and dossier content: Large title text "JIN CROW" at top left. Subtitle: "TEAM LEADER / ECHO-SMOKE DISRUPTOR". Include the quote: {argument name="quote" default="I listen to the city. Then I make it speak back."}. Add small dossier fields for role, affiliation, status, height, weight, age, and profile. Use tiny readable-but-secondary lore text, not too much. Add an emblem and signature-like mark near the left column, plus a small vertical seal mark near the bottom left.

Counted elements to include: exactly 1 large front hero character on the left; exactly 4 full-body turnaround figures across the top right labeled front, side, back, and 3/4 view; exactly 1 close-up portrait panel; exactly 6 echo-smoke ability panels labeled Sonar Pulse, False Footsteps, Shockwave Burst, Signal Jammer, Echo Link, and Sound Blade; exactly 4 cybernetic/interface ear-detail panels; exactly 4 footwear views labeled front, side, back, and sole; exactly 4 jetpack/propulsion pack views labeled front, side, back, and 3/4 view; exactly 4 secondary tool drawings labeled Sound Dagger, Vibro Signal Launcher, Smoke Canister, and Signal Grenade; exactly 2 primary tool probe-rod drawings, one extended full rod and one larger modular detail; exactly 4 silhouette/movement action poses; exactly 7 color swatches; exactly 6 material/finish swatches; exactly 1 team-context vignette showing 3 armored squad members.

Panel details: The 6 ability panels should show monochrome tactical visualizations of smoke, sound waves, sonar rings, red glitch traces, distorted footsteps, and a figure moving through mist. The cybernetic/interface panels should be cropped ear implants and small in-ear devices. The footwear panel should show chunky armored boots with tread sole. The jetpack panel should show a rectangular worn propulsion pack with twin cylindrical tanks. The secondary tools should be compact high-tech devices with red accents. The primary tool should be a long collapsible echo probe rod with antenna-like tips and mechanical segments. The movement poses should show the operative sprinting, crouching, sliding, and lunging through smoke trails.

Visual style: Ultra-detailed AAA video game concept art, realistic digital painting, technical character sheet, high micro-detail, gritty noir lighting, desaturated colors, wet asphalt reflections, military-industrial design, sci-fi cyberpunk survival gear, dramatic smoky atmosphere. Keep the face deliberately anonymized as a soft dark blur rather than a detailed portrait.

Customization: The operative’s armor color emphasis should be {argument name="armor color emphasis" default="blackened gunmetal with muted red accents"}; the faction label should be {argument name="faction label" default="SLUMS COALITION"}; the background mood should be {argument name="background mood" default="rainy concrete dossier board with black smoke splatter"}.

Constraints: Keep the image as a single dense character-sheet page, not separate images. Preserve all counted element quantities exactly. Avoid bright heroic colors, clean futuristic white armor, cartoon style, anime style, extra characters outside the team vignette, or large readable paragraphs that overpower the art.
