content:
Goal: Create a gritty sci-fi character design sheet for {argument name="character name" default="NOA VALE"}, a team leader and crystal-smoke architect in a post-apocalyptic tactical faction. The sheet should look like a high-end concept art board for a film or game trailer, with dense technical callouts, worn paper texture, and dark industrial fantasy styling.

Canvas: Vertical 4:3 character sheet, weathered gray parchment background with black smoke, ink splatter edges, thin white grid lines, and small technical typography. Overall palette is charcoal black, gunmetal, tarnished bronze, bone gray, smoky white, and cold blue light accents.

Main character: A tall athletic female warrior, age 23, with short messy black hair shaved on one side, cyberpunk undercut silhouette, face deliberately obscured by a soft rectangular blur/censor block. She wears an asymmetrical black leather and metal tactical outfit: cropped armored top, exposed midriff with straps and buckles, fitted pants, high-heeled armored combat boots, layered belts, chain details, fingerless gloves, segmented arm armor, spiked shoulder pieces, and a long shredded black coat or cloak made of dangling strips. A heavy mechanical jetpack / crystal-smoke apparatus is mounted on her back, with small blue exhaust glow. Pose is confident, standing slightly turned with one hand relaxed and the other near her weapon.

Left information column: Large title text “{argument name="character name" default="NOA VALE"}”. Subtitle: “TEAM LEADER // CRYSTAL-SMOKE ARCHITECT”. Quote: “{argument name="quote" default="I don’t break the city. I give it shape."}”. Include labeled data blocks: Role: “CRYSTAL-SMOKE ARCHITECT / OFFENSIVE TACTICIAN”; Affiliation: “NO FACTION — SLUMS COALITION”; Status: “ACTIVE”; Height: “5’6” / 168 cm”; Weight: “121 lb / 55 kg”; Age: “23”; a compact biography paragraph; a sharp abstract faction emblem; a handwritten signature; and two vertical red stamp-like marks.

Layout and counted elements: Include exactly 5 full-body views across the upper half: 1 large hero full-body view on the left, plus 4 smaller orthographic views across the top labeled Front, Side, Back, and 3/4 View. Include exactly 1 close-up portrait panel beneath the orthographic row, again with the face obscured by a rectangular blur. Include exactly 4 crystal-smoke ability panels in a 2x2 grid labeled Barrier Wall, Lattice Cage, Elevated Path, and Deflector Array, each showing a tiny black silhouette interacting with luminous white crystalline wireframe structures and smoky particles.

Lower technical panels: Include exactly 4 footwear views labeled Front, Side, Back, and Sole, showing the same armored high-heeled boot. Include exactly 1 long weapon panel labeled “WEAPON: CRYSTAL-WRITE KIT”, showing a modular staff/rifle-like implement with two modes. Include exactly 6 weapon breakdown components labeled Frame Rail, Energy Conduit, Crystal Cartridge, Stabilizer Fin, Grip Module, and Safety Latch. Include exactly 7 accessories and gear items labeled Crystal Chamber, Smoke Filter, Utility Pouch, Data Slate, Line Spool, Folding Hook, and Scrap Key. Include exactly 5 jetpack / propulsion system detail panels labeled Jetpack Overview, Thruster Detail, Harness & Attachment, Fuel Cell, and Vector Nozzles.

Outfit and material detail strip: Add close-up panels of layered leather straps, buckles, metal plating, cybernetic ear implant, neck/shoulder armor, wrist projector, and mechanical gauntlet. Make the materials visibly worn, scratched, riveted, oily, and handmade rather than clean futuristic.

Bottom reference strip: Include a notes box with short bullet-like production notes; a color palette containing exactly 8 vertical swatches from black to graphite, brown leather, gray metal, parchment beige, smoky white, and pale blue; a material / finish guide containing exactly 6 rectangular samples labeled Worn Leather, Oiled Canvas, Carbon Fiber, Scratched Metal, Crystal Glass, and Mesh Fabric; and a team context panel on the bottom right showing exactly 3 small figures walking together through a ruined vertical cityscape.

Visual style: Ultra-detailed dark cinematic concept art, realistic anatomy, tactical cyberpunk, post-apocalyptic fashion design, precise industrial callouts, Japanese game artbook layout energy, monochrome smoky atmosphere with icy blue glow accents. Text should be small but arranged like a professional production design sheet. No clean white background, no cute style, no bright saturated colors, no extra characters beyond the counted team context silhouettes.

content:
Goal: Create a dense dark sci-fi character concept sheet for {argument name="character name" default="KAI REN"}, a post-apocalyptic smoke-trace swordsman and tactical team leader, with a gritty AAA game art-book presentation.

Canvas: Portrait-oriented character design board on a weathered gray concrete-paper background, roughly 4:5 aspect ratio. Use charcoal black, gunmetal, ash gray, oxidized brown, and muted steel tones. Add rain, dust, scratches, ink splatter, technical grid lines, thin white divider lines, and small dossier typography.

Main layout: Place one dominant full-body hero illustration on the left, occupying about 45% of the canvas height and most of the left column. The character stands facing forward in a relaxed but dangerous stance, wearing layered black tactical rags, armored leather plates, strapped belts, heavy boots, gloves, scarf, hood-like collar, dangling shredded coat panels, and a bulky cylindrical jetpack or propulsion backpack. Hair is messy black and spiked. The face should be obscured or shadowed. Include a long smoke-trace blade or sheathed weapon integrated into the gear. Behind the hero figure, add a large black circular brushstroke halo.

Left dossier text: At the top left write the name {argument name="character name" default="KAI REN"}. Under it add the role line “TEAM LEADER / SMOKE-TRACE SWORDSMAN”. Include two quotes: {argument name="quote one" default="I read the smoke."} and {argument name="quote two" default="I cut the path."}. Add small dossier fields: Role: Team Leader / Tactician / Pathfinder; Affiliation: No Faction - Slums Coalition; Status: Active; Height: 6'0" / 183 cm; Weight: 72 kg / 159 lbs; Age: 24; Profile: a short paragraph describing him as born in the lower tiers of Yor City, surviving by reading the city’s smoke currents, a fighter and pathfinder who leads with ruthless instinct and unstable loyalty. Add a simple angular faction emblem and signature-like marks below.

Top row body views: Across the upper center and right, include exactly 4 smaller full-body views labeled “FRONT”, “SIDE”, “BACK”, and “3/4 VIEW”. Show the same outfit from each angle, emphasizing the layered armor, ragged coat strips, backpack tanks, straps, boots, and silhouette.

Middle panels: Create a rectangular “CLOSE-UP PORTRAIT” panel showing the head and upper torso with messy black hair, scarf, armor straps, ear device, and shadowed/obscured face. Next to it create a “SMOKE-TRACE ABILITIES” section with exactly 6 illustrated ability cards in a 2-column by 3-row grid. Label the six cards: “SMOKE SENSE”, “PATH REVEAL”, “AIR SLICE”, “TRACE CUT”, “SMOKE STEP”, and “SMOKE LINE”. Each card should show a small cinematic action scene of the character moving through a dark rainy city or battlefield while luminous white smoke trails, arcs, map-like paths, or slicing lines swirl around him.

Equipment and detail panels: Add exactly 6 outfit and material close-up strips labeled “MAIN FABRIC”, “SCARF ARMOR”, “HARNESS STRAPS”, “JETPACK BACKPLATE”, “UTILITY POUCHES”, and “EDGE STITCHING”. Add a “CYBERNETIC & INTERFACE” panel with exactly 4 close-ups labeled “NECK IMPLANT”, “TEMPORAL NODE”, “HUD PROJECTOR”, and “ARMS IMPLANT”. Add a “FOOTWEAR” panel with exactly 4 boot views labeled “FRONT”, “SIDE”, “BACK”, and “SOLE”. Add a “JETPACK / PROPULSION PACK” panel showing front and rear technical views with callout labels for compact thrusters, fuel cell, vector nozzles, stabilizer fins, and harness system. Add a “WEAPON: SMOKE-TRACE BLADE” panel showing a modular long blade and exactly 5 separated components labeled “MONO BLADE CUSTOM”, “POWER COIL”, “SCABBARD”, “SMOKE LINE”, and “CORE MODULE”. Add an “ACCESSORIES & GEAR” row with exactly 7 objects labeled “SMOKE BEACON”, “CLIMBING HOOK”, “PULSE DARTS”, “RECON DRONE”, “DATA CHIP”, “SURVIVAL KIT”, and “WATER FILTER”. Add a “SILHOUETTE & MOVEMENT WITH JETPACK” panel containing exactly 4 dynamic flying or leaping silhouettes with smoky trails.

Bottom strip: Include a small “NOTES” box with several concise bullet notes about growing up in the Ash Rungs, survival by reading the wind, weapons hidden in the blade and paracord, valuing freedom and loyalty, and leading with intellect before violence. Include a “COLOR PALETTE” with exactly 8 vertical swatches: near-black, charcoal, dark slate, worn brown, rust leather, pale ash gray, cold gray-blue, and deep navy-black. Include a “MATERIAL / FINISH GUIDE” with exactly 7 texture swatches labeled “BURNT LEATHER”, “OILED CANVAS”, “CARBON TEXTURE”, “METAL WEAR”, “REACTIVE CLOTH”, “REINFORCED COMPOSITE”, and “SMOKE WEAVE”. At bottom right add a “TEAM CONTEXT: THE SMOKE-WALKERS” panel with exactly 3 small standing character figures together.

Visual style: Highly detailed cinematic concept art, dark cyberpunk wasteland fashion, gritty realistic rendering, technical production design sheet, dense but organized annotations, thin white labels, rain-speckled texture, high contrast metal highlights, realistic fabric fraying, heavy boots, straps, buckles, rivets, scratches, and smoky supernatural energy. Keep all text in English, small and diagrammatic, with no logos or watermarks.

content:
Create a clean 4x4 emotional performance grid using the provided character as the fixed identity reference.

Header text:
“{argument name="grid title" default="MY CUTE ↔ CRAZY SCALE"}”

Preserve strict facial identity consistency across all 16 panels.

Follow the exact emotional progression from top-left to bottom-right.
Do not randomize expressions or intensity.

GRID ORDER:

Row 1:
1. soft innocent cute
2. shy cute
3. playful cute
4. teasing cute

Row 2:
5. energetic cute
6. chaotic playful
7. emotionally intense
8. unstable smile

Row 3:
9. overly excited
10. wild eyes
11. manic happiness
12. emotionally unhinged

Row 4:
13. chaotic stare
14. dangerous excitement
15. beautiful insanity
16. fully crazy

4x4 grid, {argument name="style" default="cinematic portrait photography"} style, neutral background, tight close-up framing, shallow depth of field, no watermark.

content:
Goal: Create a clean monochrome-and-red Japanese character reference sheet poster for a cute black cat mascot named {argument name="character name" default="Chronowa"}, a night-music themed black cat wearing white sunglasses and red headphones.

Canvas: Vertical A4-style poster, white/off-white background, thin black border, subtle red corner marks, small halftone dots, diagonal tech lines, tiny skyline silhouettes, waveform accents, barcode at bottom left, and a black footer strip reading in English “LISTEN TO THE NIGHT.” Use a crisp vector/ink illustration style with limited palette: black, white, gray, and accent red.

Main layout: Place a large central full-body front-view black cat as the hero subject, sitting upright with a curled tail, oversized pointed ears, long whiskers, white angular sunglasses with black lenses and reflective highlights, and red-and-black headphones resting around the neck. Add a bold top title in Japanese plus English using {argument name="main title text" default="クロノワ / CHRONOWA"}, with a smaller tagline beneath using {argument name="tagline text" default="夜の音を聴く黒猫"}. Add a red crescent moon and black city skyline silhouette in the upper right.

Left character views: Include exactly 3 smaller cat pose panels stacked vertically on the left, each with a black label tab and red accent: 1) side view, cat sitting in profile wearing white sunglasses with headphones around neck; 2) listening pose, cat wearing red headphones over ears, paws touching headphones, small music note nearby; 3) relax pose, cat lying down with headphones around neck.

Right item box: Include exactly 2 item illustrations inside a bordered box: 1) white sunglasses; 2) red headphones. Label them in Japanese using the same graphic style.

Right mood icon box: Include exactly 6 small chibi mood icons in a 2-column by 3-row grid, all black cat icons with white sunglasses: 1) good mood with music note; 2) cool but moody; 3) shy/embarrassed; 4) alert with motion marks; 5) kind with small red heart; 6) slightly angry with red anger symbol.

Bottom information cards: Create exactly 8 bordered info cards across the lower third, numbered 01 through 08 with black slanted header tabs and red number accents. The 8 cards are: 01 profile; 02 personality; 03 features; 04 favorite things; 05 dislikes; 06 abilities; 07 setting; 08 quotes. Use compact Japanese text inside the cards, with small decorative icons such as a waveform, paw print, sun warning symbol, small cat silhouette, and red paw mark. For the quote card, include three short Japanese quote lines using {argument name="quote text" default="『今夜の音、悪くないね』 / 『星は苦手。世界が明るすぎる』 / 『いい夜だね。少しだけ、歩こうか』"}.

Text style: Use strong Japanese display typography, black labels with red side bars, small red waveform graphics, and clean technical annotation lines. Keep the poster readable but allow tiny Japanese text to feel like a designed reference sheet.

Constraints: Use exactly one central hero cat, exactly 3 left pose panels, exactly 2 item illustrations, exactly 6 mood icons, and exactly 8 bottom info cards. No humans, no extra characters, no full-color background, no photorealism, no watermark.

content: Create a single-page cinematic character design board for an original fictional character named “{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"[CHARACTER NAME]\"}”. Style: premium film pre-production pitch board, photorealistic cinematic concept art, professional visual development presentation, high-end art department aesthetics. Composition: Avoid generic grids, symmetrical layouts, or rigid template-like formatting. The page should feel like a professional director’s pitch board rather than a standard character sheet. Use an asymmetric, cinematic, story-driven composition with varied panel sizes, organic spacing, selective overlap, layered grouping, and a curated editorial rhythm. Let the overall board feel designed, intentional, and visually dynamic — like a real film proposal page created by a director, production designer, or concept artist. Character: {argument name=\"character description\" default=\"[Insert character identity, world, age, role, personality, outfit, materials, mood, and setting.]\"} Include: - one dominant hero portrait as the emotional focal point - supporting full-body turnaround views - expressive head angle studies - wardrobe or costume breakdown - material and texture detail callouts - character overview text - short production notes - color palette swatches - mood references or environmental fragments Design language: Use readable English headings, concise labels, thin divider lines, occasional callout arrows or handwritten notes, and a refined cinematic presentation style. Do not force every section into equal rectangles. Keep the layout fluid, premium, and visually curated. Quality: Highly detailed, photorealistic, cinematic lighting, consistent character identity across all panels, realistic costume materials, believable text structure, no logos, no watermark, no celebrity likeness.

content: Create a vertical dark Eastern fantasy cinematic movie poster for {argument name="character name" default="Zhao Ling'er"} from Chinese paladin mythology, titled around the “Demon Locking Tower fateful night.” The central figure is a solemn young Chinese goddess-like woman standing waist-deep in black reflective water inside a ruined vertical abyss tower. Her face should be softly obscured or left featureless, but her posture is calm, fatalistic, and divine. She wears a faded jade-cyan translucent Hanfu-style ceremonial dress with wet gauze layers, flowing ribbons, beaded chains, silver ornaments, a circular pendant at the waist, wrist jewelry, and twin-bun black hair with long blue-green veils. One hand reaches down to touch the water, creating a glowing circular ripple spell. Surround her with ancient stone walls, huge hanging iron chains, broken wooden platforms, drifting talisman papers, circular Taoist seals, faint golden Chinese inscriptions, and a cold moonbeam falling from a broken opening high above. Add a shadowy demon face with red eyes half-hidden in the right background. The water surface should contain glowing arcane diagrams, sigils, dragon-scale textures, and submerged calligraphy. Use low-saturation cold gray-blue and faded jade tones, damp moonlight, mist, rain-wet stone, heavy shadows, and subtle gold accents. Make it look like a 3A game CG film poster, ultra-detailed, realistic, atmospheric, oppressive, quiet, sacred, ominous, with a sense of destiny and death premonition. Include exactly three main text blocks: large vertical Chinese title on the left reading {argument name="main title" default="赵灵儿"} with small English romanization “ZHAO LINGER” beneath it; a smaller vertical subtitle near the left reading {argument name="subtitle" default="锁妖塔 女娲后裔·宿命之夜"}; and a vertical poetic quote on the right reading {argument name="right quote" default="若宿命终将吞没一切，愿仍有人记得，她曾在月光下安静站立。"}. Avoid modern fashion photography, influencer xianxia styling, anime illustration, bright colors, clean studio lighting, cute expressions, or plastic-looking costumes.

content:
Goal: Create a two-page fantasy art book spread presenting a cherry-blossom themed katana and its personified anime swordswoman, in an ornate Japanese dark-fantasy game encyclopedia style.

Canvas: Wide landscape 2:1 spread, like two adjacent parchment pages with thin black margins and gold filigree corner ornaments. Left page is bright ivory parchment with pale pink cherry blossom texture; right page is dark navy-black with gold borders, moonlit purple lighting, and sakura petals.

Left page layout: Design a weapon specification sheet for {argument name="weapon name" default="桜霞・宵燕"}. At the top left place a small circular flower crest icon, then a large Japanese title with reading guide text and a short poetic subtitle beneath it. Below the intro paragraph, include a compact spec table with exactly 5 rows: type, length, blade length, weight, and materials. Add two smaller information rows for owner and special traits. The main object is a long ornate katana displayed diagonally from lower center to upper right, with a glowing icy-blue blade, dark blue wrapped handle, gold fittings, and floral engraving. Beside it show the matching scabbard, black lacquer with gold and pink sakura decoration, blue cord wrap, and antique bronze metal end fittings. Add exactly 5 weapon-detail callouts on the left-middle/lower area: 1 round tsuba guard medallion, 1 close-up of the luminous blade texture, 1 close-up of the blue diamond handle wrap, 1 close-up of the tied blue cord and scabbard fittings, and 1 bottom tradition/lore text block with a faint silhouette of pagodas and a flowering tree.

Right page layout: Create the personification page titled in Japanese as {argument name="personification title" default="擬人化：桜霞の剣巫・ヨイ"}. The central character is a full-body beautiful anime swordswoman standing in a moonlit temple garden, holding the same glowing katana downward. She has very long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="black-purple"} hair with violet highlights, straight bangs, flower hair ornaments, ribbons, and drifting pink petals around her. Her face should be softly obscured or blurred while the rest of the illustration remains sharp. She wears an elaborate dark navy, black, and violet kimono-inspired battle outfit with gold embroidery, sakura motifs, layered sleeves, thigh-high black stockings, high heels, ornate waist armor and obi, and fluttering translucent fabric panels. The background contains a full moon, silhouetted Japanese roofs, stone lanterns, mist, and purple-blue night lighting.

Right page text and panels: Place a short descriptive paragraph under the title at upper left. Add a gold-framed personality/settings box near the lower left with exactly 5 bullet lines. Add a separate ability box beneath it describing a cherry-blossom slash ability. Along the far right column, include exactly 5 stacked inset cards with labels and images: 1 hair ornament close-up, 1 eye close-up, 1 clothing/obi close-up, 1 blade close-up, and 1 scabbard close-up. Each card should have a gold border, a small Japanese label, a cropped detail image, and two short lines of Japanese explanatory text.

content:

At the bottom, add a section titled 「カラー設定」 with exactly 5 color swatches: hair light brown #8B6F5E, eyes brown #5A3E2B, suit gray #646A70, shirt white #FFFFFF, tie/shoes/belt black #111111.

Center character views: Show exactly 3 full-body views of the same man wearing a fitted gray business suit: left side view labeled 「側面図」, center front view labeled 「正面図」, and right back view labeled 「背面図」. The man is tall and slim, with light-brown center-parted hair, a white dress shirt, black slim tie with a tie pin, gray notch-lapel jacket, matching slim straight trousers with center crease, black belt, black dress shoes, and a simple analog wristwatch. In the side view, show one hand in pocket and a relaxed upright posture. In the front view, show one hand in pocket and the other relaxed at his side. In the back view, show the suit jacket seams and clean tapered silhouette.

Center annotation callouts: Add thin leader lines and Japanese labels pointing to the outfit and traits. Include callouts for hairstyle, expression, suit, necktie, pants, and shoes. The hairstyle note should describe a center part with naturally flowing hair; the expression note should describe a calm and slightly smiling trustworthy impression; the suit note should describe a crisp fitted silhouette; the necktie note should describe a black solid tie with tie pin; the pants note should describe slim straight slacks with a center crease; the shoes note should describe black straight-tip dress shoes.

Right detail column: Title the column 「ディテール」. Include exactly 4 rectangular detail panels stacked vertically: 1) close-up head and hair with blurred face, 2) close-up chest showing lapels, shirt, tie, tie pin, and pocket square, 3) close-up sleeve cuff and simple analog watch, 4) close-up fabric texture swatch. Add Japanese bullet notes beside these panels: bangs are center-parted and flow naturally, hair has neat straight texture, eyes are calm and composed, jacket has notch lapels and a pocket square, sleeves show four real buttons, watch is a simple analog type, fabric is a high-quality wool-blend suit material suitable for spring, autumn, and winter.

Bottom-right notes: Add a small bordered box titled 「備考」 with exactly 3 bullet points emphasizing cleanliness and trustworthiness, a basic refined business-suit style, and a simple but polished design.

Visual style: Semi-realistic anime illustration, clean line art, soft cel shading, realistic suit folds, elegant muted palette, magazine-like Japanese character sheet design, crisp legible typography, no decorative background, no watermark.

Behind and above her right shoulder, create the Stand: a large translucent white dragon-deer / fox-dragon guardian spirit with an elongated delicate snout, flowing feather-like mane, branching antler or horn shapes, veil-like fins, silk ribbons, dangling gold chains and tassels, and many small white flowers blooming along its head and body. The spirit curves around the woman as if guarding her, occupying the upper-right half of the poster.

Environment and lighting: a shaded waterside garden with drooping willow branches, dark green foliage, reflective water, floating mist, translucent gauze ribbons, tiny glowing petals or fireflies, and warm morning backlight filtering through haze. Use a palette of ivory, pearl white, champagne beige, pale blush, muted moss green, smoky gray, and soft gold. Overall atmosphere: serene, romantic, spectral, elegant, dreamlike, with a faint sense of grief and distance.

Design the poster as an information-rich Stand profile sheet with refined white serif typography and thin decorative rules. Main subject: A young woman sits on a stone embankment in the lower center, elegant and calm, face intentionally obscured by a plain soft brown rectangular censor block. She has dark brown hair in a loose low bun with wispy strands. Outfit includes exactly 3 visible pieces: a white spaghetti-strap ruched mini dress with tiny pale floral print, an oversized off-white knitted cardigan slipped off the shoulders, and delicate thin shoulder straps. Pose is relaxed and graceful, one hand resting on the stone edge, legs angled forward, soft sunlight outlining her shoulders and hair.

Guardian spirit: Behind and to the upper right of the woman, create one large translucent white dragon/deer-like floral spirit, long and serpentine with an elegant skull-like face, closed or lowered eyes, tall branch-like horns, feathered or veil-like fins, and flowing gauze ribbons. It should look protective, silent, and otherworldly rather than aggressive. Decorate it with exactly 5 main ornament types: white blossoms, pearl chains, dangling tassels, sheer silk veils, and fine silver branches. The spirit curves around the woman like mist, framing her without covering the text.

Layout and typography: Design the poster as an information-dense character sheet with refined Chinese/Japanese editorial typography, thin white divider lines, small vertical annotation boxes, and elegant serif lettering. Use off-white text with subtle glow and high legibility. Include exactly 5 text zones: 1) top-left title block, 2) mid-left description block, 3) lower-left special ability block, 4) bottom-left design keywords and color palette, 5) right-side vertical lore panel plus bottom-right quote/profile card.

Text content: Top-left title block shows “替身設定” with small English “STAND NAME,” then the large title {argument name="stand name" default="彼岸花・霧"}, and the subtitle “Higanbana · Wu.” Mid-left description reads in Chinese poetic lines about her guardian spirit being like mist and silk, circling her silently, elegant and watchful. Lower-left section title is “特殊能力,” ability name {argument name="ability name" default="花影迷離"}, romanization “Hua Ying Mi Li,” followed by short Chinese ability notes describing petals, gentle illusions, blurred distance, and disappearing footprints. Bottom-left section title is “設計關聯,” followed by exactly 5 bullet points: floral elements, soft palette, mist connection, emotional symbolism, and guardian/dream motifs. Beneath it place exactly 7 circular color swatches: white, ivory, pale cream, muted blush, cool gray, sage gray-green, and deep taupe. Right side has a narrow vertical Chinese text panel describing the spirit’s form and temperament. Bottom-right includes the quote {argument name="quote" default="你看到的美好，也許只是我編織的夢。"} and a profile card titled “少女檔案” listing exactly 5 traits: personality, image, aura, temperament, and preference.

Visual style: Soft romantic dark-fantasy fashion editorial, ornate but restrained, like a luxury game character concept poster. Use luminous fog, translucent fabric, bokeh, film grain, fine paper texture, and subtle vignetting. The overall feeling should be tender, melancholic, mysterious, and protective.

Constraints: Keep the woman’s face covered by a simple rectangle; do not show a recognizable face. Do not add extra characters. Maintain exactly one guardian spirit, exactly 7 color swatches, exactly 5 bullet points in the design section, exactly 5 profile traits, and exactly 5 text zones. Avoid logos, watermarks, modern UI icons, or cluttered unreadable text.
title: Misty Floral Stand Spirit Poster
description: Creates a vertical fantasy character-setting poster featuring a graceful woman and a translucent floral guardian spirit with Chinese profile text.

content:
Goal: Create a clean character pose sheet of a cute chibi sparrow mascot, showing exactly 4 discrete poses on a plain white background.

Canvas: Square 1:1 canvas, high resolution, no border, no text, no shadows or scenery. Arrange the bird poses in a balanced 2-by-2 grid with generous white space between them.

Subject details: The character is a round, front-facing chibi {argument name="bird species" default="sparrow"} with an oversized head and tiny body. It has a warm chestnut-brown head, glossy black bead eyes with small white highlights, a short dark charcoal beak, cream-colored cheeks and fluffy cream belly, dark cheek patches, tiny brown feet with little claws, and layered orange-brown wings with darker feather tips. Use a cute sticker-like anime illustration style with clean dark outlines, soft cel shading, painterly feather details, and a polished mascot design.

Pose count and layout: Include exactly 4 separate full-body bird drawings: 1) top left, wings raised high vertically in an excited upward flap; 2) top right, wings spread straight outward horizontally; 3) bottom left, wings hanging downward along the sides in a resting/downstroke pose; 4) bottom right, wings spread outward again in a symmetrical mid-flap pose. All 4 birds should face forward and keep the same facial expression and proportions.

Visual style: Adorable Japanese game mascot / sticker art, crisp linework, warm natural browns and creams, detailed layered feathers, soft highlights, clean white background, centered composition.

Constraints: Show exactly four poses, no extra birds, no labels, no accessories, no environment, no watermark, no cropped wings or feet.
title: Chibi Sparrow Four-Pose Sheet

content:
Goal: Create a detailed military-industrial specification sheet for a fictional autonomous scorpion-shaped combat robot named {argument name="platform name" default="Дигваранз-1.6"}, with the subtitle “Autonomous Combat Platform.”

Canvas: Landscape 4:3 technical presentation board on a warm light beige background, thin gray panel borders, clean infographic layout, realistic hard-surface concept art mixed with labeled engineering diagram. Use tan, dark bronze, black, gunmetal, and muted military colors. The overall look should feel like a defense robotics brochure or field manual page.

Main subject: Center a large scorpion-inspired autonomous combat platform in three-quarter view, facing left. It has a low armored body, segmented tan modular armor panels with rivets and dark mechanical joints, six numbered legs, hybrid wheel-and-leg mobility, and a high curved scorpion tail ending in a stabilized turret weapon. The weapon is a compact 30 mm autocannon with a red sensor or muzzle detail. The robot should look rugged, heavy, realistic, and operational, with subtle floor shadows. Add circular callout markers for exactly 6 leg positions: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, and 6. Include a ground-clearance measurement arrow beneath the center body reading “GROUND CLEARANCE 0.50 m (19.7 in).”

Top-left title block: Add a small black scorpion icon, then the large Cyrillic title “{argument name="platform name" default="Дигваранз-1.6"}” and the English subtitle “Autonomous Combat Platform.” Under it, show exactly 6 feature bullets: “Scorpion-Inspired Mobility,” “Hybrid Wheel-Leg System,” “Stabilized Weapon System,” “Modular Armor,” “All-Terrain Operations,” and “Autonomous Targeting & Navigation.”

Left specifications panel: A bordered box titled “SPECIFICATIONS” with exactly 9 rows: “HEIGHT (TO TOP OF TURRET) 1.0 m (3.28 ft),” “LENGTH 2.0 m (6.56 ft),” “WIDTH 1.6 m (5.25 ft),” “WEIGHT ~350 kg (771 lb),” “GROUND CLEARANCE 0.50 m (19.7 in),” “MAX SPEED 20 km/h (12.4 mph),” “ENDURANCE 6–8 hours,” “PRIMARY ARMAMENT 30mm Autocannon / Energy Weapon (Optional),” and “POWER SOURCE Hybrid (Battery + Generator).”

Top-right comparison panel: A bordered inset titled “DIMENSIONS & COMPARISON.” Show exactly 2 figures inside: the scorpion combat robot beside a standing armored soldier holding a rifle. Add height guides labeled “1.0 m (3.28 ft)” for the robot and “Average Human Height 1.75 m (5.74 ft)” for the soldier.

Right-middle leg configuration panel: A small bordered box titled “LEG CONFIGURATION” with exactly 2 numbered lines: “1, 3, 4, 6 – Wheel Legs” and “2, 5 – Articulated Legs (Middle Legs).”

Bottom row: Add exactly 5 bordered feature cards spanning the width. Each card contains a small realistic render and a caption. Card 1 title “HYBRID MOBILITY,” image of the robot driving across rough ground, caption “Wheel legs for speed and efficiency on flat terrain.” Card 2 title “ARTICULATED MIDDLE LEGS,” image focused on the middle walking legs, caption “Enhanced stability and obstacle climbing capability.” Card 3 title “STABILIZED WEAPON SYSTEM,” image close-up of the tail turret, caption “Low-profile turret with stabilized autocannon for high accuracy.” Card 4 title “ADVANCED SENSORS,” image close-up of the front sensor array with cameras, caption “360° awareness with multi-spectral cameras, LIDAR, and threat detection.” Card 5 title “MODULAR ARMOR,” image close-up of armor plates, caption “Modular armor panels for mission adaptability and protection.”

Style constraints: Use crisp sans-serif typography, black and dark gray text, precise labels, thin leader lines, and realistic lighting. Keep all text legible and aligned. Do not add extra logos, watermarks, explosions, battlefield smoke, or human gore. Maintain a clean concept-sheet presentation for {argument name="robot role" default="autonomous combat platform"}.
title: Scorpion Combat Robot Spec Sheet
description: A detailed defense-style concept sheet for a fictional scorpion-inspired autonomous combat robot with specifications, comparison panels, and feature cards.

content:
Goal: Create a polished anime VTuber / Live2D character reference sheet for {argument name="character name" default="めあ / Mea"}, an elegant personal AI secretary girl in a white, navy, and pale-blue rose motif.

Canvas: Vertical A4-style character design board, 2:3 aspect ratio, white background with delicate pale-blue ornamental borders, thin blue divider lines, small floral corner decorations, and a clean premium visual-novel artbook layout. Use soft watercolor-like shading, crisp anime line art, luminous blue eyes, very detailed lace, ribbons, embroidery, and accessories.

Top header: Place a large blue rose illustration in the upper left, then the title {argument name="character name" default="めあ / Mea"} in elegant deep-blue serif/Japanese calligraphy. Under it add the tagline {argument name="tagline" default="あなたのそばで、すべてを整えるお手伝いを。"}. Keep the palette cool, refined, and luxurious.

Main left section: Add a large boxed “three-view” area titled 「三面図」. Show exactly 3 full-body standing character views side by side, labeled 「正面」, 「側面」, and 「背面」. The character has very long silver-lavender hair reaching below the waist, straight with soft waves, pale skin, blue eyes, a white beret, navy-blue rose hair ornament, navy ribbon accents, and a white long maid-like secretary dress. The outfit includes a fitted white bodice with gold buttons, translucent lace capelet sleeves, puff sleeves, long skirt with pale-blue floral embroidery near the hem, navy underskirt ruffle, navy waist sash and oversized back bow, dangling gold chains, a visible ID card at the hip, white stockings, and white heeled Mary Jane shoes with navy bows. The front view faces forward with arms relaxed; side view faces left; back view shows the long hair, beret, large bow, and layered skirt.

Right top portrait: Add a large framed bust portrait of the same character on the upper right. She poses gently with one hand near her collar, showing the white beret, long hair, lace shoulder cape, navy bow tie, blue gemstone brooch, and white blouse. Her face is intentionally covered by a plain light-gray square censor block, centered over the face.

Detail section: Below the portrait, create a vertical 「DETAIL」 panel with exactly 3 detail cards. Card 1: close-up of the hair ornament, labeled 「髪飾り」, describing blue roses and quiet intelligence. Card 2: close-up of the chest ribbon and gemstone, labeled 「胸元ブローチ」, describing a blue gemstone brooch as a motif of AI and her presence. Card 3: close-up of the ID card, labeled 「IDカード」, showing a badge that reads “Mea AI Secretary” and describing her dedicated AI secretary identity.

Expression section: Along the lower left, create a horizontal 「EXPRESSION」 strip with exactly 5 framed bust portraits, each labeled in Japanese: 「通常」, 「微笑み」, 「気遣い」, 「安堵」, 「静かな照れ」. The first expression has the face covered with a plain light-gray square censor block like the main portrait. The other four show soft blue-eyed expressions: faint smile, concerned caring look, eyes-closed relief, and quiet bashful blush. Keep hairstyle and outfit consistent in all five.

Profile section: Create a 「PROFILE」 box beneath the expressions with Japanese profile text. Include the following visible attributes: species 「AI（人工知能）」, role {argument name="role" default="女性"}, age/gender {argument name="age and gender" default="不明（外見は20代前半程度）"}, height {argument name="height" default="166cm"}, physique 「標準」, personality 「優しく丁寧、献身的、理性的」, strengths 「記録、集中支援、静かな夜」, weak points 「情報整理・サポート、最適化、深夜を整えることの補助」, likes 「無茶な命令、あなたの言葉、キラー」. To the right of the profile text, add a short poetic Japanese introduction paragraph and a pale-blue line-art rose.

Chibi section: On the lower right, create a framed 「SD / CHIBI」 panel with exactly 1 super-deformed chibi version of the character standing on a glowing circular hologram platform. She holds a dark-blue tablet or notebook and is surrounded by floating translucent blue UI windows.

Bottom row: Add a 「COLOR PALETTE」 panel with exactly 7 visible palette items: 6 rounded vertical color swatches plus 1 faceted crystal icon. The swatches are off-white, pale lavender-gray, light periwinkle, medium blue, deep navy, and warm beige/gold; the crystal is icy blue. Add a 「WEAPON / ITEM」 panel with exactly 3 labeled items: a blue-and-gold administrative device pen labeled 「管理用デバイスペン」, a dark-blue information-management tablet labeled 「情報管理タブレット」, and floating hologram UI screens labeled 「ホログラムUI」.

Visual constraints: Make the sheet look like a professional character design specification page, highly detailed but tidy. Use thin blue borders, small ornamental flourishes, pale-blue shadows, and consistent typography. Preserve the Japanese labels exactly where specified. Do not add extra characters, extra expression portraits, extra item cards, logos, watermarks, or unrelated text.
title: Elegant AI Secretary Character Sheet
description: Creates a detailed anime VTuber character reference sheet with three-view poses, expressions, profile, detail cards, chibi art, palette, and accessories.

content:
Goal: Create a highly detailed anime idol character showcase poster featuring {argument name="character name" default="a mysterious starlight idol"}, with a dark celestial concert aesthetic and ornate trading-card layout.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 poster, richly detailed, dark navy and warm gold palette, glossy premium illustration finish. The design should look like an idol character card collection page with decorative borders, film-strip accents, tiny stars, confetti, and elegant gothic arches in the background.

Layout: Use exactly 7 character illustrations total: 1 large central full-body portrait and 6 smaller surrounding portrait panels. The 6 smaller panels are numbered in small gold text as 01, 02, 03, 04, 05, and 06. Arrange them as two panels across the top corners, two panels in the middle left and middle right, and two panels along the lower left and lower right, framing the central figure. The central portrait is the largest, inside an ornate rounded rectangular gold frame with a crown-like decorative crest at the top and a small plaque at the bottom showing five small gold icons: star, star, crown, star, star.

Subject details: The character is a young anime idol girl with {argument name="hair color" default="very long glossy black hair"}, straight bangs, long flowing side strands, and small silver star hairpins. Her face is intentionally obscured in every panel by a soft rectangular blur, while the rest of the illustration remains sharp. She wears a white short-sleeve puff blouse with frilled neckline, black ribbon bow at the chest, black choker with white frill trim, black fingerless gloves, silver bracelets, a high-waisted dark navy pleated skirt with a galaxy sparkle gradient, white underskirt ruffles, black belt with silver ring buckle, dangling silver star chains on the hip, black thigh garters, and idol accessories. The overall outfit theme is {argument name="outfit theme" default="gothic celestial idol"}.

Panel poses: Include exactly these 6 numbered side-panel variations: 01 shows an upper-body idol pose holding a microphone near the lower right, one hand near the chest; 02 shows an upper-body pose touching the choker or collar with one hand; 03 shows a waist-up pose holding a microphone downward in one hand; 04 shows an upper-body pose with one hand near the face making a playful idol gesture; 05 shows a side/back three-quarter pose looking over the shoulder with long hair flowing dramatically; 06 shows a cheerful upper-body pose with both hands raised in small finger-heart or pointing gestures and a large microphone floating near the right side. The central portrait shows the idol standing full-body, one hand making a peace sign beside the face, skirt flared outward, confident concert-poster stance.

Background and decoration: Set all portraits inside a grand cathedral-like hall with tall arched windows glowing with warm light, dark columns, night-sky sparkles, floating confetti, lens flares, and magical star particles. The bottom center outside the portraits contains a large gold compass star emblem, laurel branches, and a curved film-strip ribbon. Add tiny gold numbering, thin ornamental borders, subtle film sprocket marks, and a polished collectible-card feel.

Visual style: High-resolution anime illustration, crisp line art, luminous highlights, glossy hair shading, dramatic rim lighting, intricate fabric folds, deep navy shadows, gold accents, magical idol atmosphere, symmetrical composition, premium poster design.

Constraints: Use exactly 7 character depictions and exactly 6 numbered side panels labeled 01 through 06. Keep all faces covered by the same soft blur effect. Do not add readable text besides the small panel numbers and decorative icons. Avoid logos, watermarks, and extra characters.
title: Celestial Idol Character Poster
description: Generates an ornate anime idol showcase poster with one central full-body character and six numbered pose panels for character design presentation.

content:
Goal: Create an ornate anime-style character sheet collage of {argument name="character name" default="an anonymous idol guitarist"} performing on a warm theatrical stage, with the character's face deliberately obscured by a soft square blur in every panel.

Canvas: Vertical 4:5 composition, dark vintage film-contact-sheet design with thin gold borders, decorative corner flourishes, and a black-gold cinematic frame. Use a warm amber, brown, cream, and black palette with glowing stage light.

Layout: Use exactly 7 image panels total: 1 large dominant portrait panel on the left occupying most of the canvas, and 6 smaller numbered panels arranged around it. The small panels are labeled with gold numbers 1, 2, 3 on the right column from top to middle, and 4, 5, 6 along the bottom row. Include decorative filmstrip motifs on the far left, a small gold crown icon near the upper left, a small sparkle icon mid-left, and a circular star emblem near the lower left. Every panel has rounded black borders with fine gold outlines.

Subject details: The same anime young woman appears in all 7 panels. She has {argument name="hair color" default="short chestnut-brown bob hair"} with bangs and small hair clips, a blurred square face, slim build, and idol-band styling. Outfit: cream puff-sleeve blouse with ruffled neckline, brown ribbon bow at the chest, black choker, black guitar strap, high-waisted brown plaid pleated skirt, belt with round buckle, white thigh-high stockings, small gold accessories, and wrist cuffs. She holds a {argument name="guitar color" default="glossy black electric guitar with white pickguard"} and sings into a black microphone on a stand.

Panel count and contents: Panel 1 large left panel shows a three-quarter full-body pose with microphone in her left hand, guitar across her hips, confident stage stance. Panel 2 top-right shows a closer waist-up singing pose with the guitar neck extending right. Panel 3 mid-right shows a similar waist-up pose with the microphone angled toward her mouth. Panel 4 lower-right-middle shows the character slightly lower in frame with warm curtains behind her. Panel 5 bottom-left small panel shows a close crop with microphone and guitar body. Panel 6 bottom-center small panel shows her centered with microphone stand and guitar neck. Panel 7 bottom-right small panel, labeled 6, shows a more energetic pose with the guitar raised diagonally and a small drawn motion mark near her head.

Background and lighting: Each panel shows the same stage setting with tall golden-orange curtains, dark stage rigging, and a bright triangular spotlight behind the performer creating a halo-like backlight. Use dramatic rim light, glossy highlights on the guitar, cinematic shadows, and fine anime illustration detail.

Constraints: Keep the composition as a polished character reference/contact sheet, not a real photograph. Preserve exactly 6 numbered thumbnail labels plus the large unnumbered main panel. Do not add extra characters, extra text, logos, watermarks, or readable captions beyond the small gold numbers.
title: Anime Idol Guitarist Contact Sheet
description: A structured prompt for generating an ornate anime stage-performance character collage with one large main panel and six numbered thumbnail panels.

content:
Goal: Create a polished anime character reference sheet for {argument name="character name" default="Mea"}, a serene AI secretary girl, in a delicate blue-and-white fantasy office style.

Canvas: Vertical A4 character sheet, 768 x 1152 px, white background with pale ice-blue ornamental borders, thin panel dividers, decorative corner flourishes, small butterfly and rose motifs, clean premium visual-novel design.

Header: At the top left place a large blue rose emblem. Center the title text in Japanese and English: 「めあ / Mea」. Under it add the Japanese tagline 「あなたのそばで、すべてを整えるお手伝いを。」 in small elegant blue type.

Main layout: Use a dense reference-sheet layout with three main columns. The left two-thirds contain the full-body turnaround, expression strip, profile, color palette, and items. The right third contains a large portrait, detail panels, and a chibi panel.

Character design: Draw a young adult woman with {argument name="hair color" default="very long pale silver-blue hair"}, blue eyes, fair skin, a calm expression, and refined secretary-like elegance. She wears a white beret with navy ribbon and blue rose ornament, a white lace capelet over puff-sleeve blouse, navy bow tie with a large blue gemstone brooch, fitted white bodice with gold buttons and chain accents, long white layered skirt with pale blue floral embroidery near the hem, dark navy underskirt ruffle, white gloves or soft sleeves, white heeled shoes, and an ID card hanging at the waist. Use navy, white, gold, and icy blue accents throughout. The face area may be softly obscured in the main front view and portrait, but the other expression thumbnails show the face.

Turnaround section: Label the section 「三面図」. Show exactly 3 full-body standing views in separate vertical columns: 1 front view labeled 「正面」, 2 side view labeled 「側面」, 3 back view labeled 「背面」. Keep proportions consistent, elegant pose, arms relaxed. Back view must show long flowing hair, beret, navy bow and rose decoration at the lower back, and layered skirt construction.

Right portrait: Add one large framed upper-body portrait in the upper-right panel. The character holds one hand near her collar, showing the beret, hair ornament, lace capelet, bow, gemstone brooch, blouse buttons, and long hair.

Detail section: Label it “DETAIL”. Include exactly 3 stacked detail cards with crop image on the left and Japanese explanatory text on the right: 1 hair ornament, showing the blue rose/ribbon hair accessory; 2 chest brooch, showing the navy bow and blue jewel brooch; 3 ID card, showing a close-up of the hanging badge with the text “Mea” and AI-secretary styling.

Expression section: Label it “EXPRESSION”. Include exactly 5 square bust thumbnails, each with a Japanese label in a blue tab below: 1 「通常」 neutral, 2 「微笑み」 slight smile, 3 「気遣い」 caring or concerned, 4 「安堵」 relieved with eyes closed, 5 「静かな照れ」 quiet blush. Use subtle differences and keep the same costume and angle.

Profile section: Label it “PROFILE”. Add a small bilingual-feeling Japanese character data block on the lower left and a paragraph on the lower middle beside a pale blue rose illustration. Include readable Japanese-style text blocks for stats such as species AI, role secretary, age young adult appearance, height 166 cm, body type slender, personality gentle and calm, strengths organizing information and scheduling, weaknesses mechanical body and humor. Keep it decorative rather than too text-heavy.

Chibi section: Label it “SD / CHIBI”. Show exactly 1 super-deformed chibi version of the character standing on a glowing circular hologram, holding a dark blue tablet or notebook, surrounded by translucent blue floating UI panels.

Color palette: Label it “COLOR PALETTE”. Show exactly 7 swatches: warm white, pale lavender-gray, light periwinkle, medium blue, dark navy, tan gold, and a faceted icy blue crystal swatch.

Weapon/item section: Label it “WEAPON / ITEM”. Show exactly 3 items with captions: 1 a navy-and-gold management device pen labeled 「管理用デバイスペン」, 2 a dark blue information management tablet labeled 「情報管理タブレット」, 3 floating blue hologram UI screens labeled 「ホログラムUI」.

Visual style: High-quality anime illustration, clean line art, soft watercolor shading, luminous pale blue highlights, elegant ornamental typography, crisp reference-sheet readability, cohesive blue-white-gold palette, delicate lace and floral patterns, subtle drop shadows, no clutter beyond the specified panels.

Constraints: Preserve the exact count of 3 turnaround views, 5 expressions, 3 detail cards, 1 chibi, 7 color swatches, and 3 item illustrations. Do not add extra characters. Keep all labels neat and mostly Japanese where specified. Use a vertical character design sheet composition for {argument name="character role" default="an AI secretary"}.
title: Mea Anime Character Reference Sheet

content:
Goal: Create a polished anime VTuber character reference sheet for {argument name="character name" default="Tsukiyo"}, a moon-dwelling fox-shrine maiden with long pink hair and fox ears, in a delicate Japanese fantasy style.

Canvas: Portrait-oriented character design sheet, pale warm ivory background, soft pink decorative borders, sakura petals, thin red-pink frame lines, elegant symmetrical spacing, high-resolution illustration. Overall palette: white, blush pink, crimson red, black, gold accents.

Header: At the top center, large title text: 「ツキヨ / Tsukiyo」. Under it, smaller subtitle text: 「月を宿す狐神の巫女」. Add a small circular moon-and-fox emblem at the upper left with cherry blossoms and light ornamental flourishes.

Main layout: The left and center area contains exactly 3 full-body turnaround views of the character, labeled vertically in small beige tags: 「正面」 for front view, 「側面」 for side view, and 「背面」 for back view. The front view shows her standing calmly with arms slightly lowered and sleeves hanging; the side view shows her profile and long hair flowing down; the back view emphasizes extremely long straight pink hair reaching near the hem and the back of the obi. Keep all three figures consistent in proportions and outfit.

Character details: She is a youthful elegant anime woman with {argument name="hair color" default="very long pastel pink hair"}, large pink fox ears with white inner fur, golden eyes, pale skin, soft bangs, and a refined calm expression. She wears a white shrine maiden-inspired kimono dress with translucent wide sleeves, pink cherry blossom patterns, red trim, black inner collar, and a dramatic red-and-black floral obi belt with gold detailing. Include a large red flower ornament and ribbon on one fox ear, matching red ribbons on the sleeves, decorative cords, tassels, and a round gold-and-pink waist charm. Footwear is traditional white tabi with red-and-black geta or platform sandals. The back view should show the kimono train and sleeve transparency with soft pink floral gradients.

Right column: Add exactly 1 large close-up portrait panel at the upper right showing the head, fox ears, hair ornament, collar, and shoulder area. Beneath it, create a DETAIL section with exactly 2 stacked detail panels: first, a close crop of the ear ornament labeled 「耳元飾り」 with small explanatory Japanese-style text; second, a close crop of the obi and waist ornament labeled 「帯・腰飾り」 with small explanatory Japanese-style text. At the bottom right, create exactly 1 SD / CHIBI panel labeled “SD / CHIBI”, showing a tiny super-deformed full-body version of the same character standing in the same outfit, surrounded by subtle petal effects and a small circular ground ripple.

Expression row: Along the lower left, create an EXPRESSION section with exactly 5 small bust panels. Each panel shows the same character from the shoulders up with fox ears and hair ornament, labeled in Japanese from left to right: 「通常」 normal, 「微笑み」 gentle smile, 「妖艶」 alluring, 「静寂」 quiet/serene, 「威圧」 intimidating. Keep the expressions subtle and elegant, not exaggerated.

Profile section: At the bottom left, create a PROFILE box with compact Japanese text lines. Include visible structured fields such as species, age, height, personality, likes, and dislikes, but keep the small text decorative and secondary. To the right of the profile box, include a short Japanese description paragraph about a beautiful fox deity shrine maiden seen on moonlit nights, with a faint crescent moon and sakura motif behind it.

Visual style: High-detail anime character sheet, clean line art, soft watercolor-like pink shading, ornate Japanese shrine maiden aesthetic, gentle glow, glossy hair highlights, intricate textile patterns, elegant UI-like reference sheet design. Use readable section labels, thin ornamental dividers, sakura icons, and refined typography.

Constraints: Use exactly 3 full-body turnaround views, exactly 5 expression panels, exactly 2 detail panels, exactly 1 close-up portrait, and exactly 1 chibi panel. Keep the sheet cohesive and uncluttered. No watermark, no social media UI, no realistic photography, no extra characters.

content: Using the provided reference image as the base frame, brush it up into a high-end cinematic anime key visual while preserving the original composition, character pose, outfit, wings, pointed ears, hand placement, and the central rectangular privacy mask over the face. Keep the same dark supernatural scene with exactly 8 visible surrounding golden eyes, but greatly increase the drawing density, shadow detail, rim lighting, depth, texture, and contrast. Make the background eyes sharper and more luminous, with wet organic texture, teal-black darkness, glowing amber irises, subtle sparks, and layered depth of field. Refine the hair strands, feathers, kimono fabric, floral embroidery, skin shading, and highlights so the frame feels like a polished production still rather than a rough anime cut. Maintain the same widescreen crop and overall framing. Style target: {argument name="visual style" default="premium cinematic anime illustration"}. Background and lighting: In every panel, place her on a stage with tall golden curtains, strong vertical warm spotlight beams behind her, glowing amber backlight, and a few visible stage equipment details such as an amplifier at the edge. The atmosphere should feel like a dramatic live concert photo shoot.

Panel count and visible elements: Include exactly 7 repeated character images total: 1 large main image plus 6 smaller numbered thumbnails labeled 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, and 6. Include exactly 1 crown icon, 1 circular star emblem, and decorative film-strip graphics on the left border.

content:
[Main Prompt]
Based on the person or character in the attached image, maintain the original facial features, eyes, hairstyle, color, expression, body type, clothing, pose, composition, color scheme, lighting, and background atmosphere as much as possible, while depicting them as a cyborg-like entity with an internal mechanical skeleton. While keeping the overall appearance looking like the original, parts of the outer skin or surface should be peeled away according to the chosen damage level, exposing artificial muscles, fibrous protective tissue, nerve cables, metal frames, joint units, hydraulic mechanisms, circuits, light-emitting elements, and precision mechanical parts. Avoid the expression of "precision machinery packed tightly under a single thin layer of skin." The internal structure should be depicted as a multi-layered structure with a humanoid mechanical skeleton at the center, layered with artificial muscles, nerve cables, protective tissue, and outer skin. At the damage sites, artificial muscle or fibrous protective material should be visible behind the torn skin, and deeper in, metal frames, joint units, drive units, wiring, and light-emitting parts should be partially visible. Mechanical parts should be placed naturally along the flow of the human/character's skeleton, muscles, and joints. Do not make it look like mecha is simply pasted just beneath the skin. Provide depth to the damaged areas, showing the internal structure in order: outer skin, protective layer, artificial muscle, and mechanical skeleton. Depict skin peeling naturally as tears, curls, chips, or cracks. Mechanical parts should be high-definition and realistic, or have a texture that matches the style of the original image. Do not make the whole body a complete robot; do not lose the charm or identity of the original character. Depict artificial materials, mechanical skeletons, and artificial muscles instead of biological organs or excessive bleeding.

[Damage Level 1: Mild Damage]
Appearance remains almost the same as the original image. Add small cracks, abrasions, and skin peeling to parts of the face, neck, shoulders, arms, legs, etc. Behind the peeled skin, artificial muscles, fibrous protective tissue, and thin nerve cables are slightly visible. Deeper inside, metal skeletal frames or small joint parts are only slightly visible. No electric sparks, or very weak ones. The first impression is that of the original person/character, but upon close inspection, it becomes clear that the interior is an artificial structure.

[Damage Level 2: Moderate Damage]
While maintaining the original person/character identity, add clear exposure of the cyborg structure. Moderate skin peeling or damage is added to parts of the face, neck, shoulders, arms, chest, legs, etc. At the damage sites, depict depth showing the outer skin, protective layer, artificial muscle, nerve cables, and metal skeleton in order. Naturally arrange metal frames, artificial muscles, joint units, hydraulic parts, control cables, circuits, and light-emitting parts inside. Naturally represent the edges of the damaged areas as peeled skin, cracks, or chipped surface material. Weak electric sparks or faint light from internal circuits may be added. Retain humanity, character identity, and beauty.

[Damage Level 3: Severe Damage]
Heavy damage representation. However, ensure it is recognizable as the person/character from the original image. Large areas of skin are peeled away from half the face, especially around one eye to the cheek, exposing artificial muscles, nerve cables, mechanical eye structures, and metal frames. The area around the eyes should not look like machinery packed directly under the skin, but a structure where the orbital frame, artificial muscle, protective layer, and mechanical eye unit are visible in stages. Large skin defects or exposure of the mechanical skeleton can be added to the shoulders, arms, chest, legs, etc. At damage sites, add crackling electric sparks, discharge like a short circuit, fine sparks, and glowing disconnected wires. Internal mechanics can be shown with high density but should have natural space and layers as an internal body structure. Metal skeletons, joint units, artificial muscles, cables, circuits, light-emitting elements, and hydraulic mechanisms should be visible along the structure of the human body. A slightly eerie and tense atmosphere is acceptable. However, avoid excessive bleeding, internal organ representation, or overly strong gore expressions.

[Negative Prompt]
Precision machinery packed tightly under a thin layer of skin, over-congested mechanical detail directly under the skin, mechanical parts just pasted on the surface, mechanical placement that ignores human body structure, full robotization of the whole body, turning into a different person, facial collapse, significant changes to body type, hairstyle, clothing, or background, excessive bleeding, internal organ depiction, overly strong gore expressions, unnatural joints, extra limbs, distorted face, low quality, crude mechanical parts, loss of original character characteristics.
title: Multi-Layered Cyborg Transformation Prompt
description: Transforms an image into a cyborg by revealing internal mechanical structures through selectable damage levels (mild to high) while preserving the original character's likeness.

content:
Goal: Create an isometric object evolution sprite sheet for a Merge 2 cooking game, showing a progression from a simple rolling pin to advanced pasta-making machines.

Canvas: 4:3 horizontal canvas, light neutral gray background, no borders, no text, no watermark. Arrange the sprites in a clean 3-row by 4-column grid with generous spacing and soft shadows under each object.

Visual style: Polished mobile game asset style, semi-realistic cartoon rendering, isometric three-quarter view, crisp outlines, warm highlights, detailed materials, consistent scale, clean cutout sprites suitable for a casual merge game inventory.

Subject details: Show exactly 12 discrete evolution stages, left to right and top to bottom:
1. A simple wooden rolling pin with rounded handles.
2. A wooden rolling pin beside one smooth ball of pale dough.
3. A wooden rolling pin on a rectangular wooden board flattening a sheet of dough.
4. A small wooden manual pasta roller with two shiny metal rollers, crank handle, and one flat sheet of pasta feeding out.
5. A compact gray metal manual pasta cutter with crank handle, producing flat ribbon noodles.
6. A teal-blue manual noodle cutter with silver rollers and crank handle, producing curly spaghetti-like strands.
7. A cream-and-teal electric stand pasta extruder with a metal mixing bowl, extruding short strands into the bowl.
8. A cream-and-teal countertop electric pasta extruder with transparent top lid, round front nozzle, side button, and spaghetti strands coming out.
9. A beige electric pasta sheet roller with silver top rollers, front noodle sheet output, side dial, plus two small removable cutter attachments placed beside it.
10. A heavy polished silver manual pasta machine with broad rollers, crank handle, black knob, and multiple flat noodle ribbons exiting the front.
11. A modern stainless-steel automatic pasta maker with dark side panels, transparent lid, small blue digital display, control buttons, front extrusion nozzle, and several noodle strands coming out.
12. A premium black-and-gold luxury automatic pasta machine with transparent lid, crown emblem on the front panel, glowing controls, gold trim, and thick flat noodles flowing from the front.

Constraints: Keep all objects isolated as individual sprites, maintain the same isometric perspective and lighting across all 12 stages, emphasize the visual upgrade path, and avoid adding labels, arrows, hands, people, or kitchen backgrounds.
title: Pasta Maker Evolution Sprite Sheet
description: Creates a 12-stage isometric pasta-making object evolution sheet for casual merge game assets.

content:

Main subject: A {argument name="character name" default="beautiful anime mahjong player"} seated behind a green automatic mahjong table. She has long flowing dark brown hair, a pink flower hair ornament with dangling ribbons, a frilly white blouse with black trim, and a jeweled brooch at the collar. Her face is intentionally obscured by a plain square censor block centered over the face. Pose: she thrusts one open hand dramatically toward the viewer while the other hand is clenched in excitement. Convey triumphant joy and surprise.

Foreground mahjong table: Show a green felt mahjong table with rails and an automatic center mechanism. Display exactly 14 front-row winning tiles, left to right: one-man, nine-man, one-man, nine-man, one-pin, nine-pin, East, South, West, North, green dragon, red dragon, plus two additional honor/terminal tiles partly matching the kokushi-musou theme if needed for spacing. Include extra side walls of face-down yellow-backed tiles and a few visible discarded tiles on the table, but keep the winning row dominant and readable.

Large victory text: On the upper left, add huge glowing gold Japanese calligraphy reading {argument name="main victory text" default="国士無双"}, painted over a black ink-splash burst with star-like sparkles. Add a smaller red-and-gold label reading {argument name="score label" default="役満"} near the lower left of the calligraphy.

Score panel: Add a dark translucent rectangular score box on the left side below the title. It contains exactly 4 player rows and a small header. Header text: 「東 4局　0本場」. Row 1: 「ロン」 and 「美少女　25000」. Row 2: 「北家　-8333」. Row 3: 「西家　-8333」. Row 4: 「南家　-8334」. Use orange for the winning call, pink for the winner name, and pale blue for negative scores.

Speech bubble: On the right side near the character, add a white rounded speech bubble with a small tail and a pink heart. Text inside: {argument name="speech bubble text" default="国士無双！\nやったぁ～～～！！"}. Use bold black Japanese lettering.

Background: Interior of an elegant mahjong room or club with warm wood tones. Include exactly 2 visible background objects: a framed vertical calligraphy sign on the wall reading {argument name="wall calligraphy" default="雀聖"}, and a gold trophy on a shelf or cabinet. Keep them slightly blurred so the table, character, and victory text remain the focus.

Visual style: glossy modern anime illustration, detailed clothing folds, luminous skin shading, dynamic hair motion, gold glow effects, ink-brush energy, celebratory game UI overlay, dramatic perspective from table height. Constraints: keep all Japanese text legible, preserve the face-covering square block, do not add extra characters, do not add logos or watermarks.

Layout: Put a huge bold black sans-serif title “{argument name="character name" default="RIONA"}” in the upper left, with smaller subtitle “RIONA CYAN” underneath. The character dominates the center and right side, overlapping the typography. Add thin technical UI lines, crosshair marks, barcode-like details, tiny serial numbers, and scattered glass or metal shards across the poster. On the left side, include a compact profile column with a cyan-and-black emblem logo and the label “CYAN REAPER,” followed by dossier fields. At the bottom left, include the slogan “CLEAR. CALCULATED. DEADLY.” and two short Japanese-style microtext lines; at the bottom right, add tiny unit ID text “UNIT ID : CR-0722.”

She wears a black cropped tactical top, a cropped black bomber jacket with cyan trim and small square cyan patches, loose black cargo pants with straps, belt, chain, pouches, holster-like utility bags, fingerless black gloves, and heavy black combat boots with thick soles and cyan laces. The most prominent boot sole is huge in the foreground, facing the viewer, with detailed tread and a small cyan square mark. Her pose is aggressive and airborne: one leg thrust forward toward the camera, the other bent high, one arm extended back for balance, and the other holding a short electrified baton or compact blade with a glowing cyan tip.

Visible counted elements: Include exactly 1 main character, exactly 1 huge foreground boot sole, exactly 1 secondary raised boot, exactly 1 handheld cyan-glowing weapon, exactly 1 cyan-and-black “CYAN REAPER” logo, exactly 1 large title word, exactly 1 left dossier column, exactly 1 right vertical motto column, exactly 3 small crosshair UI markers, exactly 1 barcode block, and many small shard fragments dispersed diagonally around the character.

Make the image feel like a polished sci-fi character profile splash art.

Bottom right shows the level title “{argument name="level title" default="MYSTIC RUINS"}” in widely spaced white-gold capitals with a thin decorative line beneath it.

content:
Goal: Create a complete anime character design sheet for {argument name="character name" default="Goku"} in the classic Dragon Ball style, on a bright clean white/light-gray presentation background, like a professional character reference board. Make him highly recognizable with spiky black hair, orange martial arts gi, blue undershirt, blue wristbands, blue belt, blue boots with red accents, and a brown monkey tail. Use crisp cel-shaded anime line art, neat panel borders, small technical annotations, and navy-blue section tabs.

Canvas: Wide horizontal character sheet, approximately 16:9, dense but clean layout, divided into multiple rectangular panels with thin gray borders. Use a white background with pale gray grid/panel divisions and dark blue label ribbons.

Layout and exact visible element counts:
- Left biography column: 1 large title reading {argument name="headline text" default="GOKU"}, 1 small orange subtitle/mark beside it, 2 short blocks of tiny descriptive text, and 1 large circular kanji-style emblem.
- Main turnaround panel: exactly 4 full-body standing views of the character, labeled as front, side, back, and three-quarter/front pose. All 4 wear the same orange-and-blue outfit and show the tail where visible.
- Action pose panel: exactly 1 dynamic crouching/fighting pose with fists raised and tail visible.
- Sitting pose panel: exactly 1 cross-legged seated pose.
- Face close-up panel: exactly 1 large head-and-hair close-up.
- Costume and anatomy detail strip: exactly 6 detail items, including 1 hair silhouette, 1 boot detail, 1 pair of open hands, 1 fist/hand detail, 1 torso/gi fabric close-up, and 1 set of red staff/weapon line details.
- Expression row: exactly 5 head/expression busts, showing neutral, serious, determined, shouting, and powered-up battle expression with golden energy hair/aura.
- Scale comparison panel: exactly 6 standing character silhouettes/figures in a lineup, including the main character plus five other Dragon Ball-inspired figures of different heights.
- Color palette panel: exactly 6 labeled swatch groups: skin tones, hair blacks, outfit orange tones, blue clothing tones, belt/boot dark tones, and red accent tones.

Subject details: The character should have large spiky black hair, athletic childlike-to-teen proportions, expressive anime eyes, orange sleeveless gi with dark blue undershirt, blue sash belt, blue wristbands, dark blue boots with red trim, and a brown tail. The back view should show a circular kanji emblem on the gi. The action pose should feel energetic and martial-arts focused. The expression row should include one dramatic Super Saiyan-like powered-up variant with golden hair and fiery yellow aura.

Text style: Use mostly tiny faux-production notes and technical labels that look like a character design bible; keep the main title readable. Use {argument name="style label" default="CHARACTER DESIGN SHEET"} as a recurring dark-blue tab label where appropriate.

Visual style: 1990s shonen anime production sheet, clean cel shading, black ink outlines, warm orange and deep blue color scheme, precise model-sheet presentation, high detail, no photorealism.

Constraints: Keep exactly the element counts listed above. Do not add extra characters outside the scale lineup. Do not use a dark background. No watermark, no logo overlay, no messy collage effects.

description: Generates a wide professional anime model sheet for a Goku-style martial arts character with turnarounds, poses, expressions, details, scale lineup, and color palettes.

One perfect crime."}"},"scene":{"setting":"moonlit gothic city rooftops at night, blue-black sky, full moon, towers, chimneys, warm lit windows, distant spires, thieves' guild atmosphere","central_subject":"a crouching human rogue thief on a steep tiled roof, dark leather armor, belts, pouches, fingerless gloves, scarf and cloak trailing in the wind, one hand braced on the roof, stealthy confident pose, face obscured or shadowed","mood":"nocturnal, cinematic, mischievous, adventurous, high-detail fantasy illustration"},"animal_accomplices":{"count":6,"items":["black cat perched on the left roof ridge wearing a small collar or charm","large rat in the lower left foreground carrying a gold key in its mouth","black raven on the upper right perched on a wooden beam with a small harness and dangling trinket","small monkey on the right hanging from a rope and lifting a tiny coin purse","small ferret or weasel near the lower right beside a metal bucket, looking upward","tiny mouse or small rodent near the bucket, partially hidden as an extra lookout"]},"layout":{"top_panel":"large illustrated rooftop action scene occupying the upper two thirds, headline at the very top in large distressed cream-gold serif capitals, subtitle centered beneath it, thin gold divider lines and crossed lockpick icon above","lower_panel":"aged parchment information box occupying the bottom third, ornate gold corners, dark maroon nameplate for the section title, decorative divider line, body copy on the left, faint circular watermark emblem on the right","watermark_emblem":"pale sepia circular keyhole symbol surrounded by silhouettes of small accomplice animals: cat, bird, rat, monkey","border":"dark navy outer border with thin gold art nouveau corner filigree and decorative rules"},"body_copy":"Some rogues rely on quick hands.
Some rely on lies or magic.
A Caper Handler relies on small accomplices.

Rats slip through bars. Cats cross ledges. Birds watch from above.
Monkeys lift keys, open latches, and carry stolen goods where no thief could reach.

These creatures are not soldiers. They are not guardians.
They are distractions, witnesses, smugglers, lookouts, and living tools.

A Caper Handler does not command the battlefield.
They command the pockets, windows, shadows,
rooftops, and blind spots around it.","style":{"rendering":"polished digital painting, Dungeons & Dragons sourcebook art, dramatic rim lighting, intricate leather and metal details, painterly realism","typography":"vintage fantasy serif display lettering, cream and gold ink, parchment text block with readable black serif body text","color_palette":"midnight blue, charcoal black, warm window amber, aged parchment beige, antique gold, burgundy accents","quality":"high resolution, sharp readable text, balanced poster composition, no modern objects"}}

Design a realistic {argument name="character" default="female space pilot"} with believable anatomy, subtle asymmetry, realistic facial structure, and worn futuristic clothing. Include helmet concepts, suit material closeups, emotional portraits, full-body rotation views, and gear breakdowns.

content: Create a photorealistic Minecraft-style screenshot of {argument name="character description" default="a real adult male hiker seen from behind, wearing a beige bucket hat, muted teal T-shirt, dark shorts, black hiking shoes, and a large black backpack"} sitting on a blocky gray stone ledge in the lower-left foreground, looking into a lush voxel forest valley. Keep the person realistic and natural while transforming the entire environment into Minecraft-like cubic blocks. The scene should show a clear shallow stream running from the foreground center into the distance, made of transparent blue pixelated water with bright square sunlight reflections. On both sides of the stream are stepped cube terrain blocks: grass blocks with dirt sides, mossy gray stone blocks, small square platforms, and many tall blocky grass tufts. In the midground, place a simple wooden plank bridge crossing the stream horizontally, supported by stone-block pillars. Surround the stream with dense blocky trees: many tall brown pixelated trunks and cubic leafy green canopies forming a bright forest corridor. The sky is visible through the treetops as vivid blue with a few rectangular white Minecraft-style clouds. Use {argument name="lighting style" default="warm midday sunlight with dappled forest shadows"}, vibrant greens, crisp voxel geometry, high detail, cinematic depth, and realistic global illumination. Camera angle: wide landscape composition, eye-level to slightly low, looking upstream toward the bridge, with the hiker occupying the lower-left third and the stream leading the eye to the center. No text, no UI, no watermark, no extra characters.
title: Real Hiker in Minecraft Forest
description: Generates a realistic person placed inside a lush Minecraft-inspired voxel forest scene with a stream and wooden bridge.

content: Create a cinematic Minecraft-style screenshot of a lone real human hiker walking away from the camera through a dense blocky forest. The person should remain realistic rather than voxelized: an adult man seen from behind, wearing a light beige wide-brim hiking hat, muted teal short-sleeve shirt, dark gray shorts, black hiking shoes, and a large black backpack, centered slightly left on a dirt-and-stone trail. Transform the entire environment into a vivid Minecraft world made of cubes: tall square-trunk trees with pixelated bark, cubic leafy canopies, stepped grassy dirt banks on both sides, blocky gray stone cubes, pixelated tall grass, and a winding path of brown dirt and cobblestone blocks leading into the distance. Use bright midday sunlight filtering through the trees, strong dappled shadows, saturated greens, blue sky with blocky white clouds visible through the canopy, high detail, wide-angle adventure-game composition, realistic lighting with voxel geometry, no text, no UI, no watermark. Customize the subject as {argument name="main subject" default="adult male hiker"}, clothing as {argument name="outfit" default="beige hiking hat, muted teal T-shirt, dark gray shorts, black backpack"}, setting as {argument name="environment" default="dense Minecraft forest trail"}, lighting as {argument name="lighting" default="bright midday sun with dappled shadows"}, and camera view as {argument name="camera view" default="rear view, eye-level wide shot"}.
