content: Create a realistic travel-photo composition transformed into a Minecraft-style open-world screenshot. Show one human figure viewed from behind, standing near the lower left foreground on a grassy blocky cliff, looking out over a vast bright blue ocean and rugged voxel coastline. The person should remain photorealistic and natural, wearing {argument name="outfit" default="a tan wide-brim hiking hat, navy blue T-shirt, dark shorts, and black sneakers"}, with relaxed posture and hands by the sides, facing the scenery. The entire environment must be rendered as Minecraft-like cubic blocks: square grass and dirt ledges in the foreground, tall pixelated grass clumps, stepped rocky gray block formations along the shore, turquoise shallow water with white surf around the rocks, a deep cobalt ocean stretching to the horizon, and a green blocky forested coastline with hills and mountains in the distance. Use {argument name="scene location" default="a tropical coastal cliff overlooking the ocean"} as the setting. The sky is vivid clear blue with exactly many flat rectangular white voxel clouds scattered across the upper half, strong midday sunlight, saturated colors, crisp shadows, and high contrast. Camera angle is a wide landscape view from slightly behind and above the person, emphasizing scale and adventure, like a screenshot from an upgraded high-resolution Minecraft shader pack mixed with a real person. Keep the person anatomically realistic, not blocky, while all terrain, water edges, rocks, plants, clouds, and distant mountains are voxel/block-based. No text, no UI, no watermark.
title: Real Person in Minecraft Coastal World
description: Generates a photorealistic traveler placed inside a vivid Minecraft-style coastal landscape for surreal travel or game-world edits.

content: Create a photorealistic Minecraft-style screenshot showing {argument name="main subject" default="an adult man fishing from a folding camping chair"} beside a calm lake. Keep the human subject realistic and unchanged in proportions and clothing, but transform the entire environment into a bright blocky voxel world inspired by Minecraft. The scene is viewed from behind and slightly above the seated person on the lower left foreground: he wears a light beige wide-brim sun hat, dark gray T-shirt, dark shorts, and black sneakers, holding a long thin fishing rod angled diagonally out over the water. He sits on a black collapsible camping chair on a stepped grassy dirt block shoreline. Surround him with tall square reeds and pixelated grass. The lake fills the right half of the image, with transparent blue blocky water, subtle square reflections, exactly 7 visible green lily pads scattered on the surface, and small white square highlights. Across the lake is a dense voxel forest with oak and birch trees, layered grassy banks, dirt blocks, trunks, leaves, and undergrowth. The sky is vivid clear blue with exactly 13 rectangular white block clouds at different sizes and distances. Use crisp sunlight, saturated greens and blues, realistic lighting and shadows, high-resolution game screenshot quality, strong contrast between the realistic person and the fully Minecraft-like environment, no UI, no text, no watermark.
title: Realistic Fisherman in Minecraft Lake
description: Generates a realistic person fishing within a bright Minecraft-style voxel lakeside scene for surreal photo-to-game transformations.

content:
Goal: Create a dreamy anime “charm point” visual analysis sheet that explains why a cute summer girl is lovable, presented like a scrapbook character appeal diagram rather than a standard profile.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 portrait poster on an off-white paper background with thin pastel blue and pink border lines, rounded inset panels, dotted arrows, tiny hearts, sparkles, seashell doodles, handwritten notes, and soft stationery-like annotations.

Main subject: Center a delicate anime girl named {argument name="character name" default="Sunny Days with You"} sitting by a bright seaside. She has {argument name="hair color" default="soft pink-blonde"} long flowing hair with wispy bangs, large aqua-blue eyes, fair skin with gentle blush, and a shy slightly parted-lips expression. Her pose is three-quarter view, looking back over her shoulder, one hand lightly touching her lips and chin, with elegant fingers. She wears a white ruffled summer dress with sleeveless frilled straps, layered skirt, and navy blue ribbon bows at the chest and waist. Add an oversized white sun hat decorated with a large navy-blue bow, a sunflower, and ribbon tails. The background behind her is a bright blue ocean, white waves, blue sky, and fluffy clouds.

Layout and counted detail panels: Use exactly 9 inset panels around the central character, each with rounded corners and soft pastel borders. Left column has 4 labeled panels: 1) “eyes” close-up showing both sparkling aqua eyes and eyelashes, 2) “hair flow” close-up of pink hair strands blowing in the sea breeze, 3) “gesture” close-up of crossed delicate fingers, 4) “soft expression” vertical panel containing exactly 4 small stacked facial-expression crops: gentle gaze, shy glance, pouting/soft look, and smiling with closed eyes. Right side has 4 labeled panels: 5) “favorite detail” close-up of the navy bow and sunflower on the hat, 6) “best angle” profile/three-quarter face crop from the cutest side angle, 7) “outfit detail” close-up of the ruffled shoulder strap and bodice, 8) “summer motif” collage panel with exactly 7 small motif items: three seashells, one conch shell, one blue ribbon bow, one circular ocean-sky scene, and one tiny sparkle/flower cluster. Bottom center has 1 labeled panel: 9) “tiny habit” close-up of her lower face and hand resting near the chin.

Text content: Top-left handwritten headline reads {argument name="headline text" default="charm point.♡"} in pink cursive, with the small subtitle “SUNNY DAYS WITH YOU” beneath it. Include the labels “eyes”, “hair flow”, “gesture”, “soft expression”, “favorite detail”, “best angle”, “outfit detail”, “summer motif”, and “tiny habit”. Add small handwritten accent phrases: “My favorite” at the top right, “So cute! ♡” near the best-angle area, “chin rest...♡” below the tiny-habit panel, and {argument name="bottom quote" default="You make every day shine."} near the bottom left.

Visual style: High-quality Japanese anime illustration, pastel watercolor and colored-pencil finish, airy summer lighting, glossy eyes, soft blush, detailed hair strands, luminous sea reflections, delicate line art, cute handwritten typography, scrapbook annotation aesthetic, romantic and affectionate mood.

Constraints: Keep the central girl dominant and full-body/waist-up within the page, keep all 9 inset panels visible and clearly separated, use only soft pastel colors with navy accents, avoid photorealism, avoid extra characters, avoid watermark or logo.
title: Anime Charm Point Analysis Sheet
description: Generates a pastel anime scrapbook-style character appeal diagram highlighting lovable details, expressions, outfit features, and summer motifs.

content: Create a high-end cinematic character design sheet intended for a premium film production. The layout should feel like a curated art direction board rather than a rigid template. Avoid symmetrical grids, uniform spacing, or overly structured presentation. Instead, the composition should feel organic, slightly asymmetrical, and thoughtfully arranged like a real Hollywood concept pitch. Design a grounded, realistic human character with believable body proportions, natural imperfections, and expressive performance-driven presence—like a professional actor captured during emotional and physical performance moments rather than a posed mannequin. Use a bright, clean, and well-lit background that enhances clarity and gives the sheet a fresh, modern studio feel. Include: • Full-body turnaround views (front, 3/4 front, side, back, 3/4 back) • Multiple expressive facial studies from different angles showing emotional range • A cinematic hero portrait with strong character focus • Detailed breakdown of costume, accessories, and key props • Close-up studies of materials such as fabric texture, skin detail, and surface realism • Handwritten-style annotation notes, production markings, and design insights •A clear height reference scale integrated naturally into the composition The character should feel like a real person existing in a film world—authentic, grounded, and emotionally alive rather than stylized or overly idealized. Art direction style: Semi-realistic cinematic design, high-budget film production quality, soft natural studio lighting with a bright tone, subtle depth of field, realistic material rendering, and emotionally readable expressions. Presentation should feel like a professional concept art portfolio used in major film pre-production. Consistency requirement: Maintain perfect continuity in facial identity, body proportions, hairstyle, outfit design, and material details across all angles and studies.
title: Cinematic Character Design Sheet
description: Creates a professional Hollywood-style character design board featuring turnarounds, facial expressions, and costume details with organic arrangement.

Design a realistic human character with grounded proportions, believable anatomy, natural imperfections, and expressive acting energy. Include: * Full-body turnaround (front, 3/4, side, back, 3/4 back) * Expressive head studies from multiple angles * Cinematic portrait shot * Wardrobe and prop breakdown * Fabric, skin, and material texture realism * Annotation callouts and production notes * Height reference scale Character should feel like a real actor captured mid-moment, not a posed model sheet. Style: Semi-realistic cinematic character design, film-production quality, soft natural lighting, emotional readability, subtle exaggeration, realistic materials, shallow depth of field, premium studio presentation aesthetic. Important: Maintain strict consistency in face, proportions, hairstyle, outfit, and details across every angle and section.
title: Realistic Character Design Board
description: A professional film-production quality prompt for creating consistent character design boards with turnarounds and material details.

Use the user uploaded image as the only subject reference. Transform the person in the uploaded image into a realistic LEGO style minifigure while preserving their recognizable identity and outfit. Preserve the subject's facial likeness as much as possible within LEGO minifigure design limits, maintaining the same hairstyle and hair color adapted into a LEGO hairpiece, facial expression, clothing colors, clothing design and patterns, and any visible accessories. The result should clearly represent the same person translated into LEGO form. The character must follow authentic LEGO minifigure proportions, including a cylindrical yellow or skin tone LEGO style head, simple printed facial features adapted from the subject, a block shaped torso with printed clothing details, standard LEGO minifigure arms with curved hands, short LEGO minifigure legs, and a distinct molded plastic hairpiece matching the subject's hairstyle.
Render the figure using realistic LEGO plastic material with a slight glossy sheen, subtle molded seams, and natural toy surface reflections. The face and torso should include printed details typical of LEGO minifigures, and the hairpiece should appear as molded plastic. The final image should be a high quality realistic 3D toy render with soft diffused studio lighting, subtle shadows that emphasize shape and plastic texture, and clean sharp focus with crisp detail. The framing must show the full body minifigure from head to feet in a centered composition with the entire figure fully visible. Use a plain white background with no scenery, no props, and no additional elements. The final style should feel like a photorealistic LEGO minifigure toy render with highly detailed plastic texture and studio lighting.
title: Photo-to-LEGO Minifigure Transformation

content: Using the provided reference image as a Labanotation-style dance score, interpret the 4-beat movement phrase and convert it into a pose-control character sheet. Create exactly 4 full-body panels arranged in a clean 2×2 grid on a plain white studio background, showing the same character performing the pose for each beat. Add bold Japanese beat labels in the upper-left of each panel: "1拍目", "2拍目", "3拍目", and "4拍目". Use a photorealistic young female model wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="white school-uniform blazer, black bow tie, gray plaid skirt, white socks, and black Mary Jane shoes"}, with {argument name="hairstyle" default="black twin tails"}. Translate the notation into these four poses: beat 1: standing on one leg with one arm raised straight upward and the opposite leg bent back; beat 2: one arm raised upward, body angled slightly, one knee lifted and crossed in front; beat 3: standing front-facing with both arms extended horizontally to the sides; beat 4: standing front-facing with both hands held together near the chest. Keep the character consistent across all four panels, use soft even lighting, minimal shadows, and a simple catalog-like dance reference layout.
title: Labanotation to 4-Beat Pose Sheet

Generate an actual gameplay screenshot of a non-existent modern urban 3D anime-style open-world RPG. The setting is a {argument name="location" default="high-end lounge-style social space"} with a visible bar and sofa seating under warm lighting. A conversation event scene showing the main heroine serving with {argument name="outfit" default="cute service attire and gestures"}. Other cast members are naturally placed around to create a glamorous and calm adult atmosphere.

Characters should not be high-definition illustrations, but rather cel-shaded 3D character models similar to event scenes in recent {argument name="game style" default="bishojo 3D games"}, featuring rounded faces, simple skin shading, soft hair strands, and a clean 3D model texture with a slight plastic feel.

As a game screen, include a Japanese conversation subtitle window at the bottom, character name display, selection UI, status UI like money or affection level in the top right, and operation UI like skip/log display at the screen edges. Make the dialogue and choices feel realistic, cute, and slightly quirky. The image should look like an actual in-game screenshot rather than promotional art. Overall, emphasize a sophisticated modern 3D anime game aesthetic that is healing, heart-fluttering, and glamorous in an adult way.

Warm nostalgic storybook tones
Detailed environmental storytelling

Extremely detailed but visually clean composition
Rich adventure atmosphere
Cozy slice-of-life fantasy mood
Soft sunlight and cinematic environmental lighting
Highly expressive but natural posing

MAIN CHARACTER:
Transform the reference person into a Pokémon trainer adventurer/traveler while keeping the exact likeness recognizable.
Casual layered adventure outfit
Stylish jacket over graphic shirt
Backpack with travel accessories
Camera hanging from shoulder or neck
Relaxed friendly pose
Confident warm smile
Anime stylization while preserving identity
Slight windswept hair
Natural anatomy and proportions
Fashionable modern Pokémon trainer aesthetic

The page should be designed like a complete trainer profile sheet.

Large central full-body illustration of the trainer
Multiple Pokémon surrounding the character naturally
Decorative trainer information panels
Vintage scrapbook borders
Handwritten notes and adventure annotations

Pokémon team cards on one side

Decorative stamps, clips, tape pieces, map textures
Notebook/journal design language
Soft aged parchment paper background
Tiny environmental storytelling details everywhere

Mediterranean harbor scenery
Blue ocean water
Sunny skies
Stone buildings
Adventure-world atmosphere
Peaceful vacation vibe
Pokémon-world architecture
Lush greenery and flowers
Soft clouds and distant mountains

POKÉMON INTERACTION:
The Pokémon should interact naturally with the trainer:
Sitting beside them
Looking at camera
Resting on shoulder
Playing around feet
Dynamic but cozy interaction
Natural emotional chemistry

LAYOUT DETAILS:
Top section:
Large handwritten trainer name
“Trainer Profile” heading
Decorative paper labels

Right-side panel:
Character bio stats
Adventure information
Personality traits
Journey notes
Favorite things
Pokémon seen

He wears a black baseball cap, rectangular glasses, a blue medical face mask, black fingerless tactical gloves, a black diagonal shoulder strap, a black utility belt, black thigh straps, a right-thigh holster pouch, minimal tight blue athletic briefs, and red-and-black chunky sneakers. His right hand holds a black pistol upright beside his shoulder while his left fist hangs at his side. The scene is empty of passengers and warmly lit by glowing ceiling lamps and wall sconces, with polished varnished wood floors, curved wooden ceiling panels, brass rails, brass seat frames, and ornate vintage fittings. Use {argument name="seat fabric pattern" default="deep navy blue upholstery filled with tiny golden stars and nebula speckles"} for the seats and curtains, making the carriage feel like a celestial observatory. Show exactly 8 large side windows, 4 on the left and 4 on the right, revealing a vivid outer-space panorama with a bright purple-blue Milky Way, dense stars, and glowing cosmic dust. Add exactly 2 long overhead luggage racks, one on each side, made of brass piping, holding exactly 9 vintage suitcases and trunks in blue, cream, and tan. At the far end, place a wooden door with a small arched window showing stars beyond it, flanked by exactly 2 round wall clocks and small framed astronomical diagrams. Include a glowing station sign above the rear door reading {argument name="rear station sign text" default="星降る駅"} and a side plaque on the right wall reading {argument name="side line sign text" default="天の川線"} with small English text beneath it reading {argument name="line subtitle" default="MILKY WAY LINE"}. The composition has 1 central female dancer standing on one bare foot on a round wooden kagura stage, her other knee raised, one arm lifted high holding a golden suzu bell wand with trailing red ribbons, and the other arm extended gracefully outward. She wears a revealing layered miko-inspired ceremonial outfit: flowing white kimono sleeves, red inner lining, gold floral embroidery, black-and-gold ornate waist ornaments, braided cords, tassels, anklets, and jewelry; her long dark hair streams dramatically around her body beneath a large floral-gold divine headdress. Include exactly two Pokémon-like companions: one pale lavender fox-cat psychic creature floating at the upper right with large ears, forked tail, forehead gem, and a soft serious gaze; one green-and-white elegant humanoid psychic creature at the lower left with a helmet-like green head shape, pink eyes, slim body, and a red chest fin, standing gracefully. Show exactly 7 numbered poses arranged left to right across the page: 1 “ANTICIPATION (CROUCHING)” with the character crouched and arms back; 2 “EXTREME SQUASH (COMPRESSED)” with a deeper compact crouch; 3 “EXTREME STRETCH (TAKEOFF)” with the character elongated upward, arms raised, feet leaving the ground; 4 “APEX (MID-AIR ARC)” with the character tucked in midair; 5 “STRETCH (DOWNWARD ACCELERATION)” with the character stretched vertically while descending; 6 “SQUASH (IMPACT LANDING)” with the character compressed on landing, one hand touching the ground; 7 “RECOVERY (RETURN TO STANCE)” with the character standing relaxed with hands in pockets. Keep the design language tied to the reference can rather than copying the beverage packaging literally: use the can’s emerald green as lacquered armor, silver aluminum as polished metal, red logo color as cords and trim, gold shield/crown elements as heraldic ornamentation, and white typography areas as cloth highlights. content: Create a highly detailed wide-angle anime sci-fi cityscape inside a completely enclosed {argument name="space habitat type" default="O'Neill cylinder colony"}, viewed from an elevated perspective looking down the length of the cylinder toward a hazy circular vanishing point. The interior surface curves upward on both sides and overhead, packed with dense Japanese-inspired neighborhoods, apartment towers, small houses with red and blue roofs, elevated roads, pedestrian streets, parks, trees, canals, and rail lines. A bright central axial light system runs through the middle of the cylinder as three long glowing white-yellow strips, casting soft atmospheric light and creating a deep sense of scale. Include one visible elevated train on the right foreground track, many tiny pedestrians and vehicles, and warm lit windows throughout. Add readable urban signage including 3 Japanese-style residential district signs, 1 ramen shop sign, and 1 Neo-Kyoto sign, integrated naturally into the city. Use {argument name="visual style" default="clean detailed anime line art"} with crisp ink outlines, cel-shaded colors, intricate architectural detail, slight fisheye perspective, blue atmospheric haze in the distance, and a lively futuristic {argument name="city name" default="Neo-Kyoto"} mood. The scene should feel like an impossible enclosed space colony, not an open sky city, with the full cylinder shell visibly surrounding the entire metropolis.
title: Enclosed O'Neill Cylinder City
description: Generates a detailed anime-style futuristic city inside a fully enclosed O'Neill cylinder colony for sci-fi worldbuilding or concept art.

content: Create a vertical smartphone screenshot-style anime fantasy scene with black app UI bars at the top and bottom. In the main image, show a dramatic low-angle view looking up through a ruined canyon of towering cracked stone walls under a vivid deep blue sky with bright white clouds and sunlight flaring from the upper right. A massive cubical stone block floats in the center near the top, made of many cracked rectangular slabs, with sharp rim lighting, chipped edges, and small debris fragments breaking off. Count 6 floating stone objects total: 1 enormous central cube, 1 medium rectangular block below-left of center, 1 small cuboid at upper right, 1 small cuboid near lower center, 1 small cube near bottom center, and 1 tiny distant block among the debris. Add dynamic dust, sparks, and motion streaks to make the block feel suspended or falling. Place bold vertical Japanese manga text with thick black fill, white outline, and warm glow: on the right side, {argument name="right vertical text" default="どうだい？"}; on the left side, {argument name="left vertical text" default="壊してみないかい？"}. The art style should be cinematic high-detail anime, saturated colors, extreme perspective, dramatic lighting, crisp stone texture, and a sense of awe and challenge. Include a minimal social-media viewer overlay: black top bar with a white X icon at top left and the number {argument name="top counter" default="38"} at top right, plus a black bottom bar with small like and dislike icons in a rounded dark pill and Android navigation symbols.
title: Floating Stone Cube Challenge
description: Generates a vertical anime-style social media image of a massive cracked stone cube floating above ruins with dramatic Japanese challenge text.

The top panel shows a high-angle 3D game-like scene inside a circular enclosure of tall bright blue sharpened wooden palisade spikes tied with tan rope, with vivid green grass, a small crop field with rows of sprouting orange plants on the right, and warm firelight near the upper right; in the center stand two real-looking people viewed from above, a man in a light gray T-shirt on the left and a woman in a pale pink T-shirt on the right, both looking upward, with intentionally blurred/featureless faces, and large bold white 3D sans-serif text across the bottom reading {argument name="main title text" default="GPT 2"}. The bottom panel is a wider rounded thumbnail frame split visually between a bright grassy game area on the left and the same blue palisade enclosure on the right; include exactly 2 large text elements at the upper left, {argument name="day label" default="DAY"} in red block letters with black shadow and {argument name="number label" default="500"} in white block letters with black shadow. In the bottom panel, place exactly 1 cartoon deer creature on the left, brown with exaggerated huge white eyes, antlers, open smiling mouth, raised arm, and a red arrow pointing down toward it. On the right of the bottom panel, show the same two real-looking people from above, the woman wearing a bright hot pink shirt and white shoes, the man wearing a bright yellow shirt and dark shoes, both with blurred/featureless faces, standing inside the blue spike fence on bluish ground. Use saturated colors, strong contrast, glossy 3D game-rendered environment, photorealistic people composited into the scene, dramatic thumbnail lighting, thick shadows, clean sharp details, and a viral gaming challenge thumbnail composition. The image contains exactly 2 panels: top panel with the title text and two people, bottom panel with the day counter, red arrow, one deer creature, and two people.

content: Using the provided reference image as the character source, extract the small green graffiti creature and reimagine it as a clean black-outlined sprite in a colorful retro 2D pixel-art side-scrolling platform game. Do not keep the brick alley background; replace it with a bright fantasy ruin level: blue sky with puffy clouds, lush jungle plants, mossy stone platforms, and a large ancient temple with columns in the background. Place the referenced green creature on the left platform facing right. Add exactly 4 new interactive game elements: 1 flying knife projectile traveling rightward, 1 glass jar containing a pink brain being struck with a starburst impact, 1 red crab-like enemy with X eyes and raised claws, and 1 green crocodile-like enemy on the far right with a red “70” damage number beside it. Make the whole scene look like a polished 16-bit platformer screenshot with crisp pixel edges, saturated colors, parallax depth, and no photorealistic elements.
title: Graffiti Creature Pixel Platformer
description: Transforms a reference graffiti character into a retro pixel-art platform game scene with ruins, enemies, and action effects.

content: Create a cinematic hyper-realistic miniature diorama scene on a rainy rooftop in a dense modern city, shot at low eye level with shallow depth of field. A single male operative in a wet black suit, white shirt, black tie, and black gloves lies prone on slick reflective stone tiles, aiming a large futuristic suppressed sniper rifle labeled “WAA2000” with a small glowing red laser/indicator near the barrel; his face is deliberately obscured by a soft square blur. The rooftop contains exactly 4 prominent fixtures: one small red warning beacon glowing on the parapet at left, one industrial louvered ventilation unit behind the man, one heavy weathered metal door with a small inset panel at right, and one ribbed metal dome turbine on a square base in the lower right. The background is a blurred skyline of tall dark skyscrapers under dramatic storm clouds, with wet concrete, rusted pipes, grime, fallen leaves, puddle reflections, cool blue-gray color grading, moody noir atmosphere, high detail, realistic rain-soaked textures, and diorama-like scale-model precision. Use a {argument name="scene style" default="cinematic hyper-realistic miniature diorama"} look, a {argument name="weather" default="rainy stormy evening"} atmosphere, a {argument name="character outfit" default="wet black suit with white shirt and black tie"}, a {argument name="weapon label" default="WAA2000"}, and a {argument name="city backdrop" default="dark blurred skyscraper skyline"}.

content: Create a square anime-style illustration of a dynamic young female tennis player, {argument name="character name" default="unnamed teenage tennis girl"}, standing in an indoor tennis court or glass-walled gym after an intense impact. She has {argument name="hair color" default="light chestnut brown with blonde highlights"} medium-length hair tied into a high side ponytail, wind-swept with loose bangs, and her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur. She wears a sporty school-uniform-inspired tennis outfit: a dark fitted athletic top with a high collar, a white cropped windbreaker jacket slipping off one shoulder, a pleated navy plaid mini skirt, a purple sleeve wrap on one forearm, a pink wristband on the other, and light athletic accessories. She holds one purple tennis racket in her left hand, angled downward at the lower left of the composition, while her right arm extends outward in a graceful action pose. The background is a moody indoor court with tiled flooring, dark ceiling panels, metal-framed glass walls, and dramatic cracked or shattered glass with white impact splashes and floating debris, suggesting a powerful serve or collision. Use cinematic lighting, cool gray tones, high contrast, glossy reflections on the floor, detailed fabric folds, energetic motion, and polished modern Japanese anime rendering with semi-realistic shading. content: Create a dramatic vertical fantasy concept art scene of a towering {argument name="warrior species" default="anthropomorphic elephant"} berserker in heavy steampunk armor, standing in a smoky battlefield. The character has gray wrinkled elephant skin, huge ears, long ivory tusks with metal bands, a raised curling trunk, and an open roaring mouth. Dress the warrior in layered dark gunmetal plate armor with brass trim, rivets, leather straps, shoulder guards, bracers, knee guards, a small riveted helmet, utility pouches, and ornate mechanical gears on the belt and chest. The warrior grips a massive two-handed chained mace: a long wrapped metal handle connected by a thick chain to an enormous spherical iron wrecking ball covered in rivets and sharp spikes. The mace head is a steampunk engine-like weapon with glowing orange furnace vents, exposed inner machinery, round exhaust ports blasting white steam, sparks flying from impact, and scorched metal panels. Show dust, debris, smoke plumes, embers, and motion energy around the weapon as if it has just smashed into the ground. Background: a ruined industrial battlefield with blurred broken structures, gray smoke columns, cloudy sky, and gritty war atmosphere. Use cinematic low-angle composition, hyper-detailed realistic rendering, sharp focus on the warrior and weapon, volumetric smoke, dramatic natural light, metallic reflections, warm orange glow contrasting with cold gray armor, epic dark fantasy mood. Main customization: {argument name="weapon type" default="steam-powered spiked wrecking ball mace"}, {argument name="armor style" default="heavy brass-and-gunmetal steampunk plate armor"}, {argument name="battlefield setting" default="ruined smoky industrial war zone"}, {argument name="mood" default="ferocious epic battle roar"}.

content: Create a deliberately clumsy, childlike doodle illustration on a plain white background of a cute ghost-like ninja mascot named {argument name="character name" default="Gold Mitama"}. The character is bright {argument name="body color" default="golden yellow"}, with a rounded floating ghost body, a curled wisp of hair on top, a tapering ghost tail curling to the left, and simple thick black uneven outlines. Draw it in an intentionally bad MS Paint scribble style: shaky jagged lines, uneven coloring, visible white gaps, rough marker-like scribbles, flat colors, no realistic shading, low-detail amateur fan-art energy. The mascot wears a black ninja headband across the forehead with a tied knot and two flapping black cloth ends on the left; the front plate is gray and contains exactly 3 small triangular black symbols. Give the face half-lidded green eyes and a bored expression, with a skewer of exactly 3 dango balls held horizontally in the mouth: pink, white, and green. Add a purple scarf around the neck, with a colorful chest emblem made of overlapping rainbow-like blocks of blue, cyan, yellow, red, and green. On the left side behind the character, place a small sheathed sword or short ninja weapon with a brown handle and purple wrapping. On the lower right, show the character holding exactly 1 gray four-point shuriken with a circular hole in the center. Keep the composition centered, square, playful, messy, and intentionally poorly drawn, like a funny rough doodle generated from text only.

content:
Please generate a high-quality trading card-style illustration.

[Reference]
Base it on the provided character image. (Do not refer to text in the image.) Maintain the character's face, outfit, features, and identity.

[Style]
Modern Japanese trading card game style. High definition, dynamic composition, dramatic lighting, vivid colors, sharp rendering. A high-end feel like hologram processing. Readable text and organized UI design.

[Layout (Fixed)]
A vertical card with the following composition:
- Top left: Rarity display (text)
- Directly below rarity: Attribute (icon + text)
- Center: Full body of the character (with effects based on abilities)
- Bottom left: Status section
- Bottom right: Skill/Special move description
- Bottom center: Character name (large and prominent)

[Text Elements]
- Name: {{★Input manually or auto-generate from appearance}}
- Attribute: Auto-generate from appearance
- Rarity: Auto-generate from appearance

[Status (Auto-generate 0-100 values and gauges for each item based on appearance)]
- Attack
  High: Large weapons, aggressive poses, red/orange tones
  Low: Defensive, soft designs
- Defense
  High: Armor, heavy equipment, sense of weight, shield-like expression
  Low: Light equipment, slender
- Speed
  High: Slender, dynamic poses, speed effects
  Low: Large, solid stance
- Intelligence
  High: Calm expression, sharp eyes, blue/purple tones, mechanical/magical symbols
  Low: Emotional, impression of brute force
- Magic Power
  High: Luminescence, aura, magic effects, surreal expressions
  Low: Realistic, few effects

[Important Rules]
Do not maximize all statuses. Balance them with strengths and weaknesses.

[Rarity Standards]
N: Standard
R: Strong aura and direction
SR: Overwhelming presence and amount of information
UR: Overwhelming presence and information, with gloss and shine over the whole card

[Skill Generation]
Auto-generate the following:
- Skill (Name + Effect)
- Special Move (Flashy name + powerful effect)

[Direction]
Apply effects based on attribute and magic power (fire, lightning, darkness, etc.)

[Output]
Ensure a professional card design that is organized and easy to read without overlapping text.

The hut is an isometric three-quarter view facing slightly left, built from warm brown rounded log walls with visible circular log ends, a small arched wooden door on the front-right with a metal ring handle, and a small front window glowing orange from inside with open plank shutters. Add a short wooden ladder with three steps leading to the entrance. The roof is steep and whimsical, made of dark weathered wooden planks with green moss patches, curved golden-brown carved trim, an ornate peaked gable, and a chunky stone chimney near the back-right. The house stands on exactly two large bird-like legs with tan scaly texture, each ending in three forward toes and one rear toe with dark claws. Include small hanging charms on the right wall, including beads, bones, and a tiny skull. Use a polished fantasy miniature style, rounded shapes, hand-painted textures, soft ambient occlusion, subtle shadows, warm lighting, crisp edges, and no text.

The hut stands on exactly two birdlike chicken legs with three front claws visible on each foot, sculpted in the same warm wood-clay style. content: Create a deliberately rough, hand-drawn digital doodle on a plain white background, like quick Microsoft Paint line art with uneven black outlines, flat colors, scribbled shading, and a playful amateur anime style. Show a single flying fantasy battle maid knight, a young anime woman with {argument name="hair color" default="bright blonde"} hair streaming wildly backward, large blue eyes, a small open surprised smile, and a white frilly maid headband with tiny dark flower details. She is posed diagonally as if lunging through the air from upper left to lower right, holding one thin rapier in her forward hand, with the blade extending far to the left and a simple circular hand guard. Her outfit combines maid clothing and armor: shiny silver shoulder pauldrons and chest armor over a white bodice, brown belts and a gold buckle at the neck, a short white frilled skirt with circular spiral decorations, white thigh-high stockings with lace trim, and white armored shoes with small gold accents. Add a dramatic {argument name="scarf color" default="turquoise blue"} scarf or cape whipping behind her to the right, painted with energetic scribble strokes and darker blue at the far end. Use minimal detail but clear recognizable shapes, visible construction-like sketch lines, messy yellow hair strokes, gray armor strokes, and a whimsical action-fantasy feeling, with no text and no background scenery.
title: Flying Maid Knight Doodle

The hood is round and helmet-like, framing a black rounded-rectangle visor face with two sleepy half-lidded glowing cyan eyes and no mouth, giving a calm unimpressed expression. Add exactly 7 translucent jagged ice crystals protruding from the top and sides of the hood, with the tallest crystal at the center top, glowing electric blue edges, frosty refractions, and snow-like speckles. Put exactly 2 glowing atom emblems on the suit: one large cyan atom symbol on the left side of the hood and one smaller atom symbol on the chest/left shoulder area. The torso armor is puffy and segmented with cyan circuit-like accents, small luminous panels, scuffs, scratches, and the glowing chest text {argument name="chest text" default="DL"}. In the character’s left hand, show exactly 5 stacked translucent glowing cyan crystalline data sheets or code pages fanned together; in the right hand, show exactly 1 open miniature laptop angled toward the viewer, with a cyan-on-black screen filled with tiny unreadable code lines. Use a centered composition, cute proportions with a large head and short limbs, dramatic icy blue highlights, detailed snow/ice texture on the ground, and a premium mascot-avatar look suitable for a developer profile picture. Customize the avatar as {argument name="avatar theme" default="ice codex robot"}, with {argument name="primary color" default="deep navy blue"} armor and {argument name="glow color" default="cyan blue"} lighting.

content:
A stylized 3D character based on a fixed meme template.

PRIORITY ORDER:
1. Exact spherical body shape (MOST IMPORTANT)
2. Identity resemblance
3. Visual polish

BASE MODEL (ABSOLUTELY LOCKED):

- A PERFECT sphere body (no deformation at all)
- No torso, no waist, no flattening
- The silhouette must always read as: "a ball with thin arms and legs"
- Thin, simple arms and legs attached directly to the sphere
- Neutral standing pose, arms relaxed

- The body must look identical across all outputs
- This is the same reused 3D model every time

If the character looks humanoid instead of spherical, it is incorrect.

---

IDENTITY MAPPING:

Map the provided character onto this spherical body:

- Place facial features directly on the sphere
- Preserve:
- eye shape, size, spacing, expression
- eyebrows and attitude
- simple mouth if needed

- Add key identity elements:
- hair (wrapped around the sphere)
- hat (must sit naturally on top of the sphere)
- accessories (glasses, etc.)
- colors and patterns

- The character must be recognizable at a glance

- This is NOT a redesign:
→ it should look like the same character forced into this body

---

CLOTHING MAPPING (CRITICAL):

- The body MUST remain a perfect sphere
- Clothing must NOT change the body shape

- Clothes are applied as a surface layer on the sphere
- Think: painted, printed, or lightly embossed onto the sphere

---

STYLE:

- Smooth matte plastic material
- Clean, minimal geometry
- Toy-like Pixar / vinyl figure style
- Soft reflections

---

SCENE:

{argument name="background" default="A cozy child’s bedroom"}:
- Wooden floor
- Bed with striped blanket
- Children’s drawings on the wall
- Warm ambient lighting
- Soft depth of field

---

RENDER:

- High-quality 3D render (Blender / Octane style)
- Cinematic lighting
- Global illumination
- 50mm lens
- Sharp focus on character
- Soft shadows
- 4K resolution

---

FINAL INTENT:

The result should look like a meme:
the exact same spherical Mike Wazowski-style body every time,
with different characters awkwardly and humorously mapped onto it.

Everything must conform to the spherical body.
Nothing can override the sphere.
title: Spherical Character Meme Template
description: A creative prompt that forces any input character into a perfectly spherical 3D body, mimicking popular meme aesthetics with Pixar-like rendering.

content:
An adult fantasy female character, close-up bust composition, with silver-white extra-long fluffy hair, strands are light and flowing, rich in layers, with a soft luster and silky texture, spreading naturally in the air to form elegant flowing curves. 

Her face is exquisite and ethereal, with delicate and three-dimensional features, fair and transparent skin, a delicate nose, soft and natural lips, and a quiet and mysterious expression, possessing a goddess-like and elven temperament. 

The collarbone lines are distinct, the shoulder and neck area is more stretched and elegant, the upper chest contour is moderately visible, and the clothing opening and fit are optimized to make the visible range of the chest and collarbone more natural and beautiful, sexy but not overly revealing. 

The character's eyes are a clear and charming {argument name="eye color" default="brown"}, with delicate highlights and dreamlike eyelashes, decorated with faint sparkling particles and exquisite makeup around the eyes. 

The character is surrounded by a magnificent fantasy divine bird, similar to a phoenix, with long and stretched wings and light, transparent feathers. The overall color scheme is dominated by {argument name="color theme" default="blue, ice blue, light blue, and silver-white"}, supplemented by a small amount of delicate metallic edges, making the bird appear holy, dreamlike, and elegant. 

The background is a deep night sky and starlit space, with small stars, glowing particles, and a hazy cosmic feel, creating a dreamlike and mysterious atmosphere. The overall color of the picture is unified into a blue and silver-white theme, emphasizing the level changes between ice blue, lake blue, light blue, and silver-white, creating a pure, cold, gorgeous, and ethereal visual experience. 

The overall style is high-quality 3D CG illustration. Characters, feathers, and the divine bird all have a clear sense of volume, material, and fine rendering effects, combining aesthetic fantasy with commercial-grade visual quality. The lighting uses cinematic soft light and edge contour light, skin is delicate and transparent, hair is distinct, and feathers have a semi-transparent glowing effect. Aspect ratio 9:16.
title: Fantasy Ice Phoenix Goddess Illustration
description: A high-detail 3D CG illustration of a mystical silver-haired goddess accompanied by a glowing blue ice phoenix in a starry void.

The composition has two human depictions: one huge close-up head and wild topknot hair filling the upper half, with the face covered by a large flat opaque brown square censor block, and one full-body warrior standing heroically in the lower center on a stone pedestal, also with a small opaque brown square censor block over the face. The warrior wears layered samurai-inspired black and deep blue armor with ornate gold trim, a flowing tattered blue cloak and ribbons, long windblown hair, and holds a glowing katana angled downward to the left; swirling golden wind trails, sparks, and calligraphic energy ribbons wrap around his body and hair. Behind him is a dense battlefield of shadowy soldiers, banners, spear silhouettes, ruined towers, and a storm of dust and light, all framed by expressive black brush strokes and parchment-like texture. Include exactly five visible text groups: left vertical Chinese quote {argument name="quote text" default="死亡如风，常伴吾身。"} with a small League-style emblem beneath it; right vertical Chinese subtitle {argument name="right subtitle" default="疾风剑豪"}; large gold Chinese name {argument name="Chinese name text" default="亚索"} on the right with small vertical Roman letters “YASUO” beside it; bottom large spaced serif title “YASUO”; and beneath it two small centered lines, “THE UNFORGIVEN” and “LEAGUE OF LEGENDS”. content: Create a polished anime-style personification of {argument name="AI character name" default="ChatGPT"} as a gentle young female AI companion in a warm sunlit study. She has short silvery-white bobbed hair with soft waves, small braids, teal gradient tips, and teal OpenAI-knot hair ornaments with ribbons; her face is covered by a centered plain beige square censor block. She wears an elegant white academic robe with wide sleeves lined in teal, black inner dress or vest, teal tie, gold trim, small tech-like pins, and a teal ribbon emblem on one sleeve. She sits at a wooden desk, holding a dark book against her chest with the words “Knowledge Understanding Inspiration” and a small OpenAI-style knot symbol on the cover, while her other hand is raised as if presenting a hologram. To her left floats one translucent cyan chat bubble labeled “ChatGPT” with the text “Your AI companion. Here to help, inspire, and understand.” plus a small heart, and three smaller glowing square icons around it: one light bulb icon, one magnifying glass icon, and one chat message icon. On the desk include exactly eight visible study objects: a dark mug with an OpenAI-style knot logo and the word “ChatGPT,” a stack of four labeled books reading “Science,” “History,” “Art,” and “Philosophy,” one teal pen, one open notebook, one black book held by the character, and one small white robot mascot with teal glowing eyes and an OpenAI-style logo. The open notebook has two pages: the left page titled “Ideas” with notes “Conversations,” “Possibilities,” and “Infinite,” and the right page titled “Today’s Plan” with checklist items “Help someone,” “Spark ideas,” and “Make a difference,” with small doodles and hearts. In the background, show a cozy library with bookshelves, potted plants, sunlight streaming through a window, and a dark chalkboard. The chalkboard displays an OpenAI-style knot symbol and the phrase “Together, we can:” followed by exactly five bullet points: “Learn,” “Create,” “Solve,” “Explore,” and “and more!” plus little star doodles and a cat face doodle. Use a soft painterly anime illustration style, luminous rim lighting, teal and cream color palette, delicate highlights, high detail, shallow depth of field, cozy optimistic atmosphere, vertical composition.
title: Anime ChatGPT Companion in Study
description: Generates a cozy anime personification of ChatGPT as an AI companion in a sunlit library study with holograms, books, notes, and mascot details.

content: A retro-futurist black-and-white sci-fi newspaper front page designed like a casualty report bulletin, with a distressed paper texture, halftone grain, thin technical border lines, and a slightly worn photocopied print look. The layout is a single printed page in landscape orientation with a bold masthead tab at the top reading {argument name="section label" default="CASUALTY DESK"}. On the left third of the page, a huge condensed all-caps headline in heavy sans-serif type reads {argument name="headline text" default="TWENTY-FIVE HULLS LOST AS THREE GARRISONS HOLD THEIR LINES"}, stacked across 5 lines. Beneath it are 2 dense newspaper-style body text blocks in narrow columns of small monospaced or typewriter-like text, with a few bolded ship and faction names embedded in the copy. The article text should feel like military logistics reporting from an interstellar war, mentioning exact times, sectors, casualties, garrisons, probes, toll positions, and damaged ships. The right two-thirds of the page is a detailed monochrome ink illustration: in the upper right sky, 1 enormous wedge-shaped capital ship or dreadnought hovers diagonally from left-lower side toward right-upper side, covered in layered armor panels, antennae, gantries, and dense structural detailing. Below it, occupying the lower right half, is 1 industrial checkpoint or garrison gate spanning a wide road or landing lane, built from brutalist sci-fi frames, vertical pylons, gantry towers, and utility structures, with perspective lines drawing the eye toward the center distance. Add 1 small mid-distance flying craft near the horizon under the gate. In the far right background, include 1 cluster of tall refinery-like towers and industrial buildings. Overlay faint hexagonal grid motifs on the upper right and lower right background, subtle and partially faded into the paper texture. Use only grayscale tones, black ink linework, etched concept-art hatching, and newspaper-print contrast. The overall mood is bleak, militarized, archival, and editorial, like a war correspondent page from a far-future space empire newspaper.
title: Retro Sci-Fi Casualty Desk Front Page
description: This generates a monochrome futuristic war-news front page with a bold casualty headline and detailed starship-industrial illustration, ideal for worldbuilding editorials or sci-fi propaganda design.

content: A stylized 3D low-poly cartoon scene of a skinny disheveled young man slouching in a plush blue armchair in a wood-paneled room, viewed in a medium-wide shot from slightly below table height. He has messy dark brown dreadlock-like hair, pale skin, droopy half-lidded eyes, and a huge open mouth showing uneven white teeth, with an exaggerated goofy expression. His pose is loose and lazy: one leg stretched far out and resting on the coffee table, the other bent up on the chair, one hand holding a small smoking item near his face with a tiny red ember, the other hand holding a gray remote control. He wears a {argument name="shirt color" default="royal blue"} T-shirt, {argument name="shorts color" default="mustard yellow"} shorts, long white socks, and oversized red slide sandals. In front of him is a rectangular wooden coffee table with 3 clearly visible items on top: a pile of bright green buds at the center front, 1 folded white paper beside the pile, and 1 round gray ashtray with dark ash near the right side. The room is simple and warm-toned with vertical wooden wall panels, a dark wood floor, soft indoor lighting, and a small cropped section of framed wall decor in the upper right corner. The overall look is humorous, rough-edged, and handcrafted, like an indie animated sitcom made from painted paper-cutout or low-poly clay textures, with muted shadows, slightly worn surfaces, and a casual stoner-lounge vibe.

The left girl has {argument name="hair color" default="cream blonde"} short bobbed hair with a huge pink bow, oversized round pastel headphones, tiny blush cheeks, and simple oval dark eyes. The right girl has {argument name="second hair color" default="soft peach"} short hair with a side tuft and a small ribbon-like shape, matching oversized pastel headphones, blush cheeks, and the same minimal chibi facial features. Both characters lean their hands on top of the camera as if peeking over it, with calm, slightly curious expressions. The camera is large, detailed, and whimsical, in powder blue with pink and cream accents, featuring one big central lens and two smaller circular side lenses for a toy-like, mechanical look. Behind them is a dark navy semicircular backdrop filled with floating white and pastel music notes. Surrounding the entire scene are many interlocking gears, dials, rings, dots, and small decorative shapes, all arranged symmetrically like a music box or clockwork halo. Use a soft cream background and a limited palette of pastel cyan, baby blue, blush pink, peach, ivory, and navy. The linework should be clean and rounded, with a flat graphic anime style, gentle shading, subtle texture, and a dreamy retro-futurist kawaii mood. content:
Ultra-realistic cinematic concert performance, high energy, bold charisma, dominant duo presence, like top-tier global pop idol stage. Hard-hitting, sharp, synchronized but with attitude contrast (male = strong/grounded, female = sharp/sassy).
👥 SUBJECT (DUO)
Male dancer:
Western male, short styled dark brown hair, sharp jawline, subtle stubble, fitted sleeveless black performance top or asymmetrical streetwear hoodie, black cargo pants with neon accents, muscular arms, strong & grounded energy, calm dominance.
Female dancer:
Western female, curly blonde hair (voluminous, bouncing curls), high ponytail or half-up style, black & metallic pink techwear jacket, fitted cargo pants, confident, fierce, expressive, pop-diva attitude (like a high-fashion stage performer), sharp and charismatic presence.
Chemistry:
Power duo, slightly competitive vibe, teasing interaction, stage dominance, electric chemistry without romance softness.
🎤 STAGE DESIGN
Dark concert stage, glossy reflective floor
LED wall: red/pink glitch visuals + pulsing cyber graphics
Lighting:
red spotlight (female focus)
white/blue spotlight (male focus)
strobe flashes on beat drops
Atmosphere: fog + light haze
Backup dancers: 2–4 silhouettes (optional, low focus)
⏱️ TIMELINE (10 DETIK – HARD & POWERFUL)
0–1s
Black → beat drop
Silhouette duo back-to-back
Flash reveal, low-angle cinematic push-in
1–2s
Step touch right (sync)
→ male heavy grounded groove, female sharp lighter hit
Direct eye contact to camera (dominant)
2–3s
Step touch left → chest pop (HARD synchronized hit)
Lighting flash per impact
Female adds slight confident head tilt + curl bounce
3–4s
Arm wave (mirror style):
male right → left
female left → right
Camera orbit half circle
4–5s
Point & slide toward each other
→ almost collide → freeze tension moment 🔥
5–6s
Hip roll contrast:
female smooth & expressive
male controlled & grounded
→ cross arms then open (BIG synchronized hit)
6–7s
Attitude exchange: head turn + hand gesture
→ male cold focused stare
→ female smirks, diva confidence
7–8s
Side slide opposite directions
→ fast shoulder pops alternating
Quick cuts + micro zoom impact
8–9s
Body roll sync (different styling)
→ large commanding arm circle overhead
Backlight sweep across stage
9–10s
Final chest hit → FREEZE
Both point forward at camera
FINAL POSE:
male slightly behind, grounded stance
female front, chin up, confident smirk
Spotlight lock, background dark
🎥 CAMERA STYLE
Low angle dominance shots
Fast punch-in zoom on beat drops
Orbit shots for duo dynamics
Quick cinematic MV cuts
Slight handheld shake for impact realism
⚡ ENERGY DIRECTION
Not cute — POWER COUPLE stage dominance
Female: sassy, sharp, confident diva energy
Male: calm, strong, controlled presence
Interaction: teasing + competitive tension
✨ DETAIL TAMBAHAN
Curly blonde hair bounce physics
Sweat glow realism under stage lights
Fabric movement (techwear + cargo flow)
Floor reflection
title: Cinematic Duo Concert Performance
description: A complex cinematic prompt for a high-energy pop idol stage performance featuring detailed choreography and lighting transitions.

content: An ultra-detailed cinematic isometric street-level view of a dense nostalgic Japanese canal-side neighborhood at blue hour, designed like a miniature lived-in urban diorama. The scene is packed with tightly clustered multi-story buildings of varied shapes and ages, with weathered concrete, faded painted walls, patched metal roofs, tiled roofs, small balconies, rooftop tanks, antennas, pipes, exposed wiring, hanging laundry, window air conditioners, satellite dishes, potted plants, vines, and warm glowing interior lights in nearly every window. At the center, place a charming teal-blue shop house with a dark blue tiled roof, rounded windows, exterior stairs, a tiny awning, and a bright retro sign reading {argument name="shop sign text" default="トリナオ"}. Surround it with many neighboring storefronts and residences stacked irregularly at different heights, creating a layered maze of alleys, staircases, landings, bridges, and utility poles. Include exactly 2 vending machines near the lower center-right area, exactly 2 bicycles along the canal-side walkway, exactly 1 satellite dish on an upper roof near the center, exactly 1 large round wall clock mounted on a cylindrical corner building on the right, and exactly 1 canal in the foreground with dark reflective water and a curved concrete embankment. Add numerous vertical Japanese shop signs and lit billboards throughout the composition, including signs resembling {argument name="main vertical sign" default="久保田"}, {argument name="green shop sign" default="山城商店"}, and other retro neighborhood business signage. The architecture should feel hand-crafted, eclectic, slightly whimsical, and deeply lived in, with dense environmental storytelling and no empty space. Lighting is soft dusk light mixed with warm amber practical lights from windows, lanterns, and signs, creating a cozy yet bustling mood. Color palette: teal, muted red, worn cream, mossy green, rust, indigo, and warm tungsten yellow. Style: hyper-detailed photoreal miniature cityscape, cinematic depth, crisp textures, subtle atmospheric haze, high dynamic range, Japanese Showa-era inspired urban nostalgia, richly layered composition, no visible people, wide landscape framing.
title: Miniature Japanese Canal Town at Dusk

content: A cinematic first-person visual novel game interface showing a warm morning breakfast scene in a shared apartment dining room, photographed with a slightly wide-angle lens and shallow depth of field. Two young women sit across a wooden table in soft golden sunlight pouring through large sheer-curtained windows on the left. The woman on the left has messy tied-up hair, a gray tank top, and a loose cardigan slipping off one shoulder, leaning back casually with one arm behind her head. The woman on the right has long dark hair and wears an oversized cream knit sweater, resting her face in her hands and leaning toward the table. Their faces are obscured by soft rectangular blur blocks. On the table are 2 breakfast plates clearly visible: one plate in front of the left woman with pasta or salad-like food, and one large plate in front of the right woman with several slices of toast; there is also a second breakfast dish near the right side with 2 fried eggs. Include 2 mugs, 1 small glass, a clipboard with papers and a pen in the lower left foreground, a small black camera near the bottom center-right, and a vase with white flowers in the lower right foreground. The room feels cozy and lived-in, with wood furniture, a doorway in the back center, kitchen shelving and chairs in the background, and sunlit reflections across the floor and tabletop. Add a polished Chinese interactive story game HUD overlay. Top left: a dark rounded title pill with a home icon and the text "环景心动计划", plus a smaller pill reading "第一章", followed by the scene title "合租公寓的早晨" and a smaller location label "餐厅". Left side vertical stats panel with exactly 5 stacked buttons showing: "路线 未锁定", "事业 32", "真诚 38", "压力 38", "信任均值 30". Top right: exactly 4 compact rounded buttons labeled "关系", "回忆", "存档", "设置". Near the center-bottom over the table, add a small floating location tag reading "天文馆景想". Along the bottom, place a dark translucent dialogue box with a speaker name label "旁白" and the text "第二天早晨，你在餐桌中央醒来般坐下。水果、咖啡、合同、舞鞋、手柄和景程围成一圈。" with a small next-arrow button on the right. Overall style: realistic cinematic game screenshot, intimate domestic atmosphere, soft bloom, muted beige and brown palette, premium narrative app UI, immersive and emotionally suggestive.
title: Cinematic Shared Apartment Breakfast UI
description: A realistic story-game scene of two women having breakfast in a sunlit apartment, designed for visual novel or interactive narrative interface concepts.

content: A colorful anime-style spot-the-difference puzzle made as a side-by-side split image with 2 nearly identical panels separated by a vertical white divider. The scene shows a cozy indoor birthday or party celebration viewed from a slightly elevated angle, with 4 young people grouped closely together in the foreground for a candid photo. Three faces are intentionally blurred with soft rectangular censor blocks, while 1 face remains visible: a cheerful red-haired youth with messy medium-length hair, closed smiling eyes, and a wide grin, standing near the upper right of the group. In the front left, a slim black-haired girl with very long straight hair, pale skin, and large purple-gray anime eyes wears a fitted white long-sleeve top and black pants, leaning inward and pointing playfully toward the girl on the right. Behind her on the left stands another black-haired girl with a high ponytail tied with a mint-green scrunchie, wearing a light top and skirt; one sneaker peeks out at the lower left. In the center is a shorter dark-haired person in a cream cable-knit sweater and gray skirt. On the right is a black-haired girl with twin braids, a cream blouse with ruffled cuffs, and a navy pleated skirt, with the red-haired character’s hand resting on her shoulder. The background is packed with party decorations: many pastel balloons hanging overhead, twisted streamers, colorful confetti floating and scattered, warm string lights with glowing bulbs, a food and drink table covered with a white cloth, plates of snacks, bottles, glasses, and wrapped gift boxes on the floor at the right. The right panel includes exactly 6 red-circled differences highlighted for the puzzle solution: 1 circled missing or altered purple balloon near the top edge, 1 circled changed bottle or glass on the back table, 1 circled pair of round glasses added to the ponytailed girl’s face, 1 circled small red mark or hair accessory near the center figure’s right side, 1 circled missing or altered earring/ear detail on the braided girl at the lower right, and 1 circled changed green sneaker at the bottom left. Soft polished anime rendering, warm festive palette, clean line art, detailed clothing folds, lively celebratory mood, designed like a social-media spot-the-difference comparison image.
title: Anime Party Spot the Difference
description: A side-by-side anime party illustration designed as a spot-the-difference puzzle, ideal for social posts, visual quizzes, and playful AI image experiments.

content: A grand, cinematic interior of a traditional Japanese temple or palace hall built almost entirely of dark aged wood, viewed from a slightly elevated centered perspective with perfect near-symmetry. The scene features a broad polished wooden walkway in the foreground leading straight toward a raised central dais and an inner shrine-like alcove at the back. On both the left and right sides of the walkway are shallow indoor reflecting pools filled with dark blue-green water, scattered natural rocks, patches of moss, and subtle ripples catching warm light. The architecture is intricate and stately: thick timber pillars, carved beams, railings, tatami-floored side rooms, sliding shoji screens, painted fusuma panels with delicate nature motifs, and hanging lanterns. At the rear center, above the alcove, a large wooden signboard displays bold Japanese calligraphy reading {argument name="calligraphy text" default="方丈"}. The back wall includes a central painted screen or mural in muted sepia tones, with additional painted panels in the side chambers. Lighting is low, warm, and dramatic, with soft amber lantern glow and shafts of natural light creating reflections on the water and long shadows across the wood floor. The mood is serene, sacred, contemplative, and slightly mysterious, with ultra-detailed textures, realistic materials, cinematic depth, and a high-end photorealistic style.
title: Cinematic Japanese Temple Hall
description: A photorealistic prompt for generating a serene traditional Japanese interior with indoor pools, wooden walkways, and dramatic atmospheric lighting.

content: A cinematic high-fantasy environment scene of an ancient sacred forest sanctuary viewed from a slightly elevated wide angle. In the center is a circular stone platform rising from a vivid turquoise-blue spring, with a tall weathered golden stone statue or shrine monument standing on a pedestal. Four narrow stone bridges extend from the circle in a cross formation, with the front bridge leading toward the viewer and the left and right bridges curving gently over the water; the rear path continues straight through the forest toward a steep staircase. Surrounding the pool are gigantic redwood-like trees with massive trunks, dense moss, tangled roots, ferns, vines, rocks, and deep green undergrowth. The water is crystal clear, dark teal to sapphire, with 2 visible clusters of lily pads floating near the lower left and lower right areas. In the distant background at the top center, place 2 small symmetrical shrine buildings flanking the stone staircase, partially hidden by foliage. In the lower foreground corners, include 2 old wooden temple rooftops, one at bottom left and one at bottom right, both partly obscured by shadow and vegetation. Strong sunbeams stream diagonally from the upper right through mist and canopy gaps, creating god rays across the trees, bridge, and water. The mood is mystical, ancient, tranquil, and slightly forgotten, with rich cinematic contrast, ultra-detailed textures, moss-covered stone, subtle ruin decay, realistic natural lighting, epic fantasy concept art, photorealistic matte painting quality, no people.
title: Ancient Forest Shrine Over Blue Spring
description: This generates a cinematic fantasy sanctuary hidden in a giant forest, ideal for concept art, matte painting, or atmospheric worldbuilding scenes.

A character promotional poster titled “{argument name="title" default="INPUT NAME"}”, designed in a cinematic vertical key visual composition (9:16). The upper half features a large, softly glowing silhouette of an {argument name="subject" default="anime girl"}’s face formed from flowing wind and cherry blossom particles. The silhouette feels dreamy, delicate, and slightly transparent.
The lower section shows the full-body character standing gently in a calm pose, wearing an {argument name="clothing" default="elegant modern kimono-inspired outfit"} with light fabric movement.
Inside the silhouette, use double-exposure storytelling: floating cherry blossoms, memory fragments, soft sky gradients, emotional close-up moments, and subtle nature elements blended into watercolor mist.
Left side contains warm pink tones and floral energy, while right side has cool sky blues for balance. A thin glowing breeze line connects top silhouette to the character below.
Edges are soft, painterly, and fade into white negative space with an ethereal anime aesthetic.

content:
[Desired Output]
World-building Setting Materials + Original Anime Character Setting Materials
*Please visualize not only the character but also the environment, culture, systems, technology, and sense of daily life of the world in which the character lives.

[Worldview Seed]
Enter here

[Number of Proposals]
Enter here
*E.g., only 1 proposal / wish to compare multiple proposals, etc.

[Number of Characters]
Enter here

[Roles/Occupations]
Enter here

[Setting/Environment]
Enter here
*If details are sparse, design new parameters for climate, terrain, resources, dangers, transportation, and housing styles based on the input keywords.

[Society/Systems]
Enter here
*Design community rules, division of labor, status markers, affiliation marks, exchange methods, and rituals that fit the input.

[Technology/Faith/Taboos]
Enter here
*Derive material processing, recording methods, communication, prayers, taboos, festivals, and body decorations naturally from the input content.

[Lifestyle/Culture]
Enter here
*Housing, diet, transportation, work tools, clothing styles, meaning of ornaments, seasonal events, currency, script, emblems, etc.

[Overall Atmosphere]
Enter here

[Characteristics of the World]
Enter here

[Key Priorities]
Enter here

[Finish Direction]
Enter here
*E.g., emphasize realism/life-like feel, emphasize mysticism, emphasize practical utility of costumes, focus more on architecture, target bright children's content, etc.

[Differentiation Instructions]
Enter here

[Drawing Tone]
Smooth line art, flat anime coloring, minimal cel shading, single-level shadows, no gradients, no thick painting, no realistic texture expressions, no strong light/shadow effects, flat look optimized for animation.

[Anime Conversion Instructions]
While maintaining the structure, motifs, color scheme, roles, and cultural meanings of the original design, simplify the drawing for production animation. Use flat anime coloring and keep shadows to one level. Treat translucent materials or thin fabrics as simplified surfaces in a cel-shaded style rather than realistic textures.

Based on the input above, create an image in the style of "World-building Setting Materials + Character Setting Materials" for an original anime.

Purpose:
To visually communicate the world itself in which the character lives, rather than just the character alone. Create setting materials where the world's environment, culture, lifestyle tools, architecture, transportation, and the origins of clothing appear as a unified whole.

Most Important:
First, extract a "visual rule" unique to that world from the input content. Reflect that visual rule in everything: backgrounds, architecture, tools, costumes, color schemes, materials, emblems, and the overall page layout.

Desired Finish:
- Clothing, tools, and housing should look like things actually used by people living in this world.
- Characters, backgrounds, tools, text, and material samples should appear to belong to the same cultural sphere.
- Convey unique environments, resources, and lifestyle habits born from the worldview seed.
- Shapes should arise from necessity in daily life rather than existing genre tropes.
- Feature a unique shape language, color palette, and material feel recognizable at a glance.

Thought Process:
1. Determine the world's "Environment" from input (climate, terrain, light, seasons, dangers, resource distribution).
2. Determine "Lifestyle" from environment (housing, food, work, transport, storage, exchange, recording, celebrations).
3. Determine "Clothing and Tools" from lifestyle (fastening, layering, carrying, protection, showing status/role).
4. Determine "Character Appearance" from clothing/tools (focus on outfits, equipment, materials, colors, and silhouettes rather than just face/hair).
5. Determine "Page Design" from visual rules (reflect recording media, patterns, white space, and diagram styles of that world).

Diversity Enhancement:
Invent a new cultural sphere for each input. If multiple proposals are requested, ensure each has a distinct principle of living, material logic, and aesthetic.

For each proposal, significantly vary:
- Terrain and climate appearance
- Architecture and cityscape shapes
- Primary materials
- Meaning of colors
- Costume silhouettes
- How tools are held, stored, and carried
- Creation of symbols, scripts, patterns, and emblems
- Format of the page layout

Ideation Candidates (not fixed themes, but materials for inspiration):
Environment: Arid lands, cold regions, highlands, wetlands, volcanic ash zones, mirror lakes, misty valleys, high-wind zones, polar night, low gravity, floating strata, glowing mineral caves, etc.
Materials: Paper, bone, ceramics, leather, resin, glass, shell, bamboo, straw, crystals, recycled fabrics, lacquer, ash, feathers, amber, etc.
Culture: Oral traditions, mask culture, scent-based ID, knot-script, shadow puppet records, seasonal migration, silence rituals, dance contracts, etc.
Structure: Folding, wrapping, weaving, hanging, inserting, tying, layering, sealing, engraving, bundling, inflating, etc.

Mandatory Elements:
1. Worldview Board (symbolic landscape, cityscape, lifestyle tools, emblems, color rules, shape language).
2. Character Setting Materials (full-body standing pose, role-conveying outfits, detail diagrams for equipment/back view/belongings).
3. World-Character Connection (ensure clothes/gear logic stems from the world's tech/faith/environment).
4. Page Design (layout varies with worldview, using appropriate diagram methods and minimal labels/symbols).

Quality Standards:
- Not generic fantasy; the world's origins must be visible.
- Cohesive culture across characters and backgrounds.
- Decorations must have lifestyle, faith, or functional meanings.
- Visual differentiation between multiple world proposals.

Visual Presentation:
- High resolution, anime style, delicate line art, clean cel painting.
- Mixed layout of world boards + full-body character + tool details.
- Minimal text, prioritizing visual concept art sheets.

Final Goal:
Ensure a design where the world's establishment, resident life, material constraints, cultural meanings, and community rules are palpable. Create a unified sense where backgrounds and characters are instantly recognizable as belonging to the same unique world.

description: A highly detailed template for creating comprehensive setting materials for original anime worlds, including character designs, cultural backgrounds, and environmental visual rules.

content: A colossal {argument name="subject type" default="machine angel girl"} hovering above a dense futuristic megacity at night, viewed from a dramatic low angle so she dominates the skyline like a divine apparition. She has a sleek feminine humanoid body made of white, silver, and graphite biomechanical armor with exposed segmented joints, intricate filigree machinery, and glowing cyan energy lines embedded through the torso, hips, thighs, knees, and chest. Her face is smooth and mostly featureless like a blank mask, partially shadowed, with a luminous cyan visor across the eyes and a delicate metallic halo-crown or antennaed headpiece. She has exactly 2 enormous outstretched wings, each composed of layered metallic feathers in black, gray, and silver, with exactly 1 glowing circular cyan techno-emblem embedded near the center of each wing, for a total of 2 wing emblems. Her pose is calm, solemn, and godlike, arms relaxed at her sides, legs extended downward as if descending in silence. Surround her with heavy rain, mist, floating particles, and dramatic storm clouds split by bright celestial light behind her, creating a sacred cyberpunk atmosphere. Below her is a sprawling vertical city of dark skyscrapers packed with thousands of tiny window lights, haze, steam, and wet reflective surfaces. Include exactly 4 visible flying vehicles or drones scattered through the midair cityspace. Add illuminated billboards and neon signage with East Asian urban-future styling, including one large red vertical sign on the left reading "警戒" with small English text "ALERT", one smaller red sign reading "緊急警報", one huge right-side billboard reading "天使, 降臨。", and exactly 2 billboards that depict the same angelic machine figure. Color palette: cold steel gray, midnight blue, black, white, and electric cyan, with sparse red neon accents. Style: ultra-detailed cinematic sci-fi illustration, dystopian cyberpunk-meets-biblical angel imagery, painterly yet crisp, dense atmospheric effects, epic scale, high contrast, rain-soaked, awe-inspiring, haunting, and majestic.

content: A full-body anime character design of a dreamy celestial ice princess standing centered against a clean white background with faint glowing cyan swirls and sparkles. She has very long, flowing {argument name="hair color" default="icy gradient blue"} hair that reaches past her knees, with soft volume, glossy strands, a braided side section, and star-shaped hair ornaments. Add a delicate silver crescent-moon headpiece above her head, plus tiny dangling star accessories near the ears. Her face is mostly soft and pretty in shoujo style, but keep it simple and elegant. She wears a short fantasy dress in {argument name="dress color" default="light sky blue and white"}, with a fitted bodice, sweetheart neckline, translucent puff sleeves, lace trim, tiny floral accents at the sleeves, and a sparkling star-shaped ornament at the chest with hanging jewel chains. Around her neck is a moon-and-star choker necklace. The skirt has 2 layers: a short front skirt and a long high-low overskirt draping down on both sides and back. Decorate the dress with celestial motifs including 3 crescent moons on the hem of the short skirt, 1 large central starburst motif, white filigree patterns, glitter, and tiny star-like lights throughout. Add small dangling charms under the skirt hem and overskirt, including stars and teardrop crystals. She wears white thigh-high stockings, with 3 visible star decorations on the upper thigh area of one stocking, and glossy blue high heels with ankle straps, bows, and star ornaments on the toes. Pose her front-facing with one leg slightly forward, arms relaxed naturally, and hair spreading outward in elegant flowing curves. Surround her with 4 larger glowing star sparkles and 2 small snowflake-like motifs. The image should feel ethereal, refined, luminous, pastel, magical-girl inspired, ultra-clean, highly polished, and delicately detailed, with soft gradients, crisp line art, subtle glitter effects, and a premium character-sheet illustration aesthetic.
