content: Create a lavish vertical anime character collector poster in a premium magazine-cover and merchandise-catalog style, centered on {argument name="character name" default="Yae Miko"}, a beautiful adult shrine maiden with very long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="pink"} hair, violet eyes, and a confident flirtatious expression, seated elegantly on a dark lacquered shrine chest with gold tassels and floral ornamentation. She wears an elaborate sheer sakura-themed ceremonial outfit in layered translucent pink and white fabric, with floral embroidery, ribbons, jeweled accessories, gold details, detached sleeves, a delicate veil, ornate earrings, and strappy high heels, showing a glamorous fashion-illustration silhouette with one leg crossed and one hand near her lips. Surround the whole composition with cherry blossoms, petals, decorative borders, gold filigree, and soft pastel pink lighting. The page should look like a special edition fan collectible poster with many integrated design elements and readable labels. At the top, place giant decorative serif typography reading “YAE MIKO” across the background, plus a small upper-left label “Generalpost • ETERNAL SAKURA” and an upper-right plaque reading “Lady Guuji OF THE GRAND NARUKAMI SHRINE”. On the right side near the character, add one vertical Japanese text line. Include a left-side stamp sheet titled “CHIBI STAMP COLLECTION” containing exactly 6 stamp-style chibi portraits arranged in a 2x3 grid, all of the same character in different cute expressions or poses. Below that, include a section titled “Mini Figure Collection” with exactly 3 small chibi figure variants standing side by side. Below that, include a “Stickers” section with exactly 5 die-cut stickers: 4 chibi character stickers and 1 fox mask sticker. On the right lower side, add a hanging “Character Profile” card with the labels “Birthday”, “Affiliation”, “Vision”, and “Constellation”, plus a short quote line at the bottom. At the bottom edge, include exactly 4 ticket or stamp-like bonus items: 1 round emblem with a fox symbol, 1 commemorative sakura festival ticket, 1 Narukami Shrine special pass, and 1 postage-style stamp marked with the date 27 APR 2024 and a fox motif. Add a limited-edition serial tag on the lower left reading “NO. 08888 / 10000”. Place a detailed white fox mask with red markings and floral decoration in the lower-right foreground. Overall style: ultra-detailed anime illustration, polished gacha-merchandise advertisement design, elegant sakura fantasy aesthetic, pink and rose-gold palette, layered print textures, crisp line art, luxurious shading, high detail, collectible premium poster composition.
title: Luxury Sakura Yae Miko Collector Poster
description: A richly detailed anime merchandise-style poster featuring a glamorous pink-haired shrine maiden surrounded by collectible stamps, stickers, profile cards, and sakura-themed decorative layout elements.

content: A richly detailed classic JRPG-style isometric town scene inspired by late-1990s fantasy role-playing games, shown from a high three-quarter top-down angle like a pre-rendered game background with hand-painted textures and small sprite-like characters. In the center of a sunlit stone plaza, 2 young adventurer characters stand facing each other in conversation: a spiky red-haired teenage boy wearing a blue tunic, orange scarf, brown gloves, and sturdy boots, and a blonde teenage girl with a high ponytail wearing a pale mint-green dress with a white short-sleeved top and brown shoes. Surround them with weathered cobblestone paving, soft midday light, and long dramatic shadows cast across the square. At the upper center, place an ornate stone bell arch with 2 carved columns, floral vines climbing the pillars, and a hanging bronze bell above a neatly trimmed rectangular grass bed dotted with tiny yellow flowers. At the upper left, include a purple-canopied stall or tent entrance with a patterned rug and 1 small chibi-style NPC vendor standing inside, wearing green clothes and an orange vest. Frame the lower half with elegant white stone railings, 2 recessed flower alcoves filled with red blossoms, and multiple staircases descending out of the plaza. Add 4 visible red banners with gold emblems attached to silver flagpoles, 2 on the left side and 2 on the right side, fluttering diagonally. The architecture should feel medieval-fantasy but clean and charming, with highly detailed masonry, vibrant foliage, nostalgic console-era adventure game atmosphere, polished remastered sprite art, and no user interface or text.
title: Isometric JRPG Town Plaza Scene
description: This prompt generates a nostalgic isometric fantasy RPG town square with two central characters, suitable for retro game art, storytelling scenes, or environment concept images.

content: A third-person gameplay screenshot styled exactly like an early-2000s open-world crime game, showing a small white and burgundy seaplane flying low over a tropical coastal city. The camera is positioned directly behind the aircraft, centered on its tail, with the plane heading toward a cluster of mid-rise buildings near the waterfront. The city below has flat-roofed buildings, palm-lined streets, canals, and bright turquoise water, with a hazy blue sky and light atmospheric fog that softens the distance. A tall striped office tower stands near the center background, and a glowing pink checkpoint ring floats in front of the buildings. On the right side, a curving shoreline and canal are lined with dense palm trees. Add a retro video game HUD in the top-right corner with the time reading 13:27, green money text reading 500045605, two lines of white health and armor values both reading 100, a row of 6 wanted stars with 2 lit and 4 unlit, a small weapon icon in a rounded square, and ammo text reading 2076-30. Beneath that, display the mission text “SKIMMER FUEL!” with a small horizontal blue progress bar. In the bottom-left corner, include a circular minimap with a pink border, black streets, pale land, blue water, a north marker labeled N, and a small player arrow. In the bottom-right corner, overlay the location name {argument name="location name" default="Little Havana"} in elegant green cursive script. Use low-polygon vehicles and buildings, simple textures, soft shadows, saturated tropical colors, slight screen blur, and the unmistakable nostalgic look of a PlayStation 2-era action game screenshot with a 16:9 frame.
title: Retro Open-World Seaplane Screenshot
description: This prompt generates a nostalgic PS2-era open-world game screenshot of a seaplane flying over a tropical city with a full retro HUD, useful for recreating classic video game imagery.

content: A high-completion character setting breakdown diagram, A4 vertical layout, oriental cyberpunk style, national tide technical style, next-gen 3A sci-fi game character setting collection texture, realistic digital painting, neon cinematic lighting, cold, majestic, and hardcore sci-fi feel. The protagonist is a completely new original image of the {argument name="mythological character" default="Chinese mythological figure 'Erlang Shen Yang Jian'"}, not Sun Wukong, with no monkey characteristics and no Golden Cudgel. The character is set as a high-level tactical executive officer of a conglomerate, with a high-precision holographic scanning prosthetic eye (the third eye) emitting a faint blue light implanted in the forehead, and a neat tactical slick-back hairstyle. Wearing a matte black high-collar bulletproof windbreaker, silver dragon-scale Kevlar bulletproof vest, and military-grade exoskeleton, accompanied by a fully armed cyber-mechanical police dog (Xiaotian Dog). Holding a foldable laser three-pointed double-edged blade, possessing an aura of absolute suppression and cold law enforcement. The primary colors are titanium silver, tactical deep blue, cold white, and warning yellow. The page includes: main visual bust, character name title, basic profile, attribute radar chart, front/side/back three-view drawings, expression set, weapon breakdown, clothing and accessory details, color scheme, and design highlight descriptions. The overall layout is like a high-end sci-fi game setting manual, with a holographic HUD interface style, clear modules, unified borders, a few Chinese labels, clean text, and no garbled code. Realistic textures, including matte composite armor, Kevlar fiber, optical lenses, and rich details of faint blue holographic projections, making it look like a character setting page from a top-tier oriental cyberpunk action game.
title: Oriental Cyberpunk Character Setting Sheet
description: A comprehensive prompt for a character design sheet of a cyberpunk Erlang Shen, including multiple views, equipment breakdowns, and a professional game concept art layout.

content: A dramatic vertical fantasy game splash-art poster of a single male warrior hero in an icy blue environment, rendered in ultra-detailed polished digital illustration with cinematic lighting and high contrast. The composition is dynamic and slightly diagonal, with the character’s body sweeping across the frame as if diving or lunging through shards of ice and streams of blue energy. He has {argument name="character name" default="澜"}, a youthful handsome face, pale skin, sharp features, and short tousled {argument name="hair color" default="silver-white"} hair. His expression is calm, cold, and focused, eyes angled downward as if stalking prey. He wears sleek dark navy and black fantasy armor with metallic silver edges and glowing cyan highlights, including 4 visible major armor pieces: a large right shoulder guard with a circular glowing core, a fitted chest-and-torso suit, a layered waist guard, and armored forearm bracers. His body is turned sideways in a fluid assassin-like pose, one arm extended, with a long glowing blue weapon or energy blade emerging from the lower left. Surround him with sharp translucent ice formations, swirling fabric-like frosty shapes, and floating debris, all illuminated by luminous blue light. Use a cool monochrome palette dominated by sapphire, cobalt, and icy cyan, with glossy reflections and magical glow effects. Add 3 groups of visible Chinese typography integrated like a mobile MOBA hero poster: a large white brush-calligraphy title near the upper center-left reading {argument name="title text" default="澜"}, a thin vertical poetic line beside it reading {argument name="tagline text" default="被灭刃锋，只为永恒"}, and a gold vertical game logo in the upper right reading {argument name="logo text" default="王者荣耀"}. Premium e-sports promotional poster, highly detailed, heroic, elegant, cold, mystical, and powerful.

content: A dramatic dark fantasy anime illustration of a single samurai warlord in a powerful three-quarter full-body pose, centered and filling the frame, holding 1 unsheathed katana horizontally across the foreground with the blade angled slightly downward toward the right. The character has extremely long, wild, windblown {argument name="hair color" default="crimson red"} hair streaming across the upper right of the composition, with ornate gold hair ornaments and braided details. Dress the figure in lavish layered Japanese court-and-warrior clothing: 1 voluminous white kimono inner layer with subtle patterned fabric, 1 deep indigo and purple outer robe, 2 black lacquered armored forearm guards, 2 elaborate gold shoulder armor pieces, multiple braided cords, tassels, sashes, chains, and gold filigree ornaments around the chest and waist. The sword should have an ornate dark hilt with red wrapping and gilded fittings, and a polished steel blade catching bright highlights. Use a low-angle, heroic composition with sleeves and ribbons billowing outward, emphasizing motion and dominance. The background is a nearly black textured void with 1 large circular crest or moonlike emblem behind the character, painted in distressed gold and shadowy navy, plus scattered embers, ink splatter, and fiery orange sparks around the edges. The palette is rich and restrained: black, deep navy, burgundy, crimson, antique gold, and ivory. Render in ultra-detailed painterly anime style with intricate textile patterns, metallic reflections, dramatic rim lighting, cinematic contrast, and a serious, regal, intimidating mood. Avoid cute styling, avoid bright pastel colors, avoid glossy plastic textures, avoid oversaturated sparkly effects; keep it mature, gritty, elegant, and highly detailed.
title: Dark Fantasy Crimson Samurai Warlord

content: Using the provided reference photo, recreate the same museum facade and frontal composition as a polished theatrical anime background illustration. Keep the architecture, signage, 3 flagpoles, broad steps, and overall layout consistent, but convert the image from realistic photography into a highly detailed hand-painted anime film style with clean linework, soft cel shading, gentle pastel stone colors, and crisp atmospheric lighting. Add dramatic sunlight from the upper right so the glass pyramid casts a large geometric lattice shadow across the central wall and left side of the entrance. Simplify and stylize the people into anime background characters, keeping the 2 visible groups: 1 lone figure on the left and 1 small cluster of 7 people near the center-right entrance. content: A dramatic Japanese fantasy action RPG PlayStation 5 game cover poster in a dark ornate high-fantasy style, vertically composed like premium key art. Show three armored warrior women standing heroically in the foreground against a glowing night battlefield and a towering gothic fantasy castle city in the distance, with fireworks, embers, magical light trails, and a star-filled purple-blue sky. The central figure is a blonde elf-like knight with pointed ears, a fur-trimmed collar, silver and gold armor, and a powerful stance, holding an enormous double-headed ceremonial battle axe angled across the lower half of the image; the axe is highly detailed with filigree silver metalwork, turquoise-blue crystal inlays, and an intricate engraved circular blade. On the left stands a second female knight with long dark crimson hair, metallic breastplate armor in steel and burgundy tones, and a sword held downward; behind her looms 1 giant black raven or crow with one glowing blue eye. On the right stands a third female knight with long light brown hair covering her eyes, pointed ears, and glossy magenta-pink armor with revealing fantasy plate design; a quiver of arrows is visible behind her shoulder. Include 2 red flying bird-like creatures or phoenixes in the upper right sky. The mood is epic, intense, and slightly gothic, with dense sparks, glowing particles, rim lighting, and lavish metallic reflections. Add an ornate thin gold border framing the entire cover. At the top left, place a small circular emblem and the text "O-prompt Laboratory". Along the right side, add vertical Japanese tagline text: "絆と力に、運命を斬り拓け". At the bottom center, place the game title in large embossed gold serif letters: "{argument name="game title" default="ELYSION"}", with a subtitle beneath in smaller serif capitals: "{argument name="subtitle" default="REBIRTH"}". Below that, add the Japanese subtitle text "エリシオン・リバース". At the bottom left, include a realistic Japanese age rating badge reading "CERO C" with small text "15才以上対象". Along the bottom, add the Japanese tagline "美しき騎士たちの、終わりなき戦いが今、始まる。" and beneath it the English line "THE ETERNAL BATTLE OF THE KNIGHTS BEGINS NOW.". Make it look like polished AAA console box art for a nonexistent fantasy game, ultra-detailed, cinematic, richly textured, high contrast, with the composition dominated by the three women and the oversized axe.

The machine is custom themed with The Simpsons and Duff Beer branding: a red and yellow wooden lane with a large circular scoring hole at the front edge, several smaller scoring holes arranged near the backboard, three upright metal pins or bumpers, a backboard logo that says "Duff," and the text "THE SIMPSONS" near the lower front. On the right side, a young man in a dark hoodie and jeans stands in profile beside the machine, one hand in his pocket and the other pointing at the scoreboard, his face intentionally obscured or blurred. In the lower right foreground, place a small wooden table holding exactly 2 bottles: a tall bottle labeled "AGUARDIENTE AMARILLO MANZANARES" and a brown beer bottle labeled "AGUILA." Add a narrow neon-lit vertical window or light panel in the back right glowing purple and blue. content:
Please create a high-completion, high-information-density visual map of an 'Isometric Micro-World Archive' suitable for serialized publishing based on the [Theme].

This is not a regular room illustration or a simple architectural drawing, but a thematic space overview combining 'isometric perspective + architectural cross-section structure + multi-layer functional space + high-density thematic props + miniature model feel + game scene concept art feel.' The image should look like an opened miniature world, a business simulation game scene, a dollhouse model, or a world-building concept map, allowing viewers to understand the overall structure at a glance while repeatedly observing the small details within.

[Basic Settings]
Theme: [Theme, e.g., Insect Research Institute / Future Survival Base / Magic Potion Workshop / AI Automation Company / Plant Factory / Children's Learning Center / Space Supply Station]
Space Name / Brand Name: [Brand name or space name, can be empty]
Worldview Direction: [Reality / Sci-Fi / Fairy Tale / Magic / Post-Apocalyptic / Museum / Laboratory / Business Simulation / Campus / Natural Ecology]
Building Type: [Cottage / Base / Factory / Lab / Shop / Museum / Underground Space / Spaceship / Multi-layer Studio]
Core Function: [What this space is mainly used for, e.g., research, production, display, life, training, trading, learning, maintenance, planting]
Main Color: [Main color, e.g., light blue, mint green, cream yellow, pink, orange-green, purple-blue, white-blue tech color]
Auxiliary Color: [Auxiliary color, can be empty]
Accent Color: [Accent color, can be empty]
Aspect Ratio: [1:1 / 3:4 / 4:5 / 9:16]
Information Density: [Medium-high / High / Ultra-high]
Overall Vibe: [Healing, cute, precise, childlike, popular science, futuristic, retro, refreshing, sense of exploration]

If some fields are not filled, please automatically derive them reasonably based on the [Theme]; do not leave the screen blank. All content must be generated uniformly around the theme, avoiding irrelevant elements.

[Visual Structure]
Adopt a clear isometric perspective / axonometric view, where the main subject is an opened multi-layer thematic building or functional base. Viewers can simultaneously see the front, side, top, and internal space of the building. The entire building is located at the center of the screen, occupying most of the area, with the background environment moderately faded to highlight the subject.

The interior of the building needs to be divided into multiple functional areas, each with a clear purpose, rather than randomly piled decorations. It can include:
1. Main work area / Core operation area
2. Display area / Collection area / Specimen area
3. Research area / Lab area / Control area
4. Storage area / Shelving area / Supply area
5. Living area / Rest area / Small residential area
6. Energy area / Machine area / Piping area
7. Planting area / Cultivation area / Ecological area
8. Entrance area / Transport area / Maintenance area
9. Spatial connection structures like stairs, platforms, corridors, railings, ladders, etc.

Clear spatial relationships must be formed between various areas through stairs, corridors, platforms, pipes, bridges, or cables, making the image look like a real, functioning miniature system.

[Props and Details]
Generate a large number of relevant props based on the [Theme] and distribute them in different functional areas. Props need to be specific, identifiable, and thematically related, not just vague decorations. Each small object should be as clear and readable as a game asset, with a feel of being clickable, interactive, and collectable.

Types of props can include:
- Thematic equipment: machines, instruments, tools, consoles, containers, screens, workbenches
- Lifestyle objects: tables/chairs, bookshelves, beds, cups, boxes, cabinets, lamps
- Display objects: specimens, models, posters, signboards, glass cabinets, display racks
- Connection structures: pipes, wires, ladders, stairs, conveyor belts, slide rails, platforms
- Ecological elements: plants, water tanks, incubators, soil, branches, rocks, specimens
- Character elements: small number of characters, animals, robots, or thematic creatures to provide a sense of scale and story

The number of props should be rich but orderly. All props should serve the space's function and the thematic worldview.

[Style Requirements]
The overall style is clear, cute, precise hand-drawn cartoon isometric illustration. Lines are clean, edges are slightly rounded, colors are bright and soft, with an overall relaxed, healing, and exploratory feel. The image should have the feel of a business simulation game, a children's science picture book, a miniature model, or a concept art page.

Avoid over-realism, strong dark lighting/shadows, heavy oil painting feel, and complex noise. The focus is on being clear, exquisite, layered, and highly readable.

[Color and Lighting]
Use high brightness, low-to-medium saturation soft color schemes. The main color is unified, auxiliary colors are used to distinguish different spaces, and accent colors are used to highlight key equipment and small props. Line art colors should not use dead black; instead, use soft outlines like dark gray, blue-gray, or brown-gray.

Keep lighting and shadows lightweight; strong realistic projections are not needed. Build layers through color blocks, structures, lines, and local highlights. The background should use light colors and low-contrast processing to make the main building stand out more.

[Composition and Reading Path]
The main subject is centered or slightly upper-centered, with the building in a multi-layer cross-section structure. The visual reading path should start from the overall building outline, enter the functional areas of each floor, and finally observe the detailed props. The gaze can be guided by elements such as stairs, platforms, corridors, pipelines, and tracks.

The overall image should be full but not crowded, rich but not messy. Every room, platform, and corner should have content, yet still maintain clear spatial boundaries.

[Background Environment]
The background can include a weakened external environment according to the theme, such as a forest, city, street, underground rock layer, experimental park, seabed, space, campus, factory exterior, etc. The background should not compete with the subject; light colors, low opacity, and low contrast are recommended to achieve a 'subject clear, background receding' effect.

[Final Effect]
The final image should look like a complete thematic space concept map, with both the structural feel of an architectural cross-section and the detail of a game scene asset map, combined with the cute exploration feel of a miniature dollhouse. It should be suitable for serialized visual creation, IP worldview display, game scene settings, brand space concept maps, science content covers, or Little Red Book/Pinterest style visual posts.

Ensure the image has:
1. Clear isometric perspective
2. Clear architectural cross-section structure
3. Complete multi-layer functional areas
4. Rich props and thematic unity
5. Soft and bright colors
6. Clean and clear line art
7. Weakened background, prominent subject
8. High information density but not messy
9. A sense of an explorable, operable, and observable miniature world.
title: Isometric Micro-World Cross-Section Archive
description: A professional and highly detailed instruction prompt for generating isometric, cross-section views of miniature thematic worlds with high information density.

content: A highly detailed concept illustration of a customized vintage step-through motorcycle inspired by a Honda Super Cub, shown in a clean studio-like three-quarter left side view on a plain light gray background. The bike has a rugged post-apocalyptic street-build aesthetic with a black, white, and muted gray color scheme accented by small pink stickers and decals. Emphasize heavy weathering: chipped paint, scratches, oil stains, grime, rust flecks, ink splatter, worn edges, and layered sticker residue across the entire body. The front has 1 square headlight with an X-shaped light pattern and 2 smaller stacked auxiliary lights beneath it. Use spoked wheels, thick all-terrain tires, visible front suspension, exposed mechanical detail, chain drive, and a sturdy center stand touching the ground. The leg shield and side panels are covered in graphic decals, Japanese-style warning labels, numbers, symbols, and distressed typography, including a bold large kanji mark on the front fairing. Add 2 hard side cargo boxes on the rear, one larger box on the far side and 1 nearer black box with extra stickers, plus 1 hanging vertical tag charm attached near the rear case. Include 1 long black ribbed seat, rear rack framing, exposed wiring, metal brackets, bolts, and compact utility accessories that make it feel hand-modified and functional. Render it like an industrial design sketch mixed with polished anime mech concept art: precise linework, watercolor wash shadows, soft gray ground shadow, high-detail mechanical realism, slightly messy inked edges, and a collectible custom-bike illustration feel.
title: Weathered Custom Cub Concept Bike
description: This prompt generates a detailed concept-art style illustration of a heavily customized retro utility motorcycle, ideal for vehicle design, mech art, or post-apocalyptic industrial aesthetics.

content: A dramatic anime-style cyberpunk witch standing on a dark rooftop high above a dense futuristic city at night, viewed from a slightly elevated angle. The main subject is a petite young witch girl with pale skin, short icy blue bobbed hair, pointed elf-like ears, and glowing red eyes, wearing a sly confident smile. She raises a black wand overhead in her right hand, with a dangling orb charm at the tip glowing faintly purple and red. Her oversized crooked witch hat is black with purple lining and covered in stitched patches, warning labels, straps, and white graphics including a large “404” and a skull emblem. She wears a black and purple techwear outfit: oversized hooded jacket with many straps and tags, black crop top with “404” on the chest, layered belts, short bottoms, fishnet on one leg, black lace-up combat boots, chokers, and metallic accessories. Several hanging straps and tags visibly read words like “WITCH 404,” “404,” and glitch-themed markings. Beneath and beside her, a large glowing violet magic circle mixed with hacker interface aesthetics is projected on the rooftop floor, filled with occult rings, sigils, a central skull symbol, and scattered neon system text such as error-code fragments, creating a fusion of sorcery and digital corruption. Emerging from the circle is 1 large armored summoned figure: a black futuristic demon-knight or robotic familiar with jagged reflective armor, a narrow purple-lit visor, and a heavy weapon held in one hand, partially dissolving into purple energy shards and smoke. The background shows a sprawling rainy megacity of apartment towers and industrial rooftops, packed with windows, balconies, cables, signs, and haze. On a nearby building wall is a giant vertical graffiti-style sign with 3 readable elements: “404”, “Witch”, and “ERROR NOT FOUND”, plus a smaller “E404”. Additional purple neon glitch text and symbols are scattered across rooftops and in the air. Use a dark palette of black, indigo, and deep violet with sharp magenta-purple highlights, cinematic contrast, reflective wet surfaces, dense detail, and a high-end polished illustration style. The mood is occult, edgy, stylish, and dangerous, combining urban fantasy, hacker aesthetics, and magical summoning.
title: Cyberpunk 404 Witch Summoning
description: This prompt generates a detailed anime cyberpunk witch illustration on a neon rooftop, ideal for dark fantasy key art, posters, or social media showcase images.

content: A dark ultra-detailed anime cyber-gothic portrait of a {argument name="character type" default="female elf warrior"} in a three-quarter side profile, framed from upper thighs to head, standing in a ruined futuristic industrial city. She has a short blunt bob in {argument name="hair color" default="silver-white"}, pale skin, long sharp elf ears, and a calm cold expression with one visible glowing {argument name="eye color" default="crimson red"} eye. Her hair is windswept across her face, and she wears a black star-shaped metallic hair ornament near one temple. Outfit is a sleek black biomechanical armored dress with glossy obsidian surfaces, spiked and layered plates, torn lace-like textures around the shoulders and chest, and intricate demonic exoskeleton detailing. One arm is heavily armored into a massive organic-mechanical gauntlet. She holds or merges with an enormous jagged living sword crossing diagonally from the lower left foreground toward her torso; the blade is black metal with glowing veins, embedded red cores, and violent molten energy bursting through it like liquid fire. Red energy ribbons, sparks, smoke, and ember-like particles swirl around her body and weapon. The background is a vertical dystopian megastructure filled with black steel towers, cables, hanging chains, fragments of red holographic code, occult-tech insignias, and faint industrial symbols, all mostly swallowed by shadow. Use a black and deep crimson palette with extreme contrast, glossy highlights, sharp rim light, dramatic backglow behind the head, dense detail, chaotic painterly effects, and a grim apocalyptic atmosphere. Composition should feel like premium dark fantasy key art, highly polished, cinematic, intimidating, elegant, and explosive.
title: Dark Cyber Elf With Crimson Blade
description: This prompt generates a dramatic high-detail anime dark fantasy character poster, ideal for concept art, key visuals, or striking AI art showcases.

content:
Create a hyper-detailed comedic Japanese arcade fighting game screenshot styled like a versus battle scene, using a real-world photo aesthetic with game UI overlaid on top. The scene shows an intense mock battle between two groups of theme-park fans competing for the front row at an outdoor show plaza in Tokyo DisneySea. Use a wide 16:9 composition. In the background, clearly show Mediterranean Harbor and Mount Prometheus under bright daytime skies, with the waterfront and DisneySea architecture visible. In the foreground, show exactly 10 young adult people in winter casual clothing, split into 2 opposing teams of 5, physically leaning, grabbing, reaching, and shoving in a tug-of-war-like scrum over position, with exaggerated competitive body language and frozen action as if in a fighting game. Faces should be anonymized with soft blurred blocks. Add floating character labels above each person with levels and names in Japanese. The overall tone is absurdly realistic, like a real candid photo transformed into a polished arcade game battle screen.

Add a full Japanese fighting-game HUD with glossy blue-versus-red interface styling. At the very top, place a center stage title bar reading "東京ディズニーシー　ミッキー広場　ショー最前列バトル" and a large timer in the middle reading "TIME 89". In the top left, add a blue team header "PLAYER1" and team name "最前列ガチ勢A". In the top right, add a red team header "RIVAL" and team name "ライバルグループB". On the left side, stack exactly 5 blue player status panels with portraits, level, Japanese class-like nicknames, HP, SP, and BURST meters. The 5 left-side labels are: "Lv.25 ガチ勢リーダー ユウキ", "Lv.24 筋肉マン タケシ", "Lv.23 眼鏡オタク シンジ", "Lv.23 開角心MAX ケント", "Lv.22 サポート要員 リョウ". On the right side, stack exactly 5 red rival status panels with the labels: "Lv.27 ライバルリーダー ダイキ", "Lv.26 パワフル代表 マサル", "Lv.24 戦略家 コウジ", "Lv.23 熱血漢 リク", "Lv.22 サポート女子 サキ". Each panel should include numeric HP and SP values and segmented BURST gauges, styled like a Japanese arcade RPG-fighter interface.

Place exactly 10 in-battle nameplates above the fighters in the center scene, color-coded blue for the left team and red for the right team. The 10 labels are: "Lv.24 タケシ", "Lv.25 ユウキ", "Lv.23 シンジ", "Lv.23 ケント", "Lv.22 リョウ", "Lv.27 ダイキ", "Lv.26 マサル", "Lv.23 リク", "Lv.22 サキ", "Lv.22 ミサキ".

At the lower left, add a skill menu titled "スキル" listing exactly 5 skills with SP costs: "ダッシュ突撃 SP 20", "肩押し強奪 SP 25", "荷物で場所確保 SP 15", "ロープくぐり SP 10", "本気の根性 SP 50". Beneath that, add a dark description box explaining the highlighted skill "本気の根性" with the Japanese text: "気合で相手を威圧し、どかす！ 一定時間、相手が怯みやすくなる！ （バーストゲージを大きく消費する） 効果時間：10秒".

At the bottom center, add an item menu titled "アイテム" with exactly 5 item slots showing icons and counts: a water bottle "x3", a folded purple towel "x2", a blue drawstring bag "x1", a gray backpack "x1", and a boxed meal "x2". At the lower right, add a quest panel titled "クエスト" with the mission text "ショー開始までに最前列を死守しろ！" and condition text "条件：ライバルグループを全員後ろに押し戻せ！" and countdown text "ショー開始まで：02:30". Beside it, add a mini-map titled "ミッキー広場MAP" showing red and blue dots for both teams in the plaza. Along the very bottom edge, include small controller prompts in Japanese for actions such as skill use, item use, grab/push, and dash.

Use dramatic, saturated lighting, crisp detail, realistic clothing folds, authentic plaza stone pavement, and a high-end Japanese game screenshot look. The image should feel like a ridiculous but believable crossover between a real Tokyo DisneySea crowd photo and a competitive arcade battle game interface.
title: Tokyo DisneySea Front-Row Battle UI
description: A comedic realistic game-style screenshot showing two rival fan groups battling for the front row at Tokyo DisneySea, useful for parody arcade fighting game visuals.

content: An ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="woman"} from a photo, fully preserving her facial features, natural skin texture, realistic hair strands, and simple everyday clothing. The woman holds a small 3D miniature of herself in the palm of her hand. She looks at the miniature with obvious surprise and slight pleasure, with raised eyebrows, a soft smile, and expressive eyes. Her facial expression appears spontaneous and authentic. The miniature version is very similar to this woman in facial structure, hairstyle, and clothing, but is rendered in a smooth, high-quality {argument name="style" default="3D cartoon style"}. The miniature features a disproportionately large cartoon head and an exaggerated, playful expression. Both characters are dressed in the same casual attire—a {argument name="clothing" default="patterned sweater"} with accurate color scheme and fabric texture. The difference in scale is obvious and visually playful. The lighting is professional cinematic, with clear object separation, soft highlights on the skin, and subtle contour lighting around both figures. Ultra-detailed textures for a real person. Clean, realistic 3D textures for the miniature. Balanced realism.
title: Cinematic Portrait with 3D Mini Character
description: A prompt for generating an ultra-realistic portrait of a woman holding a 3D cartoon-style miniature of herself.

content: Please create a high-completion, high-narrative tension 「Shadow Ensemble Cover」 suitable for serialized release based on the [Subject: {argument name="character name" default="Write character names"}]. This is not an ordinary character illustration, nor a simple combat poster, but an "ensemble action cover" with the feel of a novel cover, manga visual, game promotion, and dark fantasy illustration. The image needs to be composed of a huge spiritual core figure, multiple mid-ground action characters, background threat elements, local energy light effects, and a blank title area to form a complete character faction and worldview cover. [Basic Settings] Theme: {argument name="scene theme" default="Jujutsu battle / Dark Journey to the West / Cyber Hunter / Monster Hunting Team / Doomsday Survivor / Magic Academy Battle Group"} Work Name: [Work Name] Series Name / Brand Name: [Brand Name or Series Name] Subtitle: [Subtitle] Style Direction: {argument name="style" default="Dark fantasy, retro manga cover, hand-painted impasto, fantasy novel cover, game visual"} Main Tone: Dark green-black-gray / Deep blue neon / Dark brown-gold-red / Sand yellow-iron rust / Deep purple-gold Accent Color: Blood red energy, turquoise spell light, golden divine light, blue lightning Frame Ratio: 2:3 vertical / 3:4 vertical / 4:5 vertical / 9:16 vertical [Screen Structure] Use a vertical cover composition. There must be a huge visual figure as the spiritual core and atmosphere-dominating element. This person can be a profile, half-body, back, front stare, or huge silhouette, occupying the right, top, or main background area, with a calm, mysterious, and oppressive expression, not necessarily participating in the battle, but must govern the temperament of the whole picture. Arrange 3 to 6 action characters in the middle ground to form a combat faction ensemble. There should be clear division of labor and posture differences between characters, such as charging, holding a knife, casting spells, defense, summoning, jumping, alerting, long-range attack, etc. Avoid characters standing still; a strong rhythmic action and visual movement must be formed. Add enemy threats or worldview elements in the background, such as monsters, giants, villain shadows, mechanical legions, demons, ruins, forests, alien spaces, battlefield smoke, or city disasters. Background threats should not overshadow the main subject but wrap around characters like shadows to enhance the sense of crisis and narrative depth. Set 1 to 2 high-saturation energy hotspots, such as red flame fists, blue lightning, green cursed aura, purple magic, golden divine light, or white sword light. The energy effect should be concentrated on key characters or weapons, forming a visual focus, not uniformly lit across the screen. [Composition] The overall structure is "large spiritual core character + mid-ground action ensemble + background threat shadow + bottom or side blank title area". The image can use diagonal lines to organize characters, letting the ensemble rush from top-left to bottom-right or from bottom to center, forming a strong forward push. Retain a clear blank title area, suggested at the bottom-left, bottom, or side. Use off-white, gray-white, light paper color, or low-saturation background colors for the blank area to place the [Brand Name / Work Name / Subtitle]. The title typography should have a publication cover feel, using elegant serif fonts, retro title letters, manga cover titles, or high-end magazine-style layout. The text area must be clear and not completely blocked by characters and background. Do not make the edges a complete rectangle; use irregular brush edges, ink diffusion, torn paper style, or natural dissipation to let characters and background grow out of the paper, enhancing the hand-drawn cover feel and artistic quality. [Visual Style] The overall style should be a combination of hand-painted impasto and manga cover, with paper texture, brushstrokes, dark layers, and a retro publication temperament. Lighting is mainly low-key dark light with a darkened background, clear character silhouettes, and high-contrast focal points provided by local energy light. The image should not be excessively clean; it should retain hand-painted textures, paper grain, edge strokes, and dark mist. Use low-saturation dark tones mainly, supplemented by a small amount of high-saturation energy colors. The overall atmosphere should have a sense of pressure, mystery, combat, and worldview thickness. [Visual Goal] The final image should look like a mature fantasy novel cover, manga special cover, game character faction visual, or IP promo poster. It needs to possess: 1. A clear main visual character; 2. An ensemble with rhythmic movement; 3. Clear enemy threats or worldview background; 4. Strong but restrained energy effects; 5. A readable title text area; 6. An overall texture of a retro hand-drawn cover. Ensure the image is informative but not cluttered, with clear character levels and visual gravity, suitable for continuing to generate the same series with different themes.
title: Shadow Ensemble Movie Poster Template
description: A professional and highly detailed template for creating cinematic posters with narrative depth and complex character arrangements.

content:
Please create a high-completion, high-information-density "Pixel World Asset Atlas" suitable for serialized release based on [Game Theme: {argument name="game theme" default="Demon Slayer/Tanjiro"}].

This is not a regular pixel illustration or a single game scene, but a "2D pixel game asset overview map" for game development, art setting, level design, and visual proposals. The visual should look like a complete game material board, systematically organizing core characters, enemies, items, terrain, scenes, mechanisms, Bosses, and decorative elements required for a [Game Type: {argument name="game type" default="Side-scrolling action"}] into a single clear, professional, and reusable game asset atlas.

[Basic Settings]
Theme Worldview: [Game Theme]
Game Type: [Game Type]
Era Background: [Era Background]
Protagonist Identity: [Protagonist Identity]
Enemy Types: [Enemy Types]
Main Scenes: [Main Scene Environment]
Overall Style: [Style Direction, e.g., {argument name="style" default="16-bit retro arcade pixel style"}]
Main Color: [Main Color]
Secondary Color: [Secondary Color]
Accent Color: [Accent Color]
Aspect Ratio: [Aspect Ratio, Landscape 4:3]
If not filled, automatically match according to the optimal plan for the game theme.

[Overall Visual Requirements]
The visual uses a large landscape canvas with a light or low-interference background, looking like a game development asset sheet or an instruction-style resource catalog. All elements should be 2D pixel art sprites with uniform pixel density, clear black/dark outlines, limited color scales, and retro game textures. Do not generate realistic photography, 3D rendering, painterly illustration, or movie poster styles. Focus on being "systematically complete, clearly categorized, resource-rich, and high in developability."

[Layout Structure]
The map uses a modular grid layout with fine lines dividing different resource areas. Each area needs a numbered title and short category labels, with a reading path from left to right, top to bottom. The layout should have the orderliness of an instruction manual or game dev document. Information density must be high but not chaotic; elements within each module should be equidistantly arranged.

[Modules to Include]
1. Player Character Module: Show complete action frames including standing, walking/running, jumping, etc. frames arranged horizontally like a sprite sheet.
2. Enemy Unit Module: Design multiple enemies including common, ranged, heavy, and elite units.
3. Weapons & Items Module: Show melee, ranged, projectiles, effects, and pickups.
4. Basic Terrain Tile Module: Show ground, walls, platforms, corners, and different material blocks.
5. Natural/External Scene Resource Module: Show trees, grass, rocks, and obstacles.
6. Building/Base/Camp Resource Module: Show doors, windows, walls, ladders, and camp facilities.
7. Special Terrain Module: Show bridges, water bodies, cliffs, and cave openings.
8. Indoor/Underground/Facility Resource Module: Show pipes, consoles, metal doors, and equipment.
9. Boss / Encounter Resource Module: Show large Bosses, special vehicles, and giant mechanisms.
10. General Decoration & Interaction Elements Module: Show ladders, ropes, signs, switches, and mechanisms.

[Visual Detail Requirements]
All resources must maintain consistent pixel size logic and worldview consistency. Clear scale relationships. Action frames must show continuity; terrain tiles must be tileable; items and mechanisms must have functional recognizability; Boss elements should feel oppressive.
title: Pixel Game Asset Atlas Template
description: A comprehensive professional template for generating high-density 16-bit pixel art asset sheets for game development, including characters, animations, and environments.

content: A dark, apocalyptic city street at night, viewed from ground level looking upward through a narrow canyon of ruined tall buildings on both sides. The architecture is heavily damaged and partially collapsed, with jagged silhouettes, broken facades, and blackened gothic-industrial details fading into shadow. A dense column of smoke and stormy cloud fills the center of the sky, backlit by a cold pale glow near the horizon, creating a dramatic high-contrast focal point. The overall palette is nearly monochrome deep navy, charcoal, black, and muted steel blue, with scattered tiny orange ember-like specks drifting through the air across the whole scene. The mood is bleak, ominous, and cinematic, like a post-disaster wasteland or bombed urban ruin. Painterly digital concept art, soft atmospheric haze, heavy texture, subtle film-grain feel, no people, no vehicles, no readable signs, wide composition, high detail in the ruined structures, strong vertical framing from the buildings, and a foreboding smoky sky dominating the upper half.
title: Apocalyptic Ruined City Street
description: This prompt generates a dark cinematic concept-art scene of a devastated urban street with collapsing buildings, smoke, and drifting embers, suitable for dystopian or post-apocalyptic visuals.

content: A moody post-apocalyptic cinematic landscape at dusk, painted in a dark sepia and amber palette, showing the ruins of an industrial or urban structure beneath a turbulent sky filled with dense, glowing clouds. In the left foreground, a large diagonal collapsed metal beam or crane arm rises from the bottom left toward the upper left, draped with torn fabric or shredded sheeting and tangled cables. A single long cable stretches diagonally downward across the frame toward the center. In the hazy midground, slightly right of center, stands a damaged domed tower or observatory-like building, partially obscured by dust, smoke, and drifting debris. The ground is filled with jagged rubble, broken structures, and silhouetted wreckage. Use dramatic backlighting from the cloud breaks near the horizon, soft volumetric haze, atmospheric perspective, painterly textures, and a ruined-world epic tone. The composition should feel vertical, solemn, desolate, and cinematic, with no people visible.
title: Post-Apocalyptic Ruins at Dusk

content: Create a seamless-looking 360-degree equirectangular HDRI environment map of a futuristic urban expressway at night, viewed from the middle of a wide wet roadway beneath elevated highways in a dense modern city. Use a panoramic full-surround composition with strong fisheye-like equirectangular distortion at the top and bottom edges, designed for use as a Blender world background. The scene should feature 2 large curving elevated highway ramps, one on the left and one on the right, arching inward toward the center, with multiple supporting pillars and additional overpass layers receding into the distance. Surround the roadway with a skyline of illuminated high-rise office towers and apartment buildings, with cool blue and cyan windows and a few magenta and purple accent lights. Make the road surface glossy and rain-soaked, reflecting the city lights in long horizontal streaks of neon blue, violet, and pink. Add subtle light trails and luminous reflections across the pavement, creating a cyberpunk mood. The sky should be dark, cloudy, and atmospheric with a faint bright glow at the zenith and soft haze around distant buildings. Keep the overall palette dominated by deep indigo, electric blue, cyan, and purple. The image should feel cinematic, moody, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, high dynamic range, with realistic urban lighting and mirrored wet-surface reflections, suitable as an HDRI backdrop. Include slight panorama seam artifacts and stretched distortion near the poles so it feels like an AI-generated but usable environment map.

content: A cinematic first-person modern military battle on a tropical island coastline, viewed from the perspective of a soldier holding a black assault rifle in both hands at the lower right foreground, with dark tactical gloves visible. The scene shows a fortified coastal base under attack in bright midday sunlight beneath a vivid blue sky with scattered white clouds. In the foreground and midground, depict a rugged dirt path with dry grass, scattered debris, crates, and metal barrels leading into a compact military installation made of futuristic-industrial bunkers and machinery painted olive green and gray. Include 5 prominent base structures: a rounded bunker with a small dome on the far left, a cylindrical tower just right of it, a large central arched hangar-like bunker with a dark entrance, 1 squat turreted structure on the right midground, and 1 stone-and-metal defensive wall section at the far right front. In the center midground, show 1 major ground explosion with orange fire and black smoke, plus 1 tall vertical smoke plume rising behind the base near the cliffs. The background features rocky cliffs lined with many palm trees and a small waterfall descending near the center-left, with the ocean and horizon visible to the right. Over the water, show 4 large gray battleships grouped near the coast on the right side. In the sky, include 3 helicopters, 4 smaller aircraft or drones in the distance, and 5 visible missile or rocket trails streaking diagonally across the sky from right to left, emphasizing an active large-scale assault. content: An isometric real-time-strategy game battle scene viewed from a high oblique angle, showing a fortified coastal military outpost under naval attack in a desert oasis environment. Inside the compound are 5 major structures: a large central metallic command or factory building with a curved roof and landing-pad markings, 1 long segmented industrial generator on the left, 1 smaller smokestack power structure near the bottom center, and 2 green cylindrical reactor or storage buildings on the right. The shoreline curves around shallow blue-green water with sandy banks, rocky cliffs, and many palm trees, creating a tropical desert cove. In the water on the right side, depict 5 gray modern warships in formation, angled diagonally, each leaving white wakes as they move. Count 8 missiles total with bright flaming trails arcing from the ships toward the land and base defenses; one missile is striking the nearest ship-side target area with a bright blue-white impact flash over the waterline, while others arc toward the compound and shore. content: Using the provided reference image as the visual civilization seed, expand it into a new cinematic world scene that keeps the same grand East Asian fantasy design language, monumental scale, intricate architecture-first worldbuilding, and ultra-detailed realism, but shift the setting from a luminous cloud palace into an ancient mechanical ruin on the ground. Replace the gilded celestial temple environment with colossal circular ring structures, giant embedded gears, heavy industrial stone-and-metal architecture, broken conduits, and overgrown ruins with pale flowering trees. Change the mood to cold, misty, desaturated blue-gray lighting with soft atmospheric fog, while preserving the epic, awe-inspiring worldbuilding feel from the reference. Add 1 lone wandering swordsman seen from behind in the foreground, wearing flowing white robes and carrying a sheathed sword, centered beneath the largest ring to emphasize scale. Make it feel like a frame from a high-budget fantasy film, with extremely rich environmental detail and a cohesive visual language derived from the reference image.
title: Reference-Based Cinematic World Expansion
description: This prompt turns a single reference scene into a new but stylistically consistent cinematic worldbuilding image, useful for expanding a concept into broader settings for films, games, or visual development.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the visual foundation, expand the single sky-palace scene into a complete cinematic world-building presentation for a fantasy civilization. Preserve the same East Asian celestial imperial design language, floating architecture above clouds, gilded ornamentation, warm sunset lighting, and ultra-detailed realistic concept-art look, then turn it into a polished multi-panel lore board on a dark background with elegant editorial typography. Include 8 labeled sections: 1 large hero overview panel for the civilization, 1 architecture section with 9 images, 1 characters section with 7 full-body character designs, 1 clothing and armor section with 6 outfit variations, 1 vehicles and transport section with 4 vehicle designs, 1 world map section with 1 illustrated map, 1 environments section with 6 environment images, and 1 culture and details section with 6 close-up detail images. Add a refined fantasy title and short lore paragraph for the civilization, using the name {argument name="civilization name" default="Celestial Dynasty"}. The architecture section should show 9 distinct items: palace, temple, gate, pillar, bridge, throne hall, garden, library, and observatory. The characters section should show 7 archetypes: emperor, empress, high priest, general, royal guard, scholar, and artisan. The clothing and armor section should show 6 designs: ceremonial robe, battle armor, noble attire, priest robes, artisan garments, and dancer costume. The vehicles and transport section should show 4 designs: an airship, a flying beast mount, a sky chariot, and a ceremonial palanquin. The environments section should show 6 scenes: one wide banner panorama plus 5 smaller locations, including forest, mountain peaks, lotus valley, golden fields, and a celestial port. The culture and details section should show 6 images: dragon motif, lantern or artifact, palace interior, scholarly scene, mechanical instruments, and decorative symbols. Keep all panels visually unified as if from one official franchise world bible, with extremely rich detail, believable material design, and cinematic realism.
title: Celestial Dynasty World Bible Board
description: This prompt turns one reference scene into a complete fantasy civilization pitch board with architecture, characters, costumes, vehicles, map, environments, and cultural details for concept development or franchise worldbuilding.

content: A highly detailed, whimsical anime cafe illustration in a vertical composition, featuring a chibi girl mascot standing at the center of a cozy fantasy coffee shop during golden sunrise. She has extremely long, voluminous hair with a vivid rainbow gradient that begins as {argument name="hair color" default="deep blue at the crown"} and flows through cyan, green, yellow, orange, pink, and purple at the tips, with glossy highlights and thick bangs framing large sparkling blue eyes. She wears oversized silver headphones with green four-leaf clover emblems on both earcups, a red leather jacket, a white T-shirt with a yellow smiley face, fitted blue jeans, and white high-top sneakers with red accents. She smiles warmly and holds a white coffee mug decorated with a green clover symbol. Add a speech bubble near her head containing Japanese text: {argument name="speech bubble text" default="おはよう。今日も、ひとくち目の幸せから。"}. The cafe interior is richly decorated with dark polished wood, hanging banners, shelves filled with glass bottles and jars, trailing green plants, glowing crystal ornaments, and warm amber lighting. On the left upper area, hang a blackboard menu sign labeled {argument name="cafe name" default="AriteAL Cafe Menu"} with Japanese handwritten menu items and small coffee doodles. In the right background, place tall arched windows showing a dreamy pastel sunrise sky and storybook castle-like towers outside. Include exactly 2 mascot creatures: 1 small blue penguin barista on the left beside stacked clover mugs, and 1 small black cat-like creature with tiny bat wings and a red bow tie near a chalkboard sign on the lower right. In the foreground on a round table, show exactly 4 featured food and drink items: 1 thick slice of toast topped with a green clover garnish, 1 cup of latte art coffee in a clover cup, 1 glass jar of honey, and 1 tall rainbow parfait layered with colorful jelly, whipped cream, berries, strawberry slices, and crystal-like candy shards. Also place a teapot and additional clover-pattern cups on side tables in the midground. Add a small standing chalkboard sign on the lower right with Japanese welcome text and the cafe name. The whole image should feel magical, cheerful, polished, and richly rendered, with soft sparkles, warm morning light, saturated colors, intricate decorative details, and premium gpt-image-2 anime illustration quality.
title: Magical Chibi Cafe Mascot at Sunrise
description: A bright fantasy anime cafe scene centered on a chibi mascot character, ideal for promotional art, greeting posts, or whimsical cafe branding.

content: A dark cyberpunk anime illustration of a small eerie girl standing in a narrow rain-soaked alley at night, viewed from a dramatic low angle that makes her oversized mechanical arm dominate the foreground. She wears a large white hooded coat covered with printed patch-like symbols, diagrams, and industrial markings, the hood casting deep shadow over her face. Her face is minimal and doll-like with short straight black hair, pale skin, and two glowing white eyes with no visible pupils, giving a quiet emotionless expression. One of her arms is replaced by an enormous heavy mech limb that is far larger than her body, extending toward the viewer. The arm is built from layered white armored plates, exposed joints, cables, bolts, pistons, and segmented machinery, with scratches and grime for a worn combat-industrial look. The hand has exactly 4 massive clawed fingers touching the wet ground, each ending in long black-red talons, with red internal lights glowing through vents and gaps across the knuckles, wrist, and forearm. Add dangling black cables beneath the upper arm and subtle red light leaks around the elbow and shoulder mechanisms. Her other sleeve hangs normally at her side. She wears dark shorts or a skirt beneath the coat and oversized fluffy white leg warmers around her lower legs, with bare feet visible on the reflective pavement. The alley is dense with pipes, conduits, cables, vents, and old signage, including teal-green vertical neon signs in the background, creating a moody cyan backlight. Rain falls through the scene, puddles reflect teal and red light, and tiny orange-red sparks scatter near the claw tips on the ground. Use a muted palette of dirty white, charcoal, teal, and crimson, with cinematic contrast, highly detailed linework, gritty textures, atmospheric fog, and a haunting futuristic dystopian mood. Make the character {argument name="character name" default="a hooded mech-arm girl"}, with {argument name="coat color" default="dirty white"} outerwear, {argument name="glow color" default="crimson red"} mechanical lights, and {argument name="neon color" default="teal green"} alley signage.
title: Cyberpunk Girl with Giant Mech Claw
description: This prompt generates a moody anime-style cyberpunk character portrait of a hooded girl with a huge glowing mechanical claw arm in a rainy neon alley, ideal for concept art or dramatic sci-fi character illustrations.

content: A dark cyberpunk anime illustration of a lone young woman with a massive mechanical claw arm standing in a rainy neon-drenched alley at night, viewed from a dramatic low angle that makes her look imposing and dangerous. She has a pale face, long straight black hair partly hiding her eyes, and faintly glowing red eyes with a cold, emotionless expression. She wears an oversized hooded winter-tech coat with a large fur-trimmed hood and fur cuffs, layered black tactical streetwear, straps, belts, and baggy dark pants tucked into heavy boots. Her left arm is replaced by an enormous industrial mech prosthetic that dominates the foreground, packed with dense gears, pistons, tubing, cables, exposed mechanisms, and glowing red indicator lights, ending in 3 long curved talons with razor-sharp tips lit from within by crimson energy. Add small decals, warning labels, and vertical East Asian signage on the coat and machinery. Set her in a narrow futuristic city street filled with towering buildings, hanging cables, mist, and many vertical neon signs with Chinese characters in red and cyan-green. The pavement is wet and mirror-like, reflecting the red lights from the claw and the surrounding signage. Use a gritty, ultra-detailed, high-contrast palette of charcoal black, gunmetal, deep crimson, and sickly teal. The mood is cold, moody, intimidating, intelligent, and slightly melancholic. Highly detailed linework, complex mechanical rendering, cinematic lighting, rain haze, urban density, anime-meets-hard-surface concept art, masterpiece quality.
title: Cyberpunk Girl with Giant Claw Arm
description: This prompt generates a dramatic anime-style cyberpunk character portrait, ideal for concept art of a lone mechanized antihero in a neon-soaked futuristic city.

content: A simple anime-style upper-body portrait of a futuristic young woman centered on a plain light gray background, drawn with loose sketchy linework and soft pastel coloring. She has long, flowing very pale pink-lilac hair that falls past her shoulders, with thin wispy strands and a gentle glossy look. Her face is completely hidden by a large centered square blur/mosaic block in muted gray-lavender. She wears a large white beret-like cap with a dark navy inner band and 2 angular dark navy side attachments, one on each side, accented with small cyan details. Add a sleek sci-fi earpiece on the visible side of her head with translucent cyan glowing elements. Her outfit is a fitted sleeveless white high-neck bodysuit with 2 bright cyan vertical panels on the front, thin dark seam lines, and small angular dark navy armor-like accents near the chest and waist. One upper arm has a dark armband with 4 thin cyan-white stripes. Show her from about the chest to the top of the head, facing slightly to the viewer’s left, with a clean elegant silhouette. Use a minimalist illustration style, delicate hand-drawn strokes, subtle cel-shading, white, cyan, navy, and pale pink as the main palette, and no background objects or text.
title: Minimal Sci-Fi Anime Girl Portrait
description: A clean, simple anime character portrait prompt for generating a pastel futuristic girl with a censored face, useful for stylized character art or social media visuals.

content: A simple anime-style upper-body character illustration on a plain light gray background, centered and facing slightly left in a calm three-quarter pose. The character is a young futuristic female android or virtual idol with {argument name="hair color" default="platinum blonde"} hair, styled with one thick braided bun over the left side of the head, long loose side strands, and smooth straight hair flowing past the shoulders. She wears a geometric sci-fi headset over the left ear with a glowing cyan rectangular panel and angular metallic frame. Her outfit is a sleek white bodysuit with black structural straps and trim, a tall black high-neck collar, and thin glowing cyan accent lines running vertically and diagonally across the chest and torso. She has detached white arm sleeves with black bands, including one small dark diamond-shaped ornament on the upper arm. Render the image as a clean, minimal sketchy illustration with delicate pencil-like linework, light cel shading, soft pastel colors, subtle cyan highlights, and a polished concept-art feel. Keep the composition cropped from the top of the head to below the chest, with lots of negative space and no props, no text, and no detailed background.
title: Minimal Futuristic Anime Girl Portrait
description: This prompt generates a clean single-character sci-fi anime portrait suitable for concept art, profile illustrations, or simple character showcase visuals.

content: A vertical Japanese anime fantasy game or light-novel promotional poster in a soft pastel lavender, white, and gold palette, featuring a single heroic teenage girl as the main subject in a grand celestial city. She stands in a dynamic three-quarter full-body pose, slightly turned left, holding an ornate staff in her left hand, with her right arm extended behind her as if caught in wind. Her face is obscured by a flat pale square censor block centered over the head, but the visible design suggests a delicate anime heroine with very long flowing silver-lilac hair, side bangs, loose strands, and star-shaped hair ornaments with dark indigo ribbon bows. She wears an elaborate magical-girl style dress: off-shoulder white bodice with navy and violet trim, gold star motifs, layered asymmetrical skirt in white, periwinkle, violet, and deep indigo, a very large dark blue waist bow with a gold star jewel, detached flowing sleeves, gold chains with tiny star charms draped at the hip, white thigh-high stockings, and a blue star-shaped garter ornament on one thigh. Her staff is tall and elegant, dark shaft with gold frame elements and a suspended faceted blue crystal near the top, decorated with bows and star accents. The background is an airy fantasy skyline of white towers, cathedral-like spires, clouds, feathers, and drifting pink petals, with bright ethereal backlighting and a dreamy heroic atmosphere. Compose it like a polished key visual poster with abundant Japanese typography integrated into the artwork. At the upper left, place the Japanese tagline text "願いが、未来を照らす。" with two smaller lines below it. At the upper right, place a star-like emblem, the large character name "ルミナ", the subtitle "— Lumina —", and a smaller CV credit line. On the right side, add 3 vertically stacked feature callouts, each with a small icon and a bold Japanese heading followed by 2 short lines of smaller text. On the left side, add 1 vertical Japanese copy block running downward beside the character. At the lower right, include 3 small portrait inset panels of the same girl, stacked diagonally: 1 calm front-facing expression, 1 side-profile serious expression, and 1 smiling eyes-closed expression. At the lower left, place the large Japanese title "星紡ぐレガシア" with the English subtitle "— LEGACIA: Weave the Stars —" beneath it. At the bottom right, add the date text "2025. 夏" and one short Japanese tagline line below. At the very bottom edge, include 2 small social or website info blocks on the left and a tiny copyright line on the right. Render in high-end modern anime promotional illustration style, luminous pastel fantasy atmosphere, elegant composition, smooth linework and coloring, soft cel shading, delicate fabric movement, glossy highlights, intricate costume details, clean typography layout, and refined commercial poster finish.
title: Pastel Anime Fantasy Poster with Heroine
description: This prompt generates a polished vertical Japanese anime fantasy promotional poster with one magical heroine, integrated title typography, character callouts, and inset expression portraits for game, novel, or anime key art.

content:
A polished anime-style vertical key visual poster for a futuristic fantasy action series. Center the composition on a full-body young heroine in a confident three-quarter back pose, looking over her shoulder, with her face partially obscured by angle and hair. She has long flowing silver-white hair blowing dramatically in the wind, pale skin, and cool violet accents. Her outfit is a sleek black, white, and purple combat uniform: black cropped jacket with white hood and cape-like layered back panels, fitted bodice, short pleated skirt, utility belt and straps, black gloves, thigh strap on one leg, and subtle star-emblem details. In her right hand she holds a large angular sci-fi sword with glowing purple energy lines. The background is a bright blue daytime sky with soft clouds, several white birds, and an elegant white city of tall cathedral-like spires and bridges, creating a grand utopian futuristic kingdom atmosphere. Use strong wind effects in the hair, ribbons, coat tails, and fabric. Add smooth linework and smooth coloring, clean anime rendering, high-detail cel shading, crisp lighting, glossy highlights, and a premium game-promo illustration finish.

Design it as a complete Japanese promotional poster layout. On the upper left, place a large bold vertical headline in Japanese reading "未来を、自分の手で。" with the middle phrase in purple and the rest in black, over a pale decorative emblem. Beneath it, add a short Japanese blurb in smaller text. On the right side, place a tall dark vertical sidebar with white Japanese text reading "信じてる。だから、私が道を切り開く。". On the lower left, include 3 tilted rectangular inset images stacked diagonally: 1 close-up portrait of the heroine's face, 1 action shot of her fighting with the glowing sword, and 1 wide cityscape view. Below those in a dark character info panel, show the character name "ルシア" with the romanized name "Lucia" and a small emblem, followed by 7 profile lines in Japanese: "CV：悠木 碧", "年齢：17歳", "所属：黎明騎士団（不屈の翼）", "武器：双刃剣（レプリカント）", "誕生日：4月12日", "身長：165cm", "好きなもの：静かな場所、星空", and a final dislike line. At the bottom center, place the large series logo text "黎明のリベリオン" with the English subtitle "REIMEI NO REBELLION" beneath it, and below that the release line "2025年、始動。". Color palette: white, black, deep indigo, electric violet, and sky blue. Overall mood: heroic, elegant, aspirational, premium anime game or light novel promotional poster.
title: Anime Heroine Promo Poster
description: A high-end Japanese-style anime key visual poster featuring a silver-haired swordswoman, fantasy sci-fi city backdrop, and full promotional text layout for a game, anime, or light novel campaign.

content: A minimalist monochrome illustration of a traditional Japanese samurai helmet and shoulder armor, shown as a centered bust-length portrait on a plain light gray background. The armor is rendered in black ink engraving style with high contrast, dense stippling, etched linework, and vintage woodcut texture. The kabuto has two tall curved crest horns and layered side guards, with detailed lacing and plate construction visible on the shoulder section. The face area is completely obscured by a centered vertical black rectangle censor bar with slightly soft edges, covering the mask and most of the front of the helmet opening. Keep the composition small and isolated in the middle of the canvas with large negative space around it, no additional objects, no text, no border.

description: A stark black-and-white vintage-style samurai armor portrait with a censored face, suitable for editorial art, poster design, or minimalist concept imagery.

content: A centered black-and-white vintage ink illustration of a medieval knight’s helmet and upper neck guard, shown as a bust on a plain light gray background with lots of negative space. The helmet is angled slightly to the left in three-quarter view, with a rounded domed top, a narrow horizontal visor slit, and a faceplate featuring 6 vertical ventilation slits. Include a riveted gorget with visible metal studs and a draped cloth or cape falling over the right shoulder. content: Using the provided reference image, do a localized edit. Replace the robot character beside the woman with a cute green-and-white mascot robot version, keeping the same pose, position, scarf, lighting, cozy watercolor anime style, and the rest of the scene unchanged. Give the new robot 2 leaf-like ears, 1 sprout stem on top with 3 small white bell-shaped flowers, larger sparkling blue eyes, and 1 green heart emblem on its chest. Also rotate the laptop at the lower left so the back of the screen faces the viewer, and add 1 simple line-art logo of the same mascot robot centered on the laptop lid.

content: A highly detailed photorealistic LEGO interpretation of {argument name="landmark" default="Plaza de España, Seville"}, shown as a grand golden-hour architectural scene from canal level. The image is vertical and cinematic, with the viewer looking straight down a narrow curved canal toward an ornate Spanish Renaissance Revival palace facade built entirely from LEGO bricks. The warm terracotta building fills the upper half of the frame, with multiple towers, arched colonnades, balconies, decorative cornices, and intricate brick-built ornamentation. A small Spanish flag flies from the central tower. In the foreground, a LEGO rowboat with 2 minifigures is seen from behind, drifting along the canal; one has reddish-brown hair and the other light brown hair, both rowing with long brown oars. In the mid-distance, there is a second small rowboat with 2 minifigures under or near an elegant arched bridge. Count 2 boats total and 4 rowing passengers total. Along the right-side promenade, count 4 visible standing minifigures placed at intervals beside the tiled railing. The canal is lined with detailed blue, white, and yellow ceramic-style LEGO mosaic balustrades and brick parapets, with black vintage street lamps; count 7 visible lamp posts total. On the left edge, include 2 rounded pink flowering shrubs in planters. The bridge crossing the canal has ornate blue-and-white LEGO tile patterns and a graceful single arch. The water should look realistic yet made from small glossy LEGO-like tiles, with dark teal reflections of the building and sky. Lighting is soft sunset light with a glowing amber sky, scattered clouds, long highlights, and rich warm shadows. Emphasize realism, fine texture, playful scale illusion, and the convincing blend of real architectural grandeur with unmistakable LEGO construction.
title: LEGO Plaza de España at Sunset
description: This prompt generates a cinematic LEGO-style architectural scene of Plaza de España in Seville, ideal for travel-themed concept art, social media visuals, or playful photoreal landmark renders.

content: A dense isometric steampunk-cyberpunk city illustration at dusk, designed like a whimsical indie tech district called {argument name="city name" default="INDIE MIND CITY"}. The scene is a single sprawling urban plaza packed with narrow brick buildings, rooftop antennas, cables, pipes, neon signs, market stalls, tiny pedestrians, and playful programmer humor. In the center background, a plaza labeled “PLAZA DEL PROMPT” surrounds a sculptural fountain with pale blue water, with benches and people gathered around it. To the left background, a tall building with a giant sign reading “BARRIO CÓDIGO ABIERTO” is covered in balconies, windows, hanging laundry, air conditioners, plants, and street activity. To the right background, another block bears a large sign “CALLEJÓN DE LOS AGENTES,” with stacked storefront signs including “Codex Barbería cortes exactos,” “Gemini Lavandería,” “Claude’s Coffee,” and “Dr. Llama.” Further right, a heavy industrial factory zone with smokestacks, cranes, ducts, crates, and catwalks displays 3 large signs: “ZONA INDUSTRIAL,” “FÁBRICA DE TOKENS,” and “LLM.” A cloud of floating letters and symbols rises above the chimneys like generated text smoke. In the foreground center, a tall clocktower-like corner building has a vertical neon sign reading “INDIE MIND,” a large round clock on the facade, warm lit windows, and a small stone animal sculpture at its base. To the right foreground, a lively market district glows with string lights and a bright neon sign “MERCADO NOCTURNO,” with 3 visible stall signs: “Memoria usada barata,” “Embeddings frescos del día,” and “Se cambian vectores.” Nearby are 3 more joke signs: “HARD HAT: prompt injection zone,” “HACKATHON: entra y sal con un bug,” and a food stand labeled “STACK OVERFLOW NOODLES.” To the left foreground, an older mixed-use building is filled with signs and visual jokes, including a huge rooftop billboard with 2 cats on top and the title {argument name="main billboard text" default="INDIE MIND CITY"}, plus a small version label “v1.0.0.” On that same block, include these visible signs: “FORGE & CAFE,” “git push cafe +$2,” “Tienda de MERGE CONFLICTS abierto 24/7,” “Se reparan linters,” “NO rm -rf aquí,” “Ralph was here,” “npm install vv,” “sudo make me sandwich,” “WORKTREE,” “SE VENDE GPU USADA,” “MUSEO DEL MERGE CONFLICT,” “NOTARÍA DE COMMITS FIRMADOS,” “PSICÓLOGO PARA SENIOR DEVS 50m 80,” “GATO PERDIDO responde a localhost,” and a poster board reading “HOY: charla sobre agentic coding entrada libre” and “REUNIÓN DE AA^AI REUNIDOS DE LOS AGI.” Near the center-left plaza, add a sandwich-board style sign labeled “PROMPTS USADOS” with 3 lines beneath it, and small plaza signs that read “HELLO WORLD,” “Tailscale,” “OpenRouter,” and “Deepseek.” The streets are cobblestone and crowded with exact small story details: 1 yellow tram labeled “LÍNEA MAIN,” 1 small blue car, 1 bicycle cart, 1 delivery scooter, outdoor café tables, chess players, pedestrians, crates, potted plants, striped awnings, laundry lines, glowing windows, rooftop cats, and a white llama standing near the agent alley. Use a warm muted palette of dusty teal, rust, amber, tan, and faded neon pink and cyan. Render it as an ultra-detailed editorial illustration with clean isometric perspective, intricate linework, soft atmospheric lighting, tiny readable signage, cozy urban clutter, and humorous handcrafted worldbuilding.
title: Indie Mind City Isometric Tech District
description: This prompt generates a dense isometric retro-futurist city scene full of humorous AI and programmer references, ideal for editorial art, posters, or social media visuals about indie AI culture.

content: A cinematic ultra-realistic fantasy military scene in a dense woodland forest at ground level, showing 2 elf snipers concealed in camouflage while scouting a target. The rifle is long and tactical, fitted with a large suppressor, scope, and a deployed bipod planted in the mossy forest floor. The elf wears full modern woodland camouflage, tactical gloves, and a leaf-covered ghillie hood and shoulder covering that blends into the undergrowth. Behind and slightly to the right, a second elf crouches low, also with pointed ears and long light hair, wearing matching camouflage and a leafy ghillie cloak, holding binoculars to their eyes while observing. Add tactical chest gear and pouches on the rear scout. Set the scene in a shadowy temperate forest with tall thin trees, tangled branches, moss, roots, and scattered leaves, lit by soft early-morning natural sunlight filtering through the trees from the right side. Use muted green, brown, and gray tones, realistic textures, shallow depth of field, dramatic focus on the rifle and the two camouflaged elves, immersive war-photography composition, tense stealth atmosphere, and high-detail photorealism.
