content: A cinematic ultra-detailed sci-fi mech hangar interior at night, shown in a wide-angle view from slightly above a massive horizontal holographic planning table. The glowing blue tabletop dominates the foreground and center, displaying an intricate engineering blueprint for a humanoid combat robot labeled {argument name="mech name" default="ARGONAUT"}. The blueprint includes exactly 3 large full-body orthographic mech drawings across the table, one front view, one side view, and one rear view, plus many smaller component diagrams for hands, joints, feet, armor segments, and circular mechanical parts, dense technical callouts, graphs, measurement lines, and blocks of Japanese annotation text mixed with alphanumeric labels. Around the table are exactly 5 engineers in light gray industrial jumpsuits studying the design, leaning over the edges and holding rugged tablets; their faces are intentionally indistinct and partially obscured. In the deep background, exactly 1 towering real humanoid mech stands upright in a maintenance gantry, suspended or docked in a cavernous factory bay filled with catwalks, scaffolding, pipes, heavy cables hanging from the ceiling, illuminated control panels, glass partitions, and a few tiny distant workers for scale. Use a cold steel-and-cyan color palette, dramatic volumetric lighting, reflective metallic surfaces, subtle mist, high contrast shadows, and a serious military-industrial mood. The environment should feel dense, realistic, and operational, like a secret advanced robotics facility. Emphasize scale, technical complexity, and the contrast between the flat luminous blueprint and the massive constructed mech behind it. Render in photorealistic concept-art style with crisp linework on the holographic display, cinematic depth, and extreme detail.
title: Sci-Fi Mech Blueprint Hangar
description: This prompt generates a cinematic photorealistic scene of engineers studying a giant holographic mech blueprint inside an industrial robotics hangar, ideal for concept art and sci-fi worldbuilding.

content: A highly detailed cinematic interior of a cramped Victorian steampunk ship cabin engine room, viewed from standing eye level in a narrow corridor. The scene is packed wall-to-wall with aged polished brass pipes, copper tubes, riveted metal tanks, valves, gauges, and dark varnished wooden cabinets. On the left foreground, a steep wooden staircase with curved banister enters the frame diagonally. Along both sides of the corridor are heavy antique drawers and machinery consoles covered with small metal instruments, teapots, kettles, and mechanical fittings. At the back center is a small square-paned porthole window with 6 visible panes, showing a pale overcast exterior and a faint distant industrial skyline. Beneath the window is a narrow shelf unit with 3 open levels and a small drawer. On the right wall near the window hangs 1 round analog clock. The walls are painted teal-green metal with peeling paint and weathered patina. The floor is dark wood with a narrow worn patterned rug runner. Lighting is warm and moody, primarily from 1 glowing amber industrial wall lamp near the upper left of center, mixed with soft cold daylight from the porthole. Emphasize rich material texture, tarnished brass, oxidized copper, chipped paint, dust, age, and a lived-in mechanical atmosphere. Symmetrical depth, dense environmental storytelling, ultra-detailed, realistic, cinematic composition, shallow contrast but sharp focus throughout, no people.
title: Steampunk Ship Cabin Interior
description: This prompt generates a richly textured cinematic steampunk interior scene, ideal for concept art, environment design, or atmospheric worldbuilding images.

content: A dramatic vertical cinematic poster for the dark wuxia action game {argument name="game title" default="Phantom Blade Zero"}, painted in an ultra-detailed gritty concept-art style with realistic textures, moody volumetric fog, and high contrast lighting. The scene shows 1 lone swordsman standing in the lower center foreground, viewed mostly from behind in a three-quarter pose, wearing a wide straw hat and layered black robes shredded into long wind-whipped strips, with pale loose hair streaming out beneath the hat. He holds 1 drawn sword low in his right hand, the blade catching cold silver light. The environment is a ruined ancient Chinese city of towering wooden pagodas and fortress-like buildings rising into steep cliffs, with collapsing architecture, hanging chains, smoke, drifting ash, and rubble. A bright full moon glows near the top center behind dense storm clouds, backlighting the skyline and the warrior. The color palette is almost monochrome charcoal, black, steel gray, and moonlit white, punctuated by sharp crimson slashes and blood-like streaks cutting diagonally across the composition. At the very top, place 4 huge Chinese calligraphy characters in explosive white brushstroke ink reading {argument name="main Chinese title" default="影之刃零"}, spanning nearly the full width. Directly beneath, centered, add the small elegant serif English subtitle {argument name="subtitle text" default="PHANTOM BLADE ZERO"}. At the bottom center, add 1 line of Chinese tagline text reading {argument name="tagline text" default="刀光即命运 影尽方归零"}, with the final character in red, plus 1 smaller line of Chinese promotional text beneath it. Add subtle ornamental divider lines and a tiny red seal-like emblem at the bottom. Composition should feel like an official AAA key art poster: epic, ominous, martial, supernatural, and intensely atmospheric, with dynamic wind, debris, embers, torn fabric, and ink-splatter energy.
title: Dark Wuxia Game Poster
description: A moody AAA-style promotional poster of a lone swordsman in a ruined ancient Chinese city, ideal for dark fantasy game key art and cinematic marketing visuals.

content: Create a cinematic fantasy MMO raid boss loading-screen-style illustration with a full custom game UI overlay. The scene is set at dusk in front of the glass cube Apple Store, with the glowing white Apple logo centered on the building facade. In the middle of the plaza stands a giant raid boss version of {argument name="boss name" default="Tim Cook"}, labeled as "The Architect," wearing a fitted black turtleneck, dark pants, and sneakers, holding a glowing smartphone in one hand and posing calmly with the other hand open. His face is intentionally blurred or anonymized. The overall tone is epic, satirical, and high-production, like a World of Warcraft raid encounter screen mixed with corporate tech parody. Around him, exactly 20 fantasy raiders in a semicircle battle formation face inward toward the boss, with varied races and silhouettes including armored warriors, rogues, mages, shamans, hunters, and orc-like and human-like characters. Several are casting bright spells in orange fire, blue lightning, green energy, and purple void magic. Include exactly 3 small robotic adds near the boss, each labeled "Supplier Add," with squat industrial bodies and Apple logos on their fronts. Also include 2 active encounter mechanic bubbles: one blue spherical shield labeled "Margin Shield" on the right side of the boss, and one purple circular dome labeled "Closed System" farther right with a humanoid enemy trapped inside. Build the image as a complete raid UI composition. Top left: a large expansion-style title reading "SIEGE OF THE INFINITE LOOP" with subtitle "20-MAN HORDE RAID." Far left: a vertical "RAID FRAMES" panel listing exactly 20 player names in numbered rows from 1 to 20 with colored health bars. Top center: a boss portrait frame with the boss name {argument name="boss name" default="Tim Cook"}, subtitle "The Architect," and a red health bar at 100%. Top right: a large encounter guide panel titled "ENCOUNTER: {argument name="boss name" default="TIM COOK"} – \"THE ARCHITECT\"" containing exactly 3 phases. Phase 1 title: "SUPPLY CHAIN DOMINANCE (100% – 70%)" with 3 abilities: "Logistics Surge – Summons waves of Supplier Adds.", "Margin Shield – Reduces incoming damage by 40% for 10 sec.", and "Quarterly Pressure – Stacking debuff, explodes if not dispelled." Phase 2 title: "ECOSYSTEM LOCK-IN (70% – 30%)" with 3 abilities: "Closed System – Isolates 3 players, puzzle to return.", "Subscription Drain – Raid-wide damage over time.", and "Device Sync – Stack in correct formations to avoid spikes." Phase 3 title: "ONE MORE THING (30% – 0%)" with 3 abilities: "Surprise Launch – Massive AoE burst every 20 sec.", "Reality Distortion Field – Reverses controls briefly.", and "Enrage: Market Collapse – Boss enrages at 3:00." Bottom right: a "POTENTIAL LOOT" panel listing exactly 4 items with rarity-colored text: "Executive Cloak of Efficiency (Epic)", "Keynote Blade (Epic)", "Ecosystem Ring (Epic)", and "Investor's Favor (Bonus – Hard Mode)." Below that, add a small red-black badge reading "HARD MODE" and the line "Activate \"Investor Call\" during the fight to" with the remaining text cut off or obscured. Bottom left: a "CHAT" box with 4 lines, including taunting boss dialogue and a player response, such as "{argument name="boss quote" default="Tim Cook yells: Innovation. Discipline. Excellence. That is how we win."}", "Tim Cook yells: Our ecosystem is unbreakable.", "Tim Cook yells: One more thing...", and "Lok'tarbrok: Lok'tar ogar!" Along the bottom center: a fantasy action bar with exactly 12 ability icons in ornate slots, some numbered, some showing cooldown text including "2m" and "1m". Use dramatic volumetric lighting, glossy reflections on the wet plaza, realistic environment rendering, highly detailed fantasy characters, exaggerated spell effects, dark vignette, sharp UI typography, and polished AAA game key art composition.
title: Tim Cook MMO Raid Boss Screen
description: A satirical AAA-style fantasy raid encounter image depicting Tim Cook as a giant MMO boss with a full World of Warcraft-inspired interface, useful for parody game key art and meme concept generation.

Her expression is {argument name="expression" default="spiral half-lidded annoyed eyes"}, giving a tired, gloomy, slightly irritated look. She is wearing 4 visible clothing items: an oversized light gray hoodie with drawstrings and ribbed cuffs, dark blue denim short shorts with frayed hems, white scrunched ankle socks, and black low-top skate sneakers with white side stripes, white laces, and white soles. Her pose is a compact crouch with both knees up, one elbow resting on a knee, one hand partly covering the lower face or cheek, and the other hand hanging down near the front shoe. The art style is polished modern manga/anime key visual art with thin clean linework, smooth cel-shaded rendering, subtle fabric folds, natural skin highlights on the legs, and slightly oversized hoodie proportions. Emphasize a casual, moody, introverted vibe, minimalist composition, and a high-quality character-focused illustration.

content: A close-up anime fantasy illustration of a cute young girl in a luminous cathedral-like hall, reaching one hand toward the viewer in strong foreshortened perspective as if inviting them forward. She has long wavy {argument name="hair color" default="light blue"} hair spilling from under an oversized glossy green bunny-eared hood, with one ear flopping across the top left and the other hanging down on the right. Her face is mostly obscured by her hair and the hood, creating a mysterious, shy composition. She wears an elaborate frilly outfit in white, green, and pastel pink, with lace trim, ribbons, and a pink bow at the collar. In her other arm she holds 1 plush toy: a white rabbit doll with pink inner ears, a wide open smile, one button X eye, and a small jester-like collar with tiny bells. The background is a grand blue crystal palace interior with tall glowing arches, soft bloom lighting, reflective floors, sparkling particles, and dreamy ethereal atmosphere. Highly polished anime game key art style, vibrant cool tones, soft highlights, delicate linework, glossy fabric textures, cinematic depth, centered composition, portrait cropped at the chest, whimsical and magical mood.
title: Blue-Haired Bunny Hood Anime Girl
description: This prompt generates a polished anime-style fantasy character portrait with a bunny hood, plush rabbit, and glowing cathedral background, suitable for key art or character splash illustrations.

content: A highly detailed retro pixel art landscape of a bright alpine valley in summer, composed like a classic side-scrolling video game background but shown as a wide scenic vista. In the foreground, a winding tan dirt path curves from the bottom center into the middle distance through dense wildflower meadows, with a small blue stream at the lower right bordered by gray rocks and lush grass. Count 2 large foreground rock clusters, 1 winding path, and 1 visible stream. Fill the meadows with colorful flowers in vivid purple, yellow, red, pink, and white, with especially tall purple flower spikes on the left foreground and dense mixed blossoms on both sides of the path. On the left and right midground, place thick stands of leafy green trees and dark pine trees, framing the open valley center. In the background, show a dramatic mountain range with exactly 7 visible peaks: 1 dominant tall snow-capped peak slightly right of center, 2 medium purple peaks to its left, 2 smaller snowy blue peaks in the far center distance, 1 smaller purple peak to the right, and 1 cropped rocky mountain edge at the far left. Use vibrant greens and purples as the main palette, with cool blue shadows and lavender mountain faces. Above, render a bright blue sky with large creamy white clouds, halftone-dot shading throughout the sky and mountains, subtle vintage comic print texture, visible dithering, and crisp sharp pixel edges. Add exactly 4 small flying bird silhouettes in the sky. The whole image should feel colorful, nostalgic, scenic, and richly layered, with heavy halftone comic shading, retro print grain, no text, no UI, no characters, and no buildings.
title: Retro Pixel Mountain Valley
description: A vibrant pixel art alpine landscape with halftone comic shading, ideal for retro game backgrounds, scenic posters, or nostalgic environment art.

content: A top-down cinematic still life of a vintage classified investigation dossier on a dark wooden desk, centered and filling most of the frame. Show a stack of 3 worn manila folders with aged beige paper, frayed corners, subtle stains, and realistic paper texture. The top folder is the main focus and is clipped at the upper left with 1 oversized silver paper clip. Across the top center, typewritten in bold black monospaced letters, the headline reads {argument name="headline text" default="CONFIDENTIAL – CASE FILES"}, with a thin horizontal rule beneath it. Add 2 red rubber-stamp marks: one near the top right that says "CONFIDENTIAL" at a slight angle, and one boxed stamp at the bottom right that says "HANDLING INSTRUCTIONS DO NOT COPY – DO NOT DISTRIBUTE". On the right edge of the folder stack, show 1 tabbed side label reading "CASE FILE NO." with a thick black redaction bar below it. The page is formatted like an old typewritten government document with crisp black ink, slightly uneven typewriter alignment, and many thick black redaction bars obscuring key details. Include 5 numbered sections exactly: "1. SUBJECT INFORMATION", "2. CASE SUMMARY", "3. DETAILS", "4. ASSOCIATES / CONTACTS", and "5. REMARKS". In the header area, include the fields "CASE FILE NO.:" with a black redaction bar, "DATE OPENED:" with {argument name="date opened" default="March 14, 20___"}, "PREPARED BY:" with a black redaction bar, "DEPARTMENT:" with {argument name="department" default="Internal Investigations Unit"}, and "CLASSIFICATION:" with {argument name="classification" default="CONFIDENTIAL"}. In section 1, include 6 fields: "NAME:", "ALIASES:", "DATE OF BIRTH:", "PLACE OF BIRTH:", "LAST KNOWN ADDRESS:", and "OCCUPATION:", each followed by black redaction bars of varying lengths. In section 2, add a short paragraph of typewritten case-summary text with 5 separate black redaction bars embedded in the sentence flow. In section 3, add a second paragraph of details text with 4 separate black redaction bars embedded in the paragraph. In section 4, include a 3-column table labeled "NAME", "RELATIONSHIP", and "NOTES", with 3 filled rows, each cell content covered by black redaction bars. In section 5, add a short warning sentence about sensitive information and unauthorized disclosure. Use warm sepia lighting, soft shadows around the folder edges, subtle vignetting, and a moody noir archival atmosphere. The image should feel realistic, tactile, secretive, and slightly dusty, like a confidential detective case file photographed for a crime thriller or worldbuilding prop.
title: Vintage Confidential Case File
description: This prompt generates a realistic top-down noir-style confidential dossier page, ideal for storytelling, detective worldbuilding, and cinematic prop imagery.

content: A hyper-realistic full-body studio portrait of a disturbing humanoid alien standing alone against a dark, smoky blue-black backdrop. The creature is extremely tall and emaciated, with elongated limbs, a narrow waist, long thin fingers, and oversized bare feet planted on a dim studio floor. Its skin is smooth but leathery and subtly wrinkled, colored deep charcoal blue with cold gray highlights, showing sharply defined ribs, sternum, collarbones, tendons, and stringy musculature across the chest, abdomen, shoulders, and neck. The torso is hairless and gaunt, with an eerie anatomical realism that feels biologically plausible but unsettling. The head is bald, enlarged, and slightly bulbous with a classic extraterrestrial silhouette, attached to an unnaturally long neck; keep the face obscure, unreadable, and deeply uncanny rather than expressive. Pose the alien front-facing with a slight three-quarter angle, arms hanging loosely at its sides, posture upright but subtly predatory, centered in frame from head to feet. Use low-key cinematic lighting with a faint cool rim light and soft overhead illumination that sculpts every crease and contour while keeping the overall scene dark, moody, and oppressive. Desaturated palette, ultra-detailed skin texture, photoreal creature design, sharp focus, high contrast, ominous atmosphere, no clothing, no props, no environment details beyond the shadowy studio background.
title: Uncanny Full-Body Alien Portrait
description: A dark photorealistic studio image of a gaunt humanoid alien, suited for creature concept art, sci-fi key art, or unsettling model capability demos.

content: A full-body cinematic portrait of a deeply unsettling humanoid alien standing alone in a dark rocky ravine, centered in the frame and facing forward in a neutral upright pose with both arms hanging low at its sides. The creature is extremely tall and emaciated, with elongated limbs, narrow shoulders, a sunken torso, visible rib-like structures, taut sinewy anatomy, long forearms, oversized hands with long thin fingers, and long digitigrade-looking feet planted on wet black ground. Its skin is hairless, slick, pale gray-beige with brownish fleshy undertones, semi-organic and biomechanical in appearance, with glossy damp highlights, leathery textures, stretched membranes, tendons, grooves, and subtle vein-like striations. The neck and upper chest are fused into a disturbing organic structure, with tendril-like folds and open channels running from the clavicle area upward into the head. The head is broad and mushroom- or hammer-shaped with a ridged crown and flared side lobes, giving a nonhuman silhouette; the face should feel unreadable and alien rather than cute or familiar. Place the figure in a narrow canyon of dark eroded stone, with 2 large foreground rock masses framing the subject on the left and right, and a misty cliff wall receding behind it. Use cold desaturated lighting, soft fog, damp surfaces, shallow atmospheric haze, and a grim monochrome palette of charcoal, slate, ash gray, and muted flesh tones. The mood should be uncanny, realistic, oppressive, and biologically plausible, like a high-end sci-fi horror still. Ultra-detailed photorealism, sharp texture on the creature, subtle depth of field, dramatic natural backlight from above, no clothing, no tools, no background creatures, no gore, no text.
title: Photoreal Alien in Dark Ravine
description: This prompt generates a disturbing full-body sci-fi horror portrait of a realistic humanoid alien in a bleak rocky canyon, ideal for cinematic concept art and creature design.

content: A dramatic dark-fantasy portrait of an elderly wizard standing in a stormy wasteland under a black, cloud-choked sky. He wears a tall, weathered pointed hat with a brown leather band and a tiny metal clasp, and a heavy dark blue-gray robe with wide sleeves. His face is mostly hidden in shadow beneath the hat brim, with long strands of glowing {argument name="accent hair color" default="electric blue"} hair peeking out at the sides and a very long flowing silver-white beard reaching down his chest. The wizard thrusts his left hand toward the camera in a powerful forced-perspective pose, fingers spread, conjuring a bright orb of blue-white magical energy in his palm with crackling lightning arcs wrapping around the hand and sleeve. In his right arm he clutches a large ancient leather spellbook with worn corners, metal fittings, embossed arcane markings on the cover, and a few pages visible. The background shows a barren dark landscape and exactly 1 prominent lightning bolt striking on the right side of the frame. Cinematic high-contrast lighting, hyper-detailed skin and fabric texture, moody photorealism, sharp focus on the hand and beard, intense fantasy atmosphere, centered composition, square crop.
title: Storm Wizard Casting Lightning
description: A cinematic photorealistic fantasy prompt for generating a dramatic wizard portrait with storm lighting and crackling magical energy.

The scene shows a majestic mountain realm made of many steep rocky islands, waterfalls, mist-filled valleys, floating stone shards, ornate bridges, and layered traditional Chinese palace architecture with glowing mystical blue energy. In the center, place the grand main sect complex labeled "玄天剑宗", built on the tallest luminous mountain with white-blue crystal light, ascending pagodas, terraces, and celestial aura; nearby add the smaller label "宗门大殿". Surrounding it, include exactly 9 additional labeled locations distributed across the panorama: on the far left a purple-toned cliff region labeled "问剑崖" with the smaller annotation "弟子历练之地"; left-center a blue misty cultivation platform island labeled "悟道峰" with the smaller annotation "弟子悟道之地"; upper left a solemn hall cluster labeled "藏经阁" with the smaller annotation "典藏无上功法"; upper right a jagged icy mountain sword formation labeled "剑冢" with the smaller annotation "历代剑修终寝之地"; right-center a bright ceremonial complex labeled "演武场" with the smaller annotation "磨砺弟子心性"; lower right-center an alchemy pavilion area labeled "炼丹房" with the smaller annotation "炼丹疗法"; far right a pink flowering valley sanctuary labeled "百花谷" with the smaller annotation "入神绮艳秘境"; bottom right an outer compound labeled "外门" with the smaller annotation "新弟子居所". Add one title inscription in the upper left corner reading "玄天剑宗" in large gold calligraphy, with a smaller poetic line beneath it and a small red seal stamp. Use an elegant painted concept-art style, monumental scale, pale gold and icy blue highlights, soft volumetric fog, dramatic storm-clearing sky, ethereal lighting, and finely rendered Chinese ink-and-digital matte painting aesthetics. No characters in the foreground, no modern elements, just an expansive legendary sect environment designed like a promotional world-building illustration.

content:
A dramatic ultra-detailed vertical anime key visual poster showing a crossover war between Japan’s Sengoku era and China’s Three Kingdoms era, split exactly down the center by a glowing vertical beam of light. The left half is themed in crimson, magenta, ember orange, and cherry blossom pink, representing {argument name="left faction title" default="日本戦国"}; the right half is themed in jade green, teal, cyan, gold, and stormy blue, representing {argument name="right faction title" default="中国三国"}. At the center, large vertical Japanese calligraphy reads {argument name="center slogan" default="時空を越え、宿命が交錯する。"}. The composition is dense, cinematic, and symmetrical, like a premium game or movie crossover poster, with dozens of sparks, petals, glowing particles, motion streaks, and layered background architecture.

On the left side, depict 4 distinct Sengoku-themed warriors. At the top left, a stern samurai warlord in ornate black and deep red armor with gold trim, long dark hair tied high and blowing in the wind, shown in a powerful upper-body portrait facing inward; behind him are sakura blossoms, banners, and stacked Japanese castles illuminated with neon-magenta highlights. Mid-left, show 1 battle-hardened older general with wild silver hair, heavy layered armor, and a fierce glare, partially emerging from the fortress cityscape. Lower-left, show 1 aggressive crimson-clad warrior lunging forward with sweeping cloth, horned or antler-like helmet ornamentation, and dynamic red-black armor. At the bottom-left foreground, show 1 dominant swordsman in demonic samurai armor with a crescent-moon helmet crest and glowing red eyes, gripping a katana angled diagonally downward, surrounded by embers and petals. A vertical banner near the upper-left edge displays the Japanese text 日本戦国.

On the right side, depict 4 distinct Three Kingdoms-themed heroes. At the top right, show 1 regal strategist-emperor figure in elaborate blue, black, and gold ceremonial armor with a tall crown-like headdress, shown in upper-body profile facing inward; behind him rises a luminous spectral dragon made of water, cloud, and light. Mid-right, show 1 long-bearded green-robed general with a tall headpiece and lamellar armor, solemn and heroic, framed by neon-lit city structures and swirling magical energy. Slightly below center-right, show 1 elegant strategist-scholar holding an opened feather fan, wearing layered robes and gold ornaments, calm and calculating. At the lower-right edge, show 1 roaring armored warrior with a fierce expression and windblown hair. In the bottom-right foreground, make the dominant figure a green-and-gold armored hero extending a glowing jade-green sword toward the viewer, with flowing robes and luminous energy ribbons curling around the blade. A vertical banner near the upper-right edge displays the Chinese text 中国三国.

Blend historical East Asian war aesthetics with futuristic cyberpunk megacity elements: Japanese pagodas and fortresses on the left, neon skyscrapers and glowing urban lights across both halves, flying fortress silhouettes and distant airborne warships in the sky, magical lightning, smoke, and storm clouds overhead. The sky transitions from sunset violet and rose on the left to stormy turquoise and silver on the right. Use hyper-detailed painterly anime illustration, intricate armor textures, metallic reflections, volumetric lighting, high contrast, epic scale, and intense atmosphere.

At the bottom, add huge stylized title typography: on the left, massive fiery kanji 戦国 with the romanization SENGOKU beneath it; in the middle, a metallic gold VS; on the right, massive jade-glowing kanji 三国 with the romanization SANGOKU beneath it. Below that, add a smaller centered subtitle line reading SENGOKU VS SANGOKU, and beneath it a Japanese tagline: {argument name="bottom tagline" default="時空を超え、英雄たちの戦いが始まる。"}. Poster layout, polished commercial promotional art, extremely detailed, high-impact, collectible poster aesthetic.
title: Sengoku vs Sangoku Crossover Poster
description: A cinematic anime poster prompt for generating an epic crossover battle visual between Japanese Sengoku warlords and Chinese Three Kingdoms heroes.

content: A cinematic third-person action RPG gameplay screenshot set in {argument name="city setting" default="Macau"} in {argument name="year" default="1995"}, viewed from behind a lone male protagonist walking down the center of a crowded wet street at night. The scene is dense with neon signage in Chinese characters, casino signs, jewelry shops, banks, and old mid-rise buildings packed tightly on both sides, with a glowing landmark tower in the distance shaped like a giant illuminated lotus or stylized casino facade. The main character is centered in the frame, wearing a dark leather jacket and jeans, seen from the back, holding a glowing blue energy sword in his right hand and a second short weapon or baton in the left. The street is lined with 6 clearly visible cars, including vintage sedans and 2 taxi cabs, while many pedestrians stand on sidewalks and spill into the street, creating a busy urban nightlife atmosphere. The pavement is rain-slick and highly reflective, mirroring the red, blue, gold, and green neon lights for a moody cyberpunk-meets-1990s crime-drama look. Add a complete in-game HUD overlay: top left has a circular character portrait, the player name {argument name="player name" default="Mayar"}, a red health bar reading 1230 / 1930, a blue energy bar reading 508 / 1160, and a small green status icon; top right has a circular minimap and the location text {argument name="location label" default="MACAU CHRONICLES: 1995"}; bottom left has a semi-transparent chat box with multiple lines of player chat text; bottom right has 6 numbered ability icons in a hotbar, with blue sword-slash skills, a silhouette movement skill, a hand-power icon, a golden weapon skill, and a glowing ultimate icon. Highly detailed, photorealistic game-engine rendering, centered composition, dramatic atmospheric lighting, realistic crowd scale, immersive AAA open-world RPG interface, nostalgic 1990s East Asian street mood with subtle sci-fi fantasy elements.

content: A cinematic third-person action RPG gameplay screenshot set in {argument name="city district" default="Macau Peninsula, New Road"}, styled like a gritty realistic open-world crime game from the late 1990s. The camera is positioned behind a lone male protagonist standing in the middle of a rain-soaked street, full body visible from the back, wearing a dark brown leather jacket with a large embroidered dragon on the back, blue jeans, and dark shoes. He faces a dense neon-lit urban street packed with pedestrians, old shopfronts, hanging signs, tangled cables, weathered apartment buildings, and a tram approaching from the center distance. The scene is at dusk under a cloudy sky, with wet asphalt reflecting orange, pink, blue, and white neon signage. The environment should evoke old Macau with a Cantonese-Portuguese visual mix: narrow streets, vintage cars, crowded sidewalks, multilingual storefront signs, one large glowing sign reading GRAND LISBOA, another reading BANCO TAI SIN, and many vertical Chinese neon signs layered into the depth of the street. Include 1 tram in the middle lane, 1 black sedan parked on the left, and around 10 to 14 pedestrians crossing or standing on both sides of the road. Add realistic puddles, crosswalk lines, metal railings in the right foreground, storefront interiors with warm lighting on the left, and a moody noir atmosphere. Overlay a complete game HUD: top left circular character portrait with the name {argument name="character name" default="龍少爺"}, level 36, 3 horizontal status bars; top center compass with N and E markers plus the location text and a clock reading 14:35; top right circular minimap with icons; right side quest tracker panel containing 3 quest groups with Chinese text, with the top highlighted quest header in orange; bottom left semi-transparent chat box with 4 colored lines of Chinese system and world chat plus a text entry bar and a send button; bottom center hotbar with 7 skill slots labeled 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, Q, E, R, including a large ornate circular ultimate icon at the center and one glowing purple skill icon; bottom right 5 menu icons with Chinese labels for character, inventory, quests, friends, and settings, plus a small ESC indicator. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic rendering, dramatic reflections, dense environmental storytelling, realistic crowd scale, high-end PC game UI, muted cinematic color grading with neon highlights.

content: A cinematic fantasy scene inside a rocky cave during a blizzard, viewed from slightly above campfire level, with 8 characters seated in a circle around a small fire. Outside the cave mouth, a colossal dark mountain rises in the snowstorm, shaped like a sinister pyramid or volcanic fortress, split with glowing crimson-magenta fissures and crowned by a branching, ember-like red energy bloom at the summit; a ring of lava or fire glows at its base across the frozen landscape. The cave interior is warm, amber, and intimate, lit by the fire and a single ornate oil lamp on the right, contrasting with the cold blue-gray storm outside. The group should feel like a high-fantasy adventuring party resting together: 1 regal bird-like humanoid on the left with white feathers, a hooked beak, braided plumage, and layered tribal jewelry; 1 red-haired woman in the left foreground with long braided hair and ornate fantasy garments; 1 young elf-like traveler in blue sitting left of center; 1 small blond elf-like girl at center with pointed ears and clasped hands; 1 elderly king-like man on the right with long white hair, full beard, crown, and dark green robe with gold ornamentation; 1 elegant blond noblewoman beside him in embroidered formal dress; 1 white-haired figure in the foreground right seen mostly from behind in feathered or fur-trimmed clothing; and 1 blue-skinned aquatic-looking woman on the far right with a fin-like headdress, elaborate jewelry, and a cup in hand. Include cups, bowls, plates, bedrolls, sacks, and travel gear scattered around the cave edges. The composition should frame the terrifying glowing mountain through the cave opening behind the party, emphasizing the contrast between sheltered companionship and looming apocalyptic danger. Ultra-detailed textures, realistic fabric and skin, dramatic volumetric firelight, snow streaks driven by wind, moody dark fantasy color grading, painterly realism, epic film still atmosphere, high contrast, rich shadows, masterpiece quality.

content: A dynamic anime action illustration of two young martial-arts women fighting inside a traditional Japanese-style wooden dojo. The left fighter is in the foreground, a black-haired girl with a neat bun tied by a yellow ribbon, wearing a sleeveless yellow Chinese kung fu tunic with black trim, loose black pants, and black cloth shoes. She is in a deep low stance on the wooden floor, one fist pulled back and the other punching forward, surrounded by bright red energy trails that arc around her body and sweep across the scene. Water splashes dramatically around her feet as if her movement skims through a shallow layer of water. The right fighter is airborne in the midground, a pale-skinned girl with light lavender hair in two round buns, wearing a short black-and-white cheongsam-inspired battle dress with gold trim, black sheer tights, and black shoes. She performs a flying side kick while a vivid blue energy spiral curls around her in a circular motion. The collision of force between them has cracked and exploded the wooden floor at center-right, with debris and wood fragments flying outward, while dust and smoke billow across the lower right corner. The dojo interior has exposed timber beams, tatami edging, shoji-style windows, and warm natural light entering from the left. Hang a wooden sign above them with the Chinese text {argument name="sign text" default="币安 vs OKX"}. Use a dramatic wide-angle composition, strong foreshortening, cinematic motion blur, intense speed lines, high-detail anime rendering, glossy highlights, clean line art, energetic combat choreography, and a polished poster-like finish. Add exactly 2 visible fighters, 1 overhead wooden sign, 1 cracked floor impact point, 1 red energy effect around the left fighter, and 1 blue energy effect around the right fighter. Optionally place a subtle watermark-like text at the lower right reading {argument name="watermark text" default="UM YouMind"}.
title: Anime Martial Arts Dojo Duel
description: This prompt generates a high-energy anime-style two-girl martial arts battle scene in a wooden dojo, ideal for dramatic promotional art or social media visuals.

content: Create a {argument name="grid size" default="10x10"} grid containing {argument name="item count" default="100"} different fantasy role-playing game (RPG) items in a {argument name="art style" default="classic pixel art style"} (16-bit or 32-bit sprite style, similar to Japanese RPGs from the SNES/GBA era). Each item should occupy a square tile individually with a short, clear label below. The grid should be neatly arranged on a white background. Ensure each item is visually unique and every label is spelled correctly. Use clean pixel edges, a limited palette for each sprite, and subtle dithering for shadows. Use the following row themes: Row 1: Swords and blades; Row 2: Shields and armor; Row 3: Bows, crossbows, and ranged weapons; Row 4: Staves, wands, and magical implements; Row 5: Potions, elixirs, and bottles; Row 6: Scrolls, grimoires, and spellbooks; Row 7: Rings, amulets, and enchanted accessories; Row 8: Helmets, crowns, and headgear; Row 9: Keys, relics, and quest items; Row 10: Gems, runes, and crafting materials. Display each tile as a centered item sprite on a clean background square, presented in the form of classic inventory icons—similar to what you'd see in a fantasy RPG menu. Maintain consistency and coherence in the overall style, reminiscent of beloved retro fantasy RPGs—charming and refined, yet clear even at small sizes.

content: A hyper-detailed premium collectible trading card illustration of {argument name="hero name" default="Kamen Rider Decade"} in the center foreground, posed in a ruined futuristic city battlefield under a dramatic cosmic night sky. The armored hero wears a glossy magenta, black, and white suit with a segmented helmet and large luminous green compound eyes, facing the viewer in a powerful stance. One arm is thrust forward toward the camera, holding up a character card between black gloved fingers so the card is clearly visible in forced perspective; the other hand gives a confident thumbs-up. The belt device is prominent at the waist. Surrounding the hero are exactly 8 secondary figures and monsters scattered through the rubble and midair battle scene: 1 blue-and-red armored rider crouching in the bottom left foreground, 1 red-and-gold armored rider on the right midground, 2 small rider figures in the distant center background, 2 flying figures in the upper background, and 2 monstrous enemy creatures on the right side, one mid-right and one bottom-right. The environment is dense with collapsed buildings, broken concrete, sparks, smoke, debris, and cinematic action lighting. Render the whole image as a luxurious holographic SSR card with an ornate prismatic foil border, glittering rainbow refractions, metallic gold filigree framing, and layered collectible-card UI. At the top center, large embossed title text reads {argument name="title text" default="KAMEN RIDER DECADE"}, with smaller text above reading "MASKED RIDER". In the top right is a large metallic badge reading {argument name="rarity label" default="SSR"} with 5 gold stars beneath it. In the top left and bottom right are 2 circular magenta crest icons. In the lower center is a gold cursive signature reading {argument name="signature text" default="NickZág"}. Along the bottom frame are 4 labeled UI sections: left panel "CARD TYPE" over "CHARACTER", center nameplate "KAMEN RIDER DECADE" with Japanese subtitle "仮面ライダーディケイド", a barcode panel beneath, and right panel "RARITY" over "SSR". Add tiny footer text under the barcode reading {argument name="footer text" default="DECADE COMPLETE 21"}. Style: ultra-detailed tokusatsu hero art, cinematic photoreal armor textures, dramatic depth, explosive action composition, premium gacha card design, holographic foil print effects, sharp focus on the main hero and card, highly polished game-card promotional artwork.
title: Holographic Kamen Rider Decade SSR Card
description: This prompt generates a premium holographic tokusatsu trading card featuring Kamen Rider Decade in a dramatic battle scene, ideal for collectible card art, poster designs, or gacha-style character promos.

content: A dramatic vertical dark-fantasy anime key visual poster for the RPG {argument name="game title" default="夢喰-BAKU-"}. Center the composition around 3 human figures layered in depth. In the background, a large intimidating adult man is shown from the chest up, facing forward, with messy wavy dark hair, light stubble, a partially open dark shirt, and a shadowed, ominous presence; his face is mostly obscured by darkness and framing, making him feel mysterious and threatening. In the foreground left, place 1 young man in a dynamic three-quarter pose lunging toward the viewer with his right hand stretched out dramatically, wearing a blue jacket over a white hoodie, with short tousled brown hair and a determined expression. In the foreground right, place 1 young woman standing slightly behind him, with long brown hair, a pale blouse, and a dark skirt or high-waisted bottom with a belt; she clasps her hands near her mouth or chest and looks anxious and vulnerable. Use a moody supernatural atmosphere with swirling black and deep violet smoke, ink-like shadows, spectral textures, and pixel-glitch fragments around the edges. Add broken chains diagonally in the background, several floating rectangular frames or screens, and a faint interior corridor or room behind the characters. Integrate the large Japanese title {argument name="title text" default="夢喰"} vertically in the center, rendered in bold white calligraphic kanji with purple splatter, scratches, and glow accents, partially overlapping the characters. At the bottom, include the Japanese tagline {argument name="tagline text" default="分かるだろ？俺達が必要とされる理由がよ"} in elegant white text with part of the sentence highlighted in purple. In the top right corner, add a white studio logo reading {argument name="logo text" default="DCC Project"} with a lotus-like emblem and large serif letters. Overall style: polished illustrated key art for a psychological horror RPG, ultra-detailed anime painting, high contrast, cinematic lighting, deep blacks, indigo and violet palette, ominous supernatural energy, poster-ready typography, premium promotional visual.
title: Dark Fantasy RPG Key Visual Poster
description: This prompt generates a polished anime-style vertical key visual for a psychological horror RPG, suitable for game promotion, title screens, and social media announcements.

content: A dramatic vertical sci-fi key visual poster for a dark space opera game, featuring a single colossal alien-mechanical spacecraft centered slightly low in the frame, angled diagonally from lower left toward upper right as if surging forward through space. The ship is razor-sharp, asymmetrical, and aggressively organic, built from layered black metal and glowing crimson-red armor plates, with a long spear-like prow, many jagged fins, and about 12 to 16 whip-like tendrils or spines streaming backward from its upper rear like biomechanical hair. Behind it floats a large shadowed planet at center, encircled by 3 luminous red orbital rings that create a halo effect. At upper left, include 1 cratered moon or planet partially cropped by the frame. Scatter multiple dark asteroids and rocky debris across the foreground and edges, especially lower right and lower left, to create depth. The background is a dense starfield with red nebula clouds and streaks of fiery cosmic dust. In the upper right, place a blazing orange-white sun flare breaking into the scene, casting hot rim light across the ship and rings. Use a high-contrast palette of black, deep crimson, ember red, and white highlights, with glossy metallic reflections and a grim, apocalyptic mood. Add vertical Japanese tagline text on the right side in white Mincho-style serif characters: 「あの太陽に飛び込めば 冷めきった私の心も温かくなるのだろうか」. At the bottom center, add the main title in very large distressed white Japanese serif characters with cracked texture and subtle red glow: 「斑鳩の柩」. Beneath it, add 1 line of smaller red katakana subtitle text: 「イカルガのクルスー」, and beneath that 1 line of small Roman letters in red: "IKARUGA NO CRUX". Make it look like premium anime game key art, cinematic poster composition, ultra-detailed, sharp focus, dynamic lighting, epic scale, ominous and beautiful.
title: Crimson Space Opera Key Visual
description: A dark, cinematic sci-fi game poster showing a red-black biomechanical starship against planets, glowing orbital rings, and Japanese title typography, ideal for key visual or cover art generation.

content: A dramatic anime action illustration inside an old wooden martial arts hall, showing two young women in mid-battle with explosive motion and elemental energy trails. In the foreground, a fierce female martial artist lunges low toward the viewer in a powerful punching stance, her right fist extended straight ahead and her body twisted dynamically. She has dark black hair tied into a messy high bun with loose strands and red ribbons, sharp intense eyes, and a focused combative expression. She wears a white traditional Chinese martial arts top with red trim, red tassel frog closures, and subtle embroidered patterns, paired with flowing deep red pants and black cloth shoes with red accents. Red ribbon-like energy and glowing scarlet brushstroke arcs coil around her arms, torso, and legs, sweeping across the frame like fiery calligraphy. In the upper right, a second young woman leaps through the air in a defensive or spellcasting pose, one hand stretched outward. She has {argument name="hair color" default="light purple"} hair styled in two buns with trailing strands and ornate gold hair ornaments. She wears a dark green Chinese-style dress with gold embroidery, black stockings, and dark shoes. Bright blue water-like energy spirals around her in a large circular arc, splashing and glittering with luminous droplets. Set the scene in a weathered dojo or wuguan interior with tall wooden beams, hanging lanterns, broken floorboards, flying splinters, dust, sparks, and debris exploding from the impact of the fight. Include one large wooden signboard above them with the black calligraphy text 武术会, plus two vertical hanging banners, the left reading 以武会友 and the right reading 刚柔并济. Use a low-angle cinematic perspective, strong foreshortening, extreme motion, dense particles, and dramatic warm-vs-cool color contrast between the red and blue energy. Highly detailed anime painting, ultra-dynamic composition, sharp linework, rich textures, glowing effects, volumetric lighting, and epic battle key visual quality.
title: Anime Martial Arts Duel in Dojo
description: This prompt generates a high-energy anime battle scene between two female martial artists in a wooden dojo, ideal for action poster art or dramatic character showcase imagery.

content:
Create a dramatic Japanese mobile game advertisement poster for a zombie survival RPG in anime-meets-cinematic style. Vertical smartphone poster layout, dense promotional design, gritty urban apocalypse background at dusk with ruined city streets, smoke, sparks, debris, damaged buildings, neon signs, and a crowd of zombies advancing from behind. In the center, a young anime woman sits on the ground in a slightly slouched pose, legs bent, holding a black handgun upright in one hand. She has straight dark brown to black shoulder-length hair, pale skin, and an oversized dirty white T-shirt splattered with blood. Large bold Japanese calligraphy is printed vertically on the shirt: "働きたくね〜". Her expression area is simple and unobtrusive so the composition emphasizes the shirt, weapon, and mood. Surround her with multiple zombies in torn clothing, reaching forward from the left and right background.

Use an aggressive game key-art design with 8 clearly separated promotional sections. Section 1: top-left game logo block, count 3 text elements, with large distressed English title "Dead or work", smaller Japanese subtitle "ゾンビサバイバルRPG", and heavy black paint-splatter background with white and red text. Section 2: right-side vertical slogan area, count 2 text elements, with white Japanese text "動かない、ただ" above giant red vertical text "生き残れ。" on a rough black brushstroke strip. Section 3: left-middle feature list panel, count 4 feature rows, each row with a white icon in a black square and yellow/white Japanese copy; labels are "ゾンビを倒して生き延びろ", "拠点を強化・カスタマイズ", "仲間と協力プレイ", and "デイリーミッションで報酬GET". Section 4: right-middle bonus campaign panel, count 1 headline plus 3 reward items; headline in a bright jagged yellow burst says "今すぐ始めると 豪華特典プレゼント!" and beneath it are three item boxes labeled "ゴールド ×5000", "レア武器 (7日間)", and "サバイバルキット ×10". Section 5: lower-middle gameplay screenshot strip, count 4 thumbnails with captions; captions are "リアルタイムバトル!", "基地を自由にカスタム!", "仲間とレイドボスに挑め!", and "広大なオープンワールド!". Section 6: bottom call-to-action banner, count 2 text elements, with a huge yellow-and-red Japanese phrase "今すぐダウンロード!" and smaller white/red subtext "あなたの選択が、生死を分ける。". Section 7: bottom-right store badges, count 2 badges, showing App Store and Google Play style download buttons. Section 8: bottom-right QR area, count 1 QR code in a white square.

Overall aesthetic: hyper-detailed, high-contrast, grimy, intense, commercially polished gacha/mobile game ad, combining anime character art with realistic zombie horror background. Use bold distressed typography, black brush textures, red warning colors, yellow promotional highlights, metallic UI framing, and cinematic orange-gray lighting.
title: Zombie Survival RPG Anime Ad Poster
description: This generates a dense Japanese-style mobile game advertisement poster for a zombie survival RPG, suitable for app promo art, fake game ads, or cinematic anime key visuals.

The scene features a {argument name="environment" default="lush, blocky landscape with a river, a small wooden cabin, a windmill, a waterfall, and majestic mountains in the background"}. The world blends realistic lighting, volumetric clouds, and high-resolution textures with cubic, voxel geometry. In the foreground on the left, a {argument name="mob 1" default="blocky green creeper"} stands on the grass, while a {argument name="mob 2" default="blocky brown wolf"} stands on the dirt path to the right. On the far right, the player's hand holds a {argument name="held item" default="pixelated blue diamond sword"} in a first-person perspective. At the bottom of the screen is a game user interface featuring a health bar with 10 red hearts, a green experience bar with the number '16', a hunger bar with 10 brown meat icons, and a 9-slot inventory hotbar. The hotbar contains, from left to right: a selected blue tool with a green highlight box, a green tool, a knife, a wrench with the number '3', a piece of meat with '6', a lantern with '24', a dirt block with '10', a bucket, and a sponge block.

content: Express {argument name="subject" default="a powerful AI builder"} in a graffiti sketch style, presenting an overall visual effect of quick outlines, free deformation, improvised hand-drawing, and draft-like sketches. The lines are casual, exaggerated, varying in thickness, and slightly messy but rhythmic and expressive, emphasizing generalization, exaggeration, fun, and spontaneity rather than rigorous realism or fine detail. The colors are expressed in rough blocks with a distinct dry-brush feel, retaining uneven smears, brush marks, fly-white, and layering. Colors automatically adapt to the {argument name="theme" default="powerful AI builder"}, but the overall expression remains graffiti-like, sketch-like, and generalized. No transparent watercolor smudging effects, no delicate watercolor transitions, no paper textures, no soft atomization, and no dreamy textures. The background is mainly white space, maintaining a sense of simplicity, ease, unfinishedness, and design. Small amounts of auxiliary symbols, arrows, marks, circles, repeated lines, handwritten text, or other graffiti elements can be added to enhance the sketchbook or essay-like visual language, but they should not be too crowded or destroy the subject and the white space atmosphere. The content of the picture does not need to be written in advance; {argument name="character image" default="a powerful AI builder"} will automatically deduce and generate the most suitable main image, actions, related elements, symbols, or simplified scenes. The overall style remains a unified graffiti sketch style and an exaggerated, generalized expression, avoiding complex realistic backgrounds and excessive detail. A special signature 'BlanPlan' should be naturally added as part of the picture, in a low-key but clear position such as the bottom left, bottom right, or near the title. The style should be unified with the overall layout, like an artist's signature or a design mark; the signature font should be exquisite, restrained, and high-end, not too large, and should not destroy the main composition or appear abrupt or cheap.

content:
Goal: Create a clean anime character sheet for {argument name="character name" default="手塚メモ (Tezuka Memo)"}, a cat-version college girl protagonist, with Japanese annotation text and multiple turnaround views.

Canvas: Wide horizontal white page, approximately 16:9, thin black framing lines, crisp print-layout look. Use black bold typography and a manga/anime production-sheet style. Keep the background plain white with no scenery.

Layout: Top-left large italic bold title reads CHARACTER SHEET. Along the upper center/right include Japanese heading text with a small label meaning face close-up and a large protagonist label. Arrange exactly 4 visible character depictions: 1 full-body front view on the left labeled FRONT, 1 full-body side view in the center labeled SIDE, 1 full-body back view right of center labeled BACK, and 1 boxed portrait close-up in the upper-right. The close-up portrait sits inside a thin black rectangular box. Beneath the portrait, place a compact Japanese profile block and a longer Japanese design-note paragraph.

Character details: Draw a slim 19-year-old anime college girl with very long pale pink hair that fades into deeper pink at the ends, cat ears on top of her head, and a pale pink cat tail. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft square blur/mosaic in all visible face views. She wears exactly 5 main outfit pieces: an oversized blue hoodie with drawstrings and front pouch pocket, a short dark pleated skirt, yellow loose leg warmers, white sneakers, and cat-ear/cat-tail cosplay accessories. In the side and back views, show the tail extending from behind the hoodie/skirt area and curling outward with a darker pink tip. Hair should be long and slightly wavy, reaching the lower back, with the pink gradient most visible near the ends.

Text content: Use English labels for the view names: FRONT, SIDE, BACK. Use the title CHARACTER SHEET. Include Japanese character-sheet text in the right column. Profile block default text: {argument name="profile block" default="名前：手塚メモ (Tezuka Memo)\n年齢：19歳\n大学2年生\n学部：情報メディア学部"}. Design-note paragraph default text: {argument name="design notes" default="猫耳バージョン共通ビジュアル設定。猫耳はカチューシャタイプだが、まるで本物の耳のようにアニメーション化できる。しっぽはコスプレアイテムで、ベルトでパーカーの内側に固定されている。髪色、パーカー、スカート、レッグウォーマーはそのまま。TMAアドンを有機猫の付け根に移動させる。耳としっぽは感情表現用に追加パーツとして使用される（嬉しいときは耳が立ち、落ち込んでいるときはしっぽが垂れる）。"}

Visual style: Soft cel-shaded anime illustration, delicate line art, pastel colors, slightly desaturated blue hoodie, pale skin, light pink hair, production-reference sheet quality. Text should look like printed black Japanese and English type, with the main title heavy and italic. Maintain a balanced layout with large empty white margins.

Constraints: Show exactly 4 character depictions and exactly 5 main outfit pieces listed above. Do not add extra poses, props, background scenery, speech bubbles, logos, watermarks, or additional characters.
title: Anime Cat Girl Character Sheet
description: Creates a wide anime production character sheet with front, side, back, and close-up views plus Japanese profile and design annotations.
